name: Team Jane
subject: 🚨 EARLY VOTE GOTV FINAL PUSH!! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
body:
janehopehamilton.com [janehopehamilton.com]Friends –
Early vote starts in one week and our team is out every day talking to voters at their doors, on the phones and connecting with neighbors across Congressional District 30. We have a BIG goal this week: talk to over 5,000 Congressional District 30 primary voters to let them know about Jane’s plans for Congressional District 30 and her experience getting things done for our community. Thanks to the generous, ongoing commitment of campaign supporters like you, I know we can hit this crucial goal!
Your donation one week before voters cast their ballots will allow our team to get the job done and ensure a strong showing the first week of early vote.
Can you rush a donation one week before votes are cast and support our Get Out The Vote efforts [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask] ?
Give $25 → Reach 125 Voters [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Give $50 → Reach 250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask?express_lane=true&amount= 50&refcode=express_lane_ 50] Give $100 → Reach 500 Voters [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask?express_lane=true&amount= 100&refcode=express_lane_ 100] Give $250 → Reach 1,250 Voters [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask?express_lane=true&amount= 250&refcode=express_lane_ 250] Give $500 → Reach 2,500 Voters [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask?express_lane=true&amount= 500&refcode=express_lane_ 500]Every little bit will help spread the word about Jane’s proven record of fighting for good jobs, access to the ballot box and healthcare for all Texans. Telling Jane’s story isn’t possible without the support of our hundreds of Team Jane members who have been with the campaign since day one, and who are joining the campaign daily! Can we count on you to support the campaign in this important stretch [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask] ?
Let’s Win!
Team Jane
#SeeJaneRun #SeeJaneWin
janehopehamilton.com [janehopehamilton.com]For over 20 years Jane has been working for our communities
Legislative Aide for The Honorable Helen Giddings
Senior staffer on the US House Rules Committee for the Honorable Martin Frost
Campaign Manager for the Dallas Democratic Sweep in 2006 which flipped Dallas County from Republican to its current status as a Democratic stronghold.
Helped elect Craig Watkins, the first African-American District Attorney in the State of Texas.
Former Campaign Manager for Dallas County Judge Clay Jenkins
Former Campaign Manager and Chief of Staff for Congressman Marc Veasey
Democratic Primary State Director for the Joe Biden Presidential Campaign
General Election Strategic Advisor for the Joe Biden Presidential and Kamala Harris Vice Presidential Campaign
https://www.facebook.com/janehopetx/ [https://www.facebook.com/janehopetx/] https://twitter.com/JaneHopeTx [https://twitter.com/JaneHopeTx] https://www.instagram.com/JaneHopeTx/ [https://www.instagram.com/JaneHopeTx/]

Dallas, TX 75222
United States

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Restoring trust in government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| I ran for Congress to represent my home community and work for the people of mid-Michigan. Members of Congress are elected to fight for their constituents, not enrich themselves while in office.

That’s why I’ve introduced new legislation to ban Members of Congress from buying, selling or trading stocks while in office. Unfortunately, we’ve seen too many elected officials break the rules. We must restore trust in government—and that starts with demonstrating that elected officials are serving the public’s best interest, not their own self-interest.

**[Now, I want to know what you think. name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: 2022 is underway!
body:
Peter,

I hope this note finds you well as the wet and cold weather continues in Brooklyn!

2022 is officially underway and so is the work Coro NY is doing throughout New York.

I recently had the pleasure of going on NY1 to speak with Errol Louis about the moment that Coro is currently having. Alongside sharing some insights into Coro’s mission, vision, and work, I was able to highlight the Coro Alums who are serving on the Mayor’s transition committee and have been elected to City Council. You can see the segment here.

In the days, weeks, and months ahead, I’ll be filling you in on the work I’ll be doing to continue to support our community, Coro, and beyond.

With gratitude,
Adem

name: Josh Harder
subject: Taking a look at our poll results
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/MHhdKANuUktmL_UNiVIahBz6KxkpJDZAumbqj2sgU14=/ozZzUKdblcNLmFEzd38AIiZlNHQ3JUc84tB7of1RcsM=?refcode=E13934-20220205-SurveyFollowUp-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) | Hi Peter, Last month, I asked my team to send each of you a poll asking what your #1 issue for 2022 is - and I was thrilled to see thousands of responses! Here are the results: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/MHhdKANuUktmL_UNiVIahBz6KxkpJDZAumbqj2sgU14=/ozZzUKdblcNLmFEzd38AIiZlNHQ3JUc84tB7of1RcsM=?refcode=E13934-20220205-SurveyFollowUp-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) As you know, I'm a numbers guy through and through, so I really appreciate you taking the time to let me know what's important to you. [**Whether it 's healthcare, the economy, voting rights or the environment, I'll always be fighting for you in Congress. Please chip in now so I can continue leading these fights for our communities!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MHhdKANuUktmL_UNiVIahBz6KxkpJDZAumbqj2sgU14=/ozZzUKdblcNLmFEzd38AIiZlNHQ3JUc84tB7of1RcsM=?refcode=E13934-20220205-SurveyFollowUp-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) So many of you told me that healthcare is your top priority, and I completely agree that our healthcare system is simply not working. This is personal for me: my brother David was born 10 weeks premature and needed multiple surgeries - which my parents would not have been able to afford without insurance. I believe that healthcare is fundamentally a justice issue: the quality and accessibility of healthcare should not depend on your zip code or your income. It's a human right. **That 's why I'm working to cap prices for prescription drugs (for example insulin at $35/month), and also attract more doctors to underserved communities like mine.** I also wanted to share a comment that I found incredibly meaningful: one supporter, Alexandra, said her number one issue is voting rights, because "without it, our voices can't be heard on any of these other issues." And she's exactly right. Right now, Republicans are passing sweeping voter restrictions that unfairly target communities of color and other marginalized groups, undermining the very foundation of our democracy. **I refuse to let our voices be silenced, and I 'm incredibly proud to have cast a critical vote for the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to fight back.** [**Peter, I 'm committed to fighting for the reforms we so desperately need. Will you chip in $19 today so that I can keep working for the issues you care most about in Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MHhdKANuUktmL_UNiVIahBz6KxkpJDZAumbqj2sgU14=/ozZzUKdblcNLmFEzd38AIiZlNHQ3JUc84tB7of1RcsM=?refcode=E13934-20220205-SurveyFollowUp-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/MHhdKANuUktmL_UNiVIahBz6KxkpJDZAumbqj2sgU14=/ozZzUKdblcNLmFEzd38AIiZlNHQ3JUc84tB7of1RcsM=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13934-20220205-SurveyFollowUp-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

name: Tom Emmer, NRCC Chairman
subject: I can't thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Thank you for standing with House Republicans in our fight to win back the House in 2022.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3g49e--fgxr-4qqlpo3&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hello, Tom Emmer here.

I’m the Chairman of the National Republican Congressional Committee.

Let me start by saying **THANK YOU**. I wanted to share some great news. It is because of you that last month we not only reached our fundraising goal, but we crushed the Democrats.

Your support of House Republicans has brought us one step closer to winning back the Majority in 2022. **Every dollar you give forces Democrats to make a choice: RETIRE OR LOSE.**

I recently called some of our grassroots donors to personally thank them for contributing to the House Republicans' victory fund. **[If you want to hear from me next, chip in any amount you can here>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g49e-1wy7y-4qqlpo4/ "If you want to hear from me next, chip in any amount you can here.>>>")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g49e-1wy7z-4qqlpo5/ "Tom Emmer")
---

**I truly can’t say thank you enough for your support. **

Your donation is going to have a direct impact on the future of this country. It is because of your support, we are going to defeat the Corrupt Democrats and fire Lame Duck Speaker Nancy Pelosi once and for all.

**[Thank you for standing with me and House Republicans in our fight to win back the House in 2022. Continue to take a stand by contributing any amount you can here>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g49e-1wy80-4qqlpo2/ "Thank you for standing with me and House Republicans in our fight to win back the House in 2022. Continue to take a stand by contributing any amount you can here>>>")**

God Bless.

Tom Emmer
Chairman of the NRCC
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g49e-1wy81-4qqlpo3/ "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g49e-1wy82-4qqlpo4/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g49e-1wy83-4qqlpo5/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

Florida's incredible governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, spends every waking hour protecting the Sunshine State from the Biden Administration's relentless attacks on our freedom.
Just this week, Joe Biden announced that each state will get federal funding to improve bridges and infrastructure, which is important to keep our families safe. **But in a move that many are calling spiteful, the administration is only giving Florida a fraction of the funds they 're giving blue states. **

subject: ICYMI: Bill Stepien and Justin Clark Join Gibbons Campaign
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZscCpJlz_93sgXMhhuiplEr_vCFGjCbhgZIiSRZJX6lSIn5VJmOUba9Ji6AJukd3_Jhw7gJz9-tSGTX-8sOrGcwIWVaJEyvLaUQ==&c=tG-ycnfYJYyWz27ydt3522wsvCAnhcsKzb1sNPYMbMdoOqubhO6ncA==&ch=elNFBt77ec5rzvC1R9DaMfRfBwcKROhMc-8JuqNlxoo8C0Tr63VMog==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: February 7, 2022
---
| Contact: Brianna Kraemer press@gibbonsforohio.com
---
| ICYMI: Bill Stepien and Justin Clark Join Gibbons Campaign
---
|
ICYMI: This morning, Fox News reported that Bill Stepien and Justin Clark are joining the Gibbons campaign. Stepien and Clark founded the firm National Public Affairs after serving as 2020 Campaign Manager and Deputy Campaign Manager for President Trump.

---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsZDRI3i3FqXUx_d47QFOhcP2JpLuX73bUid3IcUKIQi20uM4B1MJUhQx4Qj9gAsKFrXhuA0p6XNFJthut6ti1u4fcJAEiThE7U6ZBDNz_etN_WUzdNJGviEtT6kTEFFOAhFhevgNvxtoJim8nI_UVvPEAURun-kIojxXhf7C3RGMe1k87NvoEZ_Ui4QXTrcepSzeFIQ45Zp_&c=tG-ycnfYJYyWz27ydt3522wsvCAnhcsKzb1sNPYMbMdoOqubhO6ncA==&ch=elNFBt77ec5rzvC1R9DaMfRfBwcKROhMc-8JuqNlxoo8C0Tr63VMog==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsZDRI3i3FqXUx_d47QFOhcP2JpLuX73bUid3IcUKIQi20uM4B1MJUhQx4Qj9gAsKFrXhuA0p6XNFJthut6ti1u4fcJAEiThE7U6ZBDNz_etN_WUzdNJGviEtT6kTEFFOAhFhevgNvxtoJim8nI_UVvPEAURun-kIojxXhf7C3RGMe1k87NvoEZ_Ui4QXTrcepSzeFIQ45Zp_&c=tG-ycnfYJYyWz27ydt3522wsvCAnhcsKzb1sNPYMbMdoOqubhO6ncA==&ch=elNFBt77ec5rzvC1R9DaMfRfBwcKROhMc-8JuqNlxoo8C0Tr63VMog==)
---
|
[Fox News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsZDRI3i3FqXUx_d47QFOhcP2JpLuX73bUid3IcUKIQi20uM4B1MJUhQx4Qj9gAsKFrXhuA0p6XNFJthut6ti1u4fcJAEiThE7U6ZBDNz_etN_WUzdNJGviEtT6kTEFFOAhFhevgNvxtoJim8nI_UVvPEAURun-kIojxXhf7C3RGMe1k87NvoEZ_Ui4QXTrcepSzeFIQ45Zp_&c=tG-ycnfYJYyWz27ydt3522wsvCAnhcsKzb1sNPYMbMdoOqubhO6ncA==&ch=elNFBt77ec5rzvC1R9DaMfRfBwcKROhMc-8JuqNlxoo8C0Tr63VMog==): "Bill Stepien, who served as former President [Donald Trump](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsZDRI3i3FqXUgwy63sv7dGq5ydER5YDd_doLEh9-sDHT7p3Q-EE0iluwABnUXRz9Otwirb7atV3rPNFrBLkFdd_BU1u-kaoSWewBvUCrAtvxhGng1ZxQ_dVxR_abZVtN4VIj0BhNIZSF&c=tG-ycnfYJYyWz27ydt3522wsvCAnhcsKzb1sNPYMbMdoOqubhO6ncA==&ch=elNFBt77ec5rzvC1R9DaMfRfBwcKROhMc-8JuqNlxoo8C0Tr63VMog==)'s campaign manager during the summer and autumn of 2020, is jumping into [Ohio](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsZDRI3i3FqXUW9U1RJZ31RgD7TO8QJajoM2LGRWrI09HioKFu4E-32ljfTYxt8SpHSIV5rcPBqR4M35VPZyszoUuU34uQCSxBEMA93qahF4HrQklSsMvKjmcdwXg8sREzW_ozoX7_blEArUFQBTU8JA=&c=tG-ycnfYJYyWz27ydt3522wsvCAnhcsKzb1sNPYMbMdoOqubhO6ncA==&ch=elNFBt77ec5rzvC1R9DaMfRfBwcKROhMc-8JuqNlxoo8C0Tr63VMog==)'s crowded and contentious [Republican Senate ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsZDRI3i3FqXUrK3fwJtbhK-b7ZpJWvmK8TC01hYLW6pCmOCnxi2VXJPI75FW_fek1RMU5Uf5_1_cFlko3e8-rTGlQ1ReyMhIW8WkWHGjYzsib80rbI0d1aa1oG0OwWr77M-KX920tJAalhD2U_CA59E=&c=tG-ycnfYJYyWz27ydt3522wsvCAnhcsKzb1sNPYMbMdoOqubhO6ncA==&ch=elNFBt77ec5rzvC1R9DaMfRfBwcKROhMc-8JuqNlxoo8C0Tr63VMog==)primary in the race to succeed retiring GOP Sen. Rob Portman. Fox News learned on Monday that Stepien is joining Mike Gibbons' Senate campaign as a senior adviser."
"National Public Affairs is proud to join the Gibbons campaign. Mike Gibbons has the momentum in the Ohio Senate race and is committed to the America First agenda and MAGA movement. Not only is Mike poised to win the primary, but he will be an excellent Senator for the great state of Ohio," Stepien told Fox News in a statement.
"We are excited to have Bill and Justin as part of our team. Having worked with them both on Trump's 2016 campaign, I know first-hand that their advice and expertise will be invaluable as we move into the final stretch of the primary. We have momentum on our side and look forward to being victorious on May 3," Mike Biundo, Gibbons' general consultant and co-founder of Ascent Strategic, stated.
[Internal polling](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsRLGbEMauW-3eKHMRxs-myqvto2OCsDBqbACCTQCYjkuCuLjXqD52i9KJ1_oavMd74SWSoRXdxU52YacGXujH3Kt3GLYuGfj8Roo-cYZdxHCKpybtQUHTqGCbdm_EXsI4sjRx8k6J7PaTOPoxsi2U2apTc5jus6u_pDIBP1k5POd&c=tG-ycnfYJYyWz27ydt3522wsvCAnhcsKzb1sNPYMbMdoOqubhO6ncA==&ch=elNFBt77ec5rzvC1R9DaMfRfBwcKROhMc-8JuqNlxoo8C0Tr63VMog==) shows Mike Gibbons has taken the lead in the Ohio Senate Republican primary field.

name: Letitia James
subject: What are you most worried about?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41527054/329199543/1641658269?amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk320-su-nd&refcode=jtk320-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2Q5YTZhZC0zZDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaxRdNSdJXIPpVGfbgtW3YalJOkRKKgO0xr3gJTEcQ0=)

Peter, I didn't grow up with power or privilege.

I was born and raised in Brooklyn, attended New York’s public schools, and had no special ties to political leaders. And, like millions of other New Yorkers, I was not given a platform to adequately voice my concerns or thoughts.
When I became the People’s Lawyer, I vowed that I would give a voice to all – especially those who have been without one for generations.

**Peter, ensuring New Yorkers have a voice in our government remains my top priority – that’s why my team created this quick survey.[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my priorities survey so I can continue to fight for what matters most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41527055/329199544/-57128326?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk320-su-nd&refcode=jtk320-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2Q5YTZhZC0zZDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaxRdNSdJXIPpVGfbgtW3YalJOkRKKgO0xr3gJTEcQ0=&emci=e41d651c-e785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=17d9a6ad-3d88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41527056/329199545/-57128326?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk320-su-nd&refcode=jtk320-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2Q5YTZhZC0zZDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaxRdNSdJXIPpVGfbgtW3YalJOkRKKgO0xr3gJTEcQ0=&emci=e41d651c-e785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=17d9a6ad-3d88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)

As this election year continues, we have so many critical fights ahead of us. And I want you by my side as I hold Big Pharma accountable for exorbitantly high prescription drug prices, crack down on the gun violence epidemic, fight to preserve voting and reproductive rights for all, and so much more. I am dedicated to each and every fight, large or small, and I know that you are too.
**Peter, I need at least 1,000 responses on my priorities survey to gain a better understanding of what matters most to you, but your response is still missing.

[Will you take a moment to answer my survey so I can understand which fights to prioritize this election year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41527057/329199546/-57128326?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk320-su-nd&refcode=jtk320-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2Q5YTZhZC0zZDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaxRdNSdJXIPpVGfbgtW3YalJOkRKKgO0xr3gJTEcQ0=&emci=e41d651c-e785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=17d9a6ad-3d88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)**

name: American Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8431%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=NrZxsBXKekoaFAAWXLQhVA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13962%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hQx4DZU2qZFUnE5y9ZpwkA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13963%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BR4SdoUufzbGXQ09axLgJg&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13964%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F1xBLqwF7i9Hcs6DDD%2fNwQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8431%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=NrZxsBXKekoaFAAWXLQhVA&sysid=1)_

clean_body: The most recent financial reports show, Bill Lee raising over $3,000,000. We not only need your financial support but also your voice to help our campaign. | | Team — According to the Tennessean, Bill Lee has raised over $3M. Although we are gaining support from so many throughout the state of Tennessee, we need your financial support. We can not have a Governor that is more concerned about gun policies than our children and their education. It is time to TURN TENNESSEE BLUE! We need to raise $12,342 to get our goal monthly. And between you and me, it would be phenomenal if we could do even better than that! The team has pulled together a unique link for you to use. It’s secure and your donation will go straight through. Here it is: = Thanks for stepping up. Your donation allows us to continue efforts to amplify our message during the month of February! = All the best, JB Democrat JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. It's going to take all us of working together to defeat Bill Lee and elect JB Smiley. Jr., but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails or update your contact information . body:
Now, we’re officially representing the Democrats, marking the start of what is sure to be a historic campaign.
Today marks the first **official** day of our campaign, friend
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41509847/329131678/-586582749?refcode=EM_FR_220202OfficialCandidate_N_TC_TC_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNmODU0OC0xNjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVnMpkeHOdKDxapMVbpG_cgVFUH5o7FE6OlIgOq3no0=)
---
I wanted to give you a big update, folks! The filing deadline has officially passed and we are the only Democrat on the ballot for Secretary of State. This was a huge strategic milestone, especially since there will be a struggle on the other side to see who can hug Donald Trump the tightest. Over the past several months our team, with your help, has been preparing for this moment, organizing and connecting with voters to ensure that we are posed for success. With your help we have been bringing Chelsea's Black Girl Magic to all corners of Ohio. You can see our launch video here: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41509848/329131679/-586582749?refcode=EM_FR_220202OfficialCandidate_N_TC_TC_5_NG_N_L2&&&&amount=22&refcode2=1c3f8548-1688-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNmODU0OC0xNjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVnMpkeHOdKDxapMVbpG_cgVFUH5o7FE6OlIgOq3no0=) Now, **we’re officially representing the Democrats** , marking the start of what is sure to be a historic campaign. Everyday we will work hard to make sure you are proud to be a part of this team. [**Will you help us kick off our campaign right and chip in $22 to elect Ohio’s first Black female Secretary of State? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41509850/329131680/1971582203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNmODU0OC0xNjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVnMpkeHOdKDxapMVbpG_cgVFUH5o7FE6OlIgOq3no0=#) Let's do this, Team Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

name: American Defense News
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8n7htt1fpfj5877usnqemaoi5q1gjql22smctv8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe9p35merr0s3gekpn7c35e5q7ac30moqm8dbh6lq30tpmc2om9cj56aqeeodgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6hj39p5lmdjreor666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5gm4pb3c3j6aoh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8iv7dkgtfmv7oocvltr79hntq2mgmjmemgcm4m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9im6o76clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlse027d8on5lo9vg50h74skdp0hqr4j3hhfq0c8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9im6o76clh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2e8d9fkdsfc2llu8bdug9jbftpv6svse72t5b08_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9im6o76clh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbabnupkdamfp9ctj1s7kjjuokqvqhi572voc7j8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9im6o76clh2bs)**
---

name: Daniel Wasta
subject: With your support, my wife will defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41529001/329207538/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk665-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI3NDc5MS00Mjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9byco5Dry0M0lJ0uUNfEDQF61oHDQ75cAS9euA6O4Y=)
Hey there, Peter. It's Daniel, Abby's husband. This is a photo of us from only a few years ago, but I swear it could've been a lifetime ago.
Abby and I have had a pretty eventful few years. From getting married, to Abby serving in Congress, to launching her campaign against Sen. Grassley (R-IA), it's been a whirlwind. But I wouldn't have it any other way.

You see, when there's work to be done or a problem to solve, Abby signs up and _does _the work to make her community a better place every single time. That's why she ran for the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old, and then four years later became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic.
When I married Abby, I knew that I was marrying a fighter – someone 100% committed to public service, someone who knows and appreciates the value of hard work, someone who's going to spend her life doing all the good she can. That's what I love about her, and it's why I know she's going to work her heart out to become the next senator from Iowa and fight for working families.
I have complete faith that Abby will defeat Sen. Grassley, but we both know how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment is ready to pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like Abby, and right now, they have more than $32 million in the bank to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans.
**This is where you come in, Peter: Abby can win if she has _ _ an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. [Will you help her raise another $6,000 before midnight tonight? Donate $5 or whatever you can right now, and every dollar will ensure Abby's campaign has what it takes to defeat top Trump ally Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41529002/329207539/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk665-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI3NDc5MS00Mjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9byco5Dry0M0lJ0uUNfEDQF61oHDQ75cAS9euA6O4Y=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41529003/329207540/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk665-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI3NDc5MS00Mjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9byco5Dry0M0lJ0uUNfEDQF61oHDQ75cAS9euA6O4Y=)
---
It means the world to have you on this team. Thank you so much for supporting Abby.

Daniel (Abby's husband)

As Nevada’s governor, Steve has fought back against relentless GOP attacks to make progress for our families.
He led the successful push to permanently expand mail-in voting, increased funding to our public schools, and signed into law a public health insurance option will make quality care more affordable across Nevada.
**But all that progress is making him a target of the far-right — and if we lose this race in November, Republicans won’t hesitate to roll back everything we’ve achieved for working families.**
[**We can't let that happen, folks. name: Team Engel
subject: An Insurrection Is Not 'Political Discourse'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41529266/329208796/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZkZWNmNi00Mzg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npKQI63dpVx1VsgBTNYLwcBTVeURUYpiWCDvkDIiN8I=&emci=4b877e24-3988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=bdfdecf6-4388-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
We all saw what happened 13 months ago. Barricades were toppled, police officers beaten, and the halls of Congress stormed by insurrectionists attempting to prevent Congress from doing its job. The building was overrun, lives were lost, and millions around the world watched an angry mob seize control of the United States Capitol.
**The January 6 attack was domestic terrorism, plain and simple.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41529268/329208803/2089498197?refcode=X_020722_Jan6thGOP&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZkZWNmNi00Mzg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npKQI63dpVx1VsgBTNYLwcBTVeURUYpiWCDvkDIiN8I=)
---
**The Republican Party declared Friday that this attack on our democracy was “legitimate political discourse”.** The Republican National Committee voted to censure two House Republicans who participated in the subsequent investigation, which the RNC claimed “crossed the line”, **claiming the investigation was “persecution of ordinary citizens who engaged in legitimate political discourse that had nothing to do with violence at the Capitol.”**

**This is what we’re up against.** Republicans want to take control of an institution they are unwilling to protect. We know hyperbole in politics can get a little out of control at times. But when we say this latest action by the Republican Party is scary, we think there is ample evidence to support the claim.This vote declaring the January 6 attack “legitimate political discourse” was not taken at a meeting of the John Birch Society. It wasn’t taken at a Q-anon gathering or even at a Freedom Caucus meeting. No, this vote legitimizing the attack on our capitol was taken by the Republican National Committee.
Which is why we need you. We cannot let the Republicans take back the House, and AZ-06 is the line in the sand. This is the most competitive district in the state, and one of the most important for Democrats’ chances of maintaining control of the House nationally. [**Will you chip in $5, $50, or $500 today to help us protect the People’s House?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41529269/329208804/416963966?refcode=X_020722_Jan6thGOP&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZkZWNmNi00Mzg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npKQI63dpVx1VsgBTNYLwcBTVeURUYpiWCDvkDIiN8I=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41529270/329208806/416963966?refcode=X_020722_Jan6thGOP&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZkZWNmNi00Mzg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npKQI63dpVx1VsgBTNYLwcBTVeURUYpiWCDvkDIiN8I=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41529272/329208809/416963966?refcode=X_020722_Jan6thGOP=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZkZWNmNi00Mzg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npKQI63dpVx1VsgBTNYLwcBTVeURUYpiWCDvkDIiN8I=)
---
We will always stand up to protect our democratic institutions and the values we all hold dear. We hope you will join us.
Thank you,
Team Engel

Paid for by Engel for Arizona
---

Engel for Arizona
PO Box 40721
Tucson, AZ 85717
United States

"[Maggie Hassan]'s got a very tough reelection fight ahead of her in New Hampshire."
_– Rachel Maddow, MSNBC_
We're worried, friend. With just hours until tonight's midnight fundraising goal, we're still falling $8,178 short. Please let us explain why this is important:

Political experts — including Rachel Maddow — are calling Senator Hassan's seat in New Hampshire one of the most likely to flip in the country.

Senator Hassan's last race was decided by just 1,017 votes, and Mitch McConnell and the GOP know that this race could be close. It could even decide which party controls the Senate for the next two years. The GOP sees an opportunity and has already spent over $7 million to buy back this crucial seat.

**With Senate control on the line, we cannot afford to fall behind. But without a surge of grassroots support, we won't be able to win in New Hampshire and keep the Democratic Senate majority.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Abigail=20Ramirez?=
subject: Did you see my mom's email?
body:
Thank you Gov. Youngkin. | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=5d872c57f8&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

Did you see the message my mom sent you?

It’s a picture of me and Gov. Youngkin!

It was so EXCITING to see him and be able to hug him when he signed the bill to create more opportunities for children, like me, all across Virginia.

I know my mom will always stand by Gov. Youngkin as he continues to make education better for me and my friends.

Thank you,

Abigail Ramirez

**\---------- Forwarded message ---------**
**From** : Tina Ramirez
**Subject** : I want to share this post
**To** : [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=6155f1e485&e=ae0ea222da)

---
| [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=f484c74a84&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

I want to share this post with you. It’s my beautiful daughter, Abigail, and Gov. Youngkin after he signed an initiative to improve our children's education.
---
| [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=2a1300bea4&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| We are one step closer to stopping the Far-Left as they continue to try to indoctrinate our children through their _radical education agenda._
_**That is why through my campaign for State Senate, I am championing education.**_
As a single mother with a bi-racial daughter, I understand not only the importance of a quality education, but the importance of not treating kids differently based on their skin color.

[**Join me in standing with Gov. Youngkin, as we put parents first in our children's education. >>**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=331fd70317&e=ae0ea222da)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Peter, it was a brisk -15 degrees out when I left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
After an early 3:30 AM wake up, I headed out for the first event of the northern Michigan and upper peninsula campaign trip. | | | |
---
| | |
## How cold was it?
-15 degrees when I headed out.
---
|
---
|
### Hello Michigan!
It’s been another great week on the campaign trail. After an early 3:30 AM wake up, I headed out for the first event of the campaign swing to northern Michigan and the upper peninsula.

First stop was Traverse City where I had a great time addressing the Grand Traverse County Republicans. I really enjoy traveling to every corner of this state, and I understand the issues. Its great to hear the concerns of folks throughout our great state.
---
|
---
---
| In Escanaba, I stopped by 680 WDBC for an interview with Craig Woerpel. We talked about my background, important statewide issues, drugs in the UP and even wolf hunting!

On the drug issue, I can’t believe that no Governor in the last 30 years has fully funded drug enforcement. That is one of my priorities, and it will have a huge, positive impact on the Upper Peninsula.

Managed to catch dinner at Mo’s Pub - a local restaurant that is still in business after Whitmer’s draconian lack of common sense shutdowns. Mo’s Pub has an excellent vibe. Lots of home town sports fans here.
---
|
---
---
| |
---
It was my pleasure to have dinner with Richard P. Smith, noted author, and Dan Kirschner from Wild Spirit Guide Service.

We are at the THE STONEHOUSE in Escanaba, Michigan. The food and service was fantastic. We discussed upper peninsula wildlife management.
---
| Then I spent an epic day at the Pine Mountain Ski Jump. It’s great being the only candidate for governor that understands all of Michigan and especially the Upper Peninsula. It was only 3 degrees outside, and I’ll tell you what I’m hearing. Michiganders appreciate a candidate that will campaign everywhere and in every temperature to beat Whitmer! Thank you Iron Mountain for the great welcome.
---
|
---
---
| Peter, we can do this. Make sure you’ve volunteered to help us out. Lots of great stuff happening.

See you on the campaign trail! Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|
---
| [VOLUNTEER TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE!](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=cfbf61b98f&e=0636b97700 "VOLUNTEER TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE!")

subject: John Selker’s Policy Conversation is tomorrow at 7pm!
body:
Reminder: The Policy Conversation with candidate John Selker for Congress starts tomorrow!

Jason Dorsette begins the series on Tuesday February 8th at 7 pm on Zoom with the topic of Social Justice.

Jason Dorsette and John Selker will discuss social justice issues for our communities. Then the floor opens for you to share your thoughts with John for what is needed here and now.

To register for the Policy Series and receive a Zoom link and passcode, go to [https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJwvcuisrT4pE9H1neFvyYsnJ2r56laN9v0X](https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJwvcuisrT4pE9H1neFvyYsnJ2r56laN9v0X).

subject: the stakes are getting higher, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
You should see these reports.

| [ ](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9rDFIRCTiNIn7kFG5En6vZBg04MCJ3hgDIat8ZsIm0EpqZjJ2TqF5SH8-dbft3ASw496ATFc9FyGyEhVwR2-pFFagGGH-dfAoYFp-1T7nlm2okbKJtYlZAlnQj4y1v7G0WbqeXmbIFTyOPdLd0qyZe_KbhdkeyJE28HKZLmXQhezgNPA6IctVSnnTJM0OaxEGjKM9c9m7nuWw9wQEIDgKFvqfejkyE4r3WeZiAV4bpMRWoRd8ayeaJN2NdtvQeci7rwld1IG42cv29D1rQvhb3-O2ciwcLmGe9_of-sE9OdKj0VVjrnCoE7166aMVLUihKM5ipruFOYoooLlDdcaFYQ&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hd_20220202_jiolddf&n=1) Peter, We’re just two days past the first major **End-Of-Month Fundraising Deadline** of 2022, and we’re already learning a ton about the challenges ahead. Democrats have put up simply MASSIVE fundraising numbers in key Battleground Races, including in my home state of North Carolina. Cheri Beasley, the Democrat’s socialist candidate for Senate, raised a shocking $2.1 million in the past three months -- and she has fully $2.8 million sitting in the bank. _At any moment, she could unleash that war chest and flood the airwaves with vicious attack ads and Democrat propaganda.**[We have to be ready to fight back!](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9rDFIRCTiNIn7kFG5En6vZBg04MCJ3hgDIat8ZsIm0EpT0JJzWf0NMFFUvEPTd2Lfwm2PMPz7ntS_NKgFU2qXB8nk2HTLLqBdueAKnSn7J3APhUoi4d3j4f8s4NLeGodzTTmV7Vkx4a9rnbmpLGsKmidbALHjcJfJaUEVyC0Tz_uaHgrxQC6EREiR6zCo6GoFtL_li58c5JOXwFp8pbcFpE2h0k-POzxUblYMIR6fQeN34edU-VX1yCh5mFbX5HkDwmNJU_bc8FATtqtkFAt3y-SGxodfNE7dCD1Ex9vdbm7VKpJWKHE0Z8SYCNjZTga_g3zCjJULByUVJ6MZ13a7RegvsHCUqEoXw9Kr6I9t68g&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hd_20220202_jiolddf&n=2)**_ **[That’s why I’m pleading with you to today to donate $10, or whatever you can afford, to help me defend North Carolina’s Republican Senate seat and win back to Senate Majority in Washington, DC. Can I count on your support, Peter?](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9rDFIRCTiNIn7kFG5En6vZBg04MCJ3hgDIat8ZsIm0EpogKZYITdW7CDw0pI8cbgohgZ3b4sD3W1ihXOCXM4bBaorVLGalK4lN8Y3ozMS6mpfcHW9UsDn38DJaqdhw9DwBPGTOdvG-5XHDaxDJIrRwywV9OaWgvu5RD9PiR3r499aaAGXzDcdfGeSQkELMwSgsFTq3AngIRlVvEceXOzv1wNyXtsl5XzpigvYNWVpFS5OxfCCyB24i9UpKvY_kURfGztUeCVJR8flPD7XUmd6MlQ76CyQEbK8FCa-MWjzqB-SsK3tL_WffeOeTGqxXoJZW5DMoRMogEeYVoVHkUq8rzpqSIqlVxIcwrKW2Dld_5A&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hd_20220202_jiolddf&n=3)** | | [Contribute $10](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9rDFIRCTiNIn7kFG5En6vZO6iLiJYuiWADW_TgOgCoevcgx9-YiHspklCsTh864zrK5xxuefVOAewS1-6oK5CgJGyS5U_byGuWf64AuhX51Lce-s4aqQexNngKk3IL8jeWUWGPow9lMQa7OqMhWRy2cPas7GE0usYBW5zFRhlhKLpiKob2uxsF7AQHJ3-SIA_8fOIlG-mrDtcrDQLtd8wgooMz_t99lr9nWNFsZktiMeGxseoHPV2VIO0u-YEk35Kk9ydUwKBQepAi9xwrTJONIBkhDf4s2ARllViUG7SCVkpzfOivcXjraV05QfGUpDKQaKY1KptWE2bZYjhZmk_HvnjEhcds4DBYpZ6mbxwNwM&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hd_20220202_jiolddf&n=4)

clean_body: You should see these reports. | Peter, We’re just two days past the first major End-Of-Month Fundraising Deadline of 2022, and we’re already learning a ton about the challenges ahead. Democrats have put up simply MASSIVE fundraising numbers in key Battleground Races, including in my home state of North Carolina. Cheri Beasley, the Democrat’s socialist candidate for Senate, raised a shocking $2.1 million in the past three months -- and she has fully $2.8 million sitting in the bank. At any moment, she could unleash that war chest and flood the airwaves with vicious attack ads and Democrat propaganda. | | | | | | The Democrats have wanted to seize control of North Carolina’s Senate seat for a long time, Peter. And they’re willing to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to do it. The only way we’ll be able to defeat them is if every Republican Patriot (yes, including you!) steps up to help. I’m campaigning every single day to hold the line, but I can’t do it all myself. I need you by my side! | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Hi again,
I didn’t plan on following up again but I’m really hoping you’ll see this last email...
The _vast majority_ of folks who saw my previous email responded immediately that they stand proudly with President Donald J. Trump -- not with the Democrats. [**Now I was asked to email the last few people who never responded -- including you, Fellow Conservative.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g50j-1wzi8-4qqlpo7/)

Can you help me out with this? Please?

_He was banned from Twitter...
He was banned from Facebook...
He was banned from Youtube...
He was banned from Instagram..._

body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41531413/329218469/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc0MzI3MS00ZTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW_lfhYHfocCsmDW2ETPPFodL7P9TuDZBo-kDrIWMAY=)

Hi friend,

You probably saw that on Friday my team sent out an email with the truth about New Jersey Republican Dr. Oz.

While Dr. Oz has been hosting TV programs that peddle dangerous medical advice, I've been working in the House to deliver real, tangible progress for our children, families, and workers.

But despite his obvious lies, Dr. Oz's substantial name recognition, huge war chest, and the support of the Trump machine makes him a _formidable_ opponent in this race **– and he's pouring millions into TV ads to trick Pennsylvanians.**

**[We need your help to take a stand against Dr. Oz, friend. Unlike him, I can't loan my campaign $5 million, so I depend on supporters like you. Will you chip in to help fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41531414/329218470/1085202693?refcode=em22_220207_ozkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc0MzI3MS00ZTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW_lfhYHfocCsmDW2ETPPFodL7P9TuDZBo-kDrIWMAY=)**

Thank you so much,

Conor [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41531415/329218471/1085202693?refcode=em22_220207_ozkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc0MzI3MS00ZTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW_lfhYHfocCsmDW2ETPPFodL7P9TuDZBo-kDrIWMAY=) \----------Forwarded message----------
From: **Team Lamb**
Date: February 04, 2022 at 1:05 p.m. ET
Subject: Who photoshopped this mess?

Team,

**Conor Lamb is a Pennsylvanian through and through.**

He grew up in Pittsburgh and went to college and law school in Philadelphia. He served in the Marines, then came back to Pennsylvania to serve as a federal prosecutor, and now as our Representative in Congress. He knows us, and he knows the issues that matter most to working families in Pennsylvania.

**On the other hand,** Dr. Oz grew up in Ohio, lives in New Jersey, and only became a registered voter in Pennsylvania in 2020 – **using his in-laws’ address.** To make himself seem like he cares about our local economy, Dr. Oz even photoshopped himself in front of the Bethlehem SteelStacks – **a steel plant that closed in 1995** – to try and suggest it was _President Biden’s_ fault. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41531416/329218472/1085202693?refcode=em22_220207_ozkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc0MzI3MS00ZTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW_lfhYHfocCsmDW2ETPPFodL7P9TuDZBo-kDrIWMAY=)
---
_Talk about phony._
**[Friend we can't let our Senate seat go to a Trump-backed corporate phony with a penchant for spreading lies. Will you chip in $5 or more to help Conor Lamb win this race and be the ally Pennsylvania families deserve in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41531417/329218473/1085202693?refcode=em22_220207_ozkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc0MzI3MS00ZTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW_lfhYHfocCsmDW2ETPPFodL7P9TuDZBo-kDrIWMAY=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41531418/329218474/1085202693?refcode=em22_220207_ozkicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTc0MzI3MS00ZTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW_lfhYHfocCsmDW2ETPPFodL7P9TuDZBo-kDrIWMAY=)
This is a serious moment for our country, and we need a serious leader who will put in the work to actually get things done for working families in Pennsylvania. Dr. Oz and several other candidates in this race are not serious leaders – Conor Lamb is.

clean_body: | = Hi friend, You probably saw that on Friday my team sent out an email with the truth about New Jersey Republican Dr. Oz. While Dr. Oz has been hosting TV programs that peddle dangerous medical advice, I've been working in the House to deliver real, tangible progress for our children, families, and workers. But despite his obvious lies, Dr. Oz's substantial name recognition, huge war chest, and the support of the Trump machine makes him a formidable opponent in this race – and he's pouring millions into TV ads to trick Pennsylvanians. = Thank you so much, Conor = \----------Forwarded message---------- From: Team Lamb Date: February 04, 2022 at 1:05 p.m. ET Subject: Who photoshopped this mess? Team, Conor Lamb is a Pennsylvanian through and through. He grew up in Pittsburgh and went to college and law school in Philadelphia. He served in the Marines, then came back to Pennsylvania to serve as a federal prosecutor, and now as our Representative in Congress. He knows us, and he knows the issues that matter most to working families in Pennsylvania. On the other hand, Dr. Oz grew up in Ohio, lives in New Jersey, and only became a registered voter in Pennsylvania in 2020 – using his in-laws’ address. To make himself seem like he cares about our local economy, Dr. Oz even photoshopped himself in front of the Bethlehem SteelStacks – a steel plant that closed in 1995 – to try and suggest it was President Biden’s fault. | = Talk about phony. = = This is a serious moment for our country, and we need a serious leader who will put in the work to actually get things done for working families in Pennsylvania. Dr. Oz and several other candidates in this race are not serious leaders – Conor Lamb is. Conor Lamb is ready to put in the work for us and for all working families around the country who want affordable health care, safe infrastructure, fair wages, and voting rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up, Team Lamb *

| Hi Friend,

Please join me for our Congressional Kickoff event at Burrito Social in North Redington Beach on Wednesday, February 9th from 5:00-6:30p.m.

Join Pinellas County Mayors as we talk politics and enjoy delicious Mexican food! The Mayors and I will be discussing the upcoming mid-term elections and how we win this seat back for the GOP and flip back Congress!

We will be raffling off lunch with me and three Pinellas County Mayors at the event! You’ll need to be there to win!

I hope to see you on Wednesday!

Amanda Makki

subject: Mitch McConnell’s man
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
Every day, Mitch McConnell wakes up and prays Larry Hogan will run against Chris Van Hollen.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41518158/329157244/396464211?refcode=em-logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODJjMWY2ZS0yNjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LOhphu9NMMVqTp9TJru7N8lgWEGTopFdd6uByOR-Io=)
Friends -
Every day, Mitch McConnell wakes up and reviews his plans to become Senate Majority Leader again. At the top of his list is getting GOP Gov. Larry Hogan to run against Chris Van Hollen.
McConnell wants control of the Senate badly. He wants to stop any possibility of progress during the next two years of the Biden administration.
Think about the issues you care about:
Do we need to continue the fight to lower prescription drug costs? Yes, we do.
Do we need to protect our democracy and ensure every eligible American can vote and have their vote counted? Yes, we do.
Do we need to pass common sense legislation that will make our communities safer from gun violence? Yes, we do.
Do we need to treat climate change like the existential threat to our livable planet that it is? Yes, we do.
Will ANY of that happen if Chris Van Hollen loses this seat and Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader again?
No, not a chance.
So we need to be ready. Because if Mitch McConnell gets his way, far-right billionaires will be falling over themselves to write huge checks to Mitch’s handpicked candidate’s campaign. So we’re asking:
**[Help Chris Van Hollen get ready for a Mitch McConnell-Larry Hogan challenge with a $3 contribution to his re-election campaign. We cannot afford to get caught flat-footed if the entire Republican machine targets this Maryland seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41518169/329157262/396464211?refcode=em220207-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODJjMWY2ZS0yNjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LOhphu9NMMVqTp9TJru7N8lgWEGTopFdd6uByOR-Io=)**
Nothing less than control of the Senate, and any chance at progress is at stake in this race.
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41518172/329157270/396464211?refcode=em220207-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODJjMWY2ZS0yNjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LOhphu9NMMVqTp9TJru7N8lgWEGTopFdd6uByOR-Io=)**
Team Van Hollen

Sign our card to congratulate the newlyweds, Malcolm and Dr. Matt
#

Friend, we’ve got BIG news...
Malcolm and Dr. Matt officially tied the knot on Saturday! Will you sign our card to congratulate the newlyweds?

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: I’m running for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
I wanted you to be the first to know that I am officially launching my campaign.
#
Friend, I wanted you to be one of the first to know:
**I am running to be the next member of Congress from New York’s 3rd district. I’ll explain the stakes of this race, and why I’m running, in just a second — but first, I’d like to ask:**
[**Please, if you are able, make a contribution of $3 to become a Founding Donor to my campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-launch-feb/?refcode=em220207-1-15&refcode2=435_59515_1x5qOO&akid=435%2E59515%2E1x5qOO)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-launch-feb/?refcode=em220207-1-15&refcode2=435_59515_1x5qOO&akid=435%2E59515%2E1x5qOO)**
Now, I won’t lie to you — this will be a difficult race. When you prioritize your constituents and your values ahead of the political and corporate establishment in New York, you make a few enemies along the way.
This will also be a crowded primary, with a number of our opponents raising significant sums of money to win.
**But I’ve gone up against the establishment and won tough races before.** When I primaried a conservative Democrat for State Senate in 2018, special interest groups threw millions of dollars into his campaign to defeat us.
That is why we’re going to run a grassroots campaign that relies on lots of lots of people chipping in $5 or $10 at a time to help us build a grassroots campaign, organize, and win.
So please, if you are able:
[**Make a contribution of $3 to become a Founding Donor to my campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-launch-feb/?refcode=em220207-1-15&refcode2=435_59515_1x5qOO&akid=435%2E59515%2E1x5qOO)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-launch-feb/?refcode=em220207-1-15&refcode2=435_59515_1x5qOO&akid=435%2E59515%2E1x5qOO)**
Early contributions to our campaign will start us off on the right foot and allow us to get the word out about this movement.
And, of course, our campaign is people powered, meaning that much of our funding will come from emails just like this one. That’s how we’re able to ensure that we’re accountable to you, not billionaires and special interests.
Thank you for reading. In the coming days, we’ll be reaching out with more information about our vision for NY-03, and how you can get involved with the campaign.
All my best,
Alessandra
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-launch-feb/?refcode=em220207-1-15&refcode2=435_59515_1x5qOO&akid=435%2E59515%2E1x5qOO)**

clean_body: I wanted you to be the first to know that I am officially launching my campaign. Friend, I wanted you to be one of the first to know: I am running to be the next member of Congress from New York’s 3rd district. I’ll explain the stakes of this race, and why I’m running, in just a second — but first, I’d like to ask: Now, I won’t lie to you — this will be a difficult race. When you prioritize your constituents and your values ahead of the political and corporate establishment in New York, you make a few enemies along the way. This will also be a crowded primary, with a number of our opponents raising significant sums of money to win. But I’ve gone up against the establishment and won tough races before. When I primaried a conservative Democrat for State Senate in 2018, special interest groups threw millions of dollars into his campaign to defeat us. That is why we’re going to run a grassroots campaign that relies on lots of lots of people chipping in $5 or $10 at a time to help us build a grassroots campaign, organize, and win. So please, if you are able: Early contributions to our campaign will start us off on the right foot and allow us to get the word out about this movement. And, of course, our campaign is people powered, meaning that much of our funding will come from emails just like this one. That’s how we’re able to ensure that we’re accountable to you, not billionaires and special interests. Thank you for reading. In the coming days, we’ll be reaching out with more information about our vision for NY-03, and how you can get involved with the campaign. All my best, Alessandra Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Know a Patriot by his enemies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
The ADL called me a "White Supremacist" | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066149?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=0c4232be21&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

They say you can know a man best by his enemies.

And boy, do we have enemies.

Just like President Trump, all of the right ghouls are trying to silence me, from Big Tech to the totally corrupt Republican Establishment.

I've been thrown offstage at GOP events, banned from social media, and banned from 2 payment processors--I was even banned by my old barbershop.

Last fall, the Republican Party of Arkansas called me a "racist, sexist, bigot," and disavowed my campaign. What was my crime?

I want to end the Invasion on our Southern Border by building the Wall and imposing a Total Immigration Moratorium. America is full.

I'm also a proud Southerner.

Now, the evil ADL, along with the Guardian---Communist smear operations---put me at the very top of their list of the most "extreme" candidates in America.

According to these cretins, I'm a "racist White Supremacist." Of course, the absurdity of calling a mixed-race, Indian-American individual like myself a "White Supremacist" is totally lost on them.

What these Communists don't understand is that their slanders and smears don't work on us anymore.

We know their games, and we're not playing along anymore.

All of these attacks are great badges of honor, proof positive that I'm a threat, that I can't be controlled, that I'm not a part of their club.

It's no coincidence that this latest ADL and Guardian attack came just after my campaign posted our strongest fundraising numbers yet.

They know that we're coming for them. They know that their days are numbered.

**[_Show them that their attacks are __toothless. Show them what we think about their lies and slanders of Patriots_ _._

_Do you know why my Deep State RINO opponent doesn't face these attacks? Because he's only a threat to one thing: the people of Arkansas_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=51dc6b2ee5&e=eda539b26b). **

[**_Help me tell the Establishment that the people are DONE with their games_ _ \-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=67efcd42d2&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, who aren't going to tuck tail and run when they get called mean names._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=f3744e5755&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=0e39c7960f&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 NeilforArkansas.com, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
NeilforArkansas.comPO Box 652Bentonville, AR 72712-0652
[Add us to your address book](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=e01e62da41) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=e01e62da41).

name: Sean Themea
subject: Truth about politics on college campuses
body:
Common wisdom today says college students are a bunch of woke communists.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlejgqrlood2gq5m42ck7d7mi7hv81c0jljr3duo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfedthmurb9cr66hh64sjic3hn9dplcdjj8cllmjir5crgm1q3cpr3ehpn2dj561jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddhcup76phgmiqr8ptgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zno7tkd1r6l9geplj9sa0gh9mdavhdgpfggpfojg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)
Friend,

Common wisdom today says college students are a bunch of woke communists.

While I don't dispute there ARE college students like that... you'd be surprised how many students are fed up with the socialist control of college.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4mtf6hh6htgkqltec266rfmls2fkumkk7in26d8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)
**Here 's the truth:**

Like with national politics, most students are apathetic. **Politics is a game that is decided by whatever group can be the most organized.**_And I want to share with you Young Americans for Liberty 's plans to defeat the radicals on campus._

Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is hosting Grassroots Activism Trainings in 2022.

Our plans are to train over 600 students in 22 locations to be political campus leaders and defeat the radicals on their campus.

To accomplish this goal, I am looking to raise $150,000 online from conservatives, libertarians, and pro-liberty patriots.

[_**I am humbly asking you to join me in sending your urgent support to YAL. Can you donate $20.22, $50, $100, or more today to support our Grassroots Activism Trainings? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za6fs8duf24lknkg5pvamgns3oih2fjjlort57pg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)

Here's the plan.
1. YAL has a network of over 100,000 students across universities in the United States. We will recruit the top 600 students to attend these trainings.
2. The students will be trained in the top political and grassroots strategies for both affecting change on campus and in their states.
3. The 600 students return to their campus to fight for free speech, against COVID mandates, and against the woke radicals.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zucq6m06frakhukc6s5bi7j7qkg8tah42ffivfpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)

I have attached a full schedule of our Grassroots Activism Trainings for your review:

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z60o8ajrb0hggb0e41r0pd409okgqe6tr19fv2gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)

This isn't our first time training students. Here are some of our recent successes of YAL student leaders bringing freedom to their campus.
1. The **Montclair State University** YAL Chapter challenged campus administrators after the admin silenced a "Criminals for Gun-Free Zones" 2nd Amendment event. After 2 years of litigation, the state forced the school to change its unconstitutional "Free Speech Zones" and "Prior Permission Needed to Organize" policies.
2. The **University of Nebraska** pulled back on their decision to force all of their students to download a phone app tracking their Covid vaccination and weekly testing results after YAL students rose up and organized events across campus in defiance of the order.
3. After passage of new legislation in Ohio to protect free speech on campuses, YAL members at **Youngstown State** contacted the school regarding their policy that still required prior permission to speak and assemble. By putting pressure on the administration to be compliant with the new law, they were able to get the policy eliminated.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze6jtd0jknubs7b5vng8apbgsv7l1c5b4ji8gl1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)

Friend, YAL is leading the fight on campus. But we are not supported by government tax-dollars. We don't have woke billionaires on our side.

My team relies 100% on freedom-loving Americans who are fed up with the woke and corrupt nonsense.

**I am asking you to contribute any amount you can towards our $150,000 goal.**

This isn't money going to line politicians' campaigns. Your support goes directly to getting students recruited, trained, and protesting on their campus.

**Please rush your support today by clicking below and help us save our country.**

[_**Donate $20.22 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3igc6bkoicur2ei08af0rou7vd39opkqmmgqfu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoputdh1l9dbeva2418qubornd3c28hggs896fmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqjpotcrie901kvqoudir90o52r1ajo52brhfrvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqk8jchp2fbbj09rfg8ctprau7t037fqmt3a4od0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0939ri87d15m2n7b650fqf7mjvb0v3t9a5354og_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbsn11jhu66e8vdr5la7u789prn9oidf30ofpfu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrnucaio5bsqscnm9c1p8bcek63qshou5ecdlsj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlcotvc8fu3j33u39ag46hhvo8ed1f9vg5g99kt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Sean Themea
Chief of Staff
Young Americans for Liberty

_Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Young Americans for Liberty Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions to the extent permitted by law. No goods or services were given in exchange for this contribution._
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zvedj5e4o7fa5rjo1tiougp93ho92blivkps53eo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmbk34h7fpdgavs1ia29q2c5i4plk7kp789gcafg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hmcp35c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Nina Turner
subject: asking for your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to personally endorse my campaign for Congress, but first I want to tell you a little bit about why I’m running and what this race is about.
#

Hello Somebody!
In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to personally endorse my campaign for Congress, but first I want to tell you a little bit about why I’m running and what this race is about.
Working people need a hell raising humanitarian and change maker in Washington. A leader who knows poverty is a policy choice. Someone who is on the side of the people — not out for the powerful or out for themselves.
That means fighting for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, medical and student loan debt forgiveness, a living wage of at least $15 an hour, and so, so much more. These are not radical ideas. This is a rational and long overdue agenda for working people.
Getting there won’t be easy. We’re going to need that backbone to stand up to those who will do and say anything to stop us. But if we’re in this together, they won’t have a chance. So I am asking:
**[Can you add your name to say you personally endorse our campaign? You deserve a Congresswoman who will always fight for the PEOPLE, not the status quo.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532256/329225043/-758536046?refcode2=e23e4d98-5188-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&refcode=em220207-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjNlNGQ5OC01MTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wb8zy69zBlasIPYouEtze5F_vLALusYZpthziQcBpIU=&emci=d73e4d98-5188-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=e23e4d98-5188-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=12102799)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532257/329225044/-758536046?refcode2=e23e4d98-5188-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&refcode=em220207-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjNlNGQ5OC01MTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wb8zy69zBlasIPYouEtze5F_vLALusYZpthziQcBpIU=&emci=d73e4d98-5188-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=e23e4d98-5188-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=12102799)**
I am asking you to join us today as part of a historic grassroots campaign — one that centers the voices of everyday working people.
It might seem like a small action, but your endorsement today sends a powerful message that our ideas are not radical, but exactly what working people need in this moment of crisis. They are right on time.
With these hands,
Nina Turner

name: Charlie Crist HQ
subject: NEW: DeSantis “does not crack 50% against Crist”
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
It’s a “red flag” – and great news for us |
