name: Elect Educators
subject: Good news about our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC
body:
Good news about Katie Porter, Jahana Hayes, school board candidates in Wisconsin, that one seat that got away in 2020 and a trailblazing Ohioan. | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41532351/329225824/-1122467785?refcode=em_20220207digest_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDVmYTBmLTUyODgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZkGSAwrIdoFhXnKnuJ_QcFLT7bYoPOHZSzxBpjp7ok=)
---
Educators and Allies Educators and Allies, There's a ton of challenging, dispiriting, and all around tough news about our schools, educators, and democracy these days. But there's also great news out there, and we've heard you could use a little bit of good news. Welcome to our first installment of Good News About Our Schools, an occasional update full of good news about our schools and the educators running for office to protect them. **Congress** **California CD47: Congresswoman Katie Porter,** running in a competitive seat that only leans Democratic by 1%, [will not be challenged by former Democratic Congressman Harley Rouda. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41532352/329225825/1567449212?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDVmYTBmLTUyODgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZkGSAwrIdoFhXnKnuJ_QcFLT7bYoPOHZSzxBpjp7ok=&emci=b478797e-4288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=9745fa0f-5288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=10310093) Porter’s most likely Republican challenger is former State Assemblyman, Republican Caucus Leader and Orange County GOP Chairman Scott Baugh, who raised over $500,000 in just nine days at the end of December. About two-thirds of this seat is new to Cong. Porter, and the Los Angeles media market is one of the most costly in the country. This could easily be one of the most expensive races this year, and Congresswoman Porter is going to need all the help she can get. **The good news:** Congresswoman Porter can focus all of her campaign energy on turning out Democrats, winning over swing voters, and earning another term. Get those whiteboards ready! **Connecticut CD05: Congresswoman Jahana Hayes** has [introduced a bill to expand federal support to combat hunger among students](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41532353/329225826/346017166?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDVmYTBmLTUyODgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZkGSAwrIdoFhXnKnuJ_QcFLT7bYoPOHZSzxBpjp7ok=&emci=b478797e-4288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=9745fa0f-5288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=10310093) by expanding the student lunch program to include nutritious meals as part of afterschool care. Republicans are targeting Cong. Hayes this election cycle, and redistricting did not make her seat any safer. She’s facing the best funded GOP candidate in the state, and can't take anything for granted. **The good news:** Congresswoman Hayes is putting her personal experience to work, helping students in specific ways that meet their needs. What else would you expect from the 2016 National Teacher of the Year? **Arizona CD06: Kirsten Engel** has [a new GOP challenger who equates vaccinations with communism. Of course, this same challenger is an election results denier and supporter of the Arizona GOP’s sham “audit.”](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41532354/329225827/-2021587432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDVmYTBmLTUyODgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZkGSAwrIdoFhXnKnuJ_QcFLT7bYoPOHZSzxBpjp7ok=&emci=b478797e-4288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=9745fa0f-5288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=10310093) State Senator Engel is running in an open, swing district currently represented by Democrat Anne Kirkpatrick, who's retiring. This is a must-hold seat to preserve Democratic control of the U.S. House, and Roll Call and Inside Elections both have this seat rated as Toss Up - Tilt Republican, making it one of the 5 most endangered Democratic seats in the country. **The good news:** Kirsten Engel is exactly the sort of candidate who can bring people together to hold this seat and then go to work for students, educators, and parents alike in Congress. **Iowa CD01: Christina Bohannan,** professor at the University of Iowa College of Law, nearly kept pace with first-term Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks, raising $347,000 to Miller-Meeks’ $395,000 in the last quarter of 2021. This is much the same district that hosted the very closest race in 2020, when Miller-Meeks defeated educator Rita Hart by just 6 votes. [Miller-Meeks went full conspiracy theorist on COVID19, and then played Fox News disinformation bingo ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41532355/329225828/-766600297?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDVmYTBmLTUyODgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZkGSAwrIdoFhXnKnuJ_QcFLT7bYoPOHZSzxBpjp7ok=&emci=b478797e-4288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=9745fa0f-5288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=10310093)on the one year anniversary of the Biden administration. **The good news:** Miller-Meeks isn’t even trying to represent a moderate, swing district, and we’d all be much better off with a committed and practical educator like Christina Bohannan in Congress. ****
####
**In The States**
**School Boards: Candidate filing in Wisconsin** has closed, and we’re evaluating candidates across over 400 local school boards and thousands of seats in the April 5, 2022 elections. If you are or know of an educator running for School Board in Wisconsin or running for public office in another state, [nominate them here ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41532356/329225829/1097306899?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDVmYTBmLTUyODgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZkGSAwrIdoFhXnKnuJ_QcFLT7bYoPOHZSzxBpjp7ok=&emci=b478797e-4288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=9745fa0f-5288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=10310093)and they may become a featured candidate in the future. **The good news:** We can't wait to introduce you some incredible educators who are stepping up to run for local school boards, even in the face absurd attacks on complete and accurate history, science and student safety, and some of our most vulnerable students. **Massachusetts Governor: Two educators, State Senator Sonia Chang Diaz and Harvard Professor Danielle Allen,** are running to replace Republican Governor Charlie Baker, whose [administration distributed low-quality masks (less than 50% effective and removed from FDA authorization 18 months ago!) and expired COVID-19 tests.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41532357/329225830/-1421942008?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDVmYTBmLTUyODgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZkGSAwrIdoFhXnKnuJ_QcFLT7bYoPOHZSzxBpjp7ok=&emci=b478797e-4288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=9745fa0f-5288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=10310093) Massachusetts is in desperate need of the sort of principled and detail-oriented leadership that an educator can provide.**** **The good news:** After eight years of Republican control of the Governor's office, Massachusetts is poised to elect a Democrat and we've got two impressive educators running in the Democratic primary. [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41532359/329225831/450095318?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210908ericgash_eee_180DO_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDVmYTBmLTUyODgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZkGSAwrIdoFhXnKnuJ_QcFLT7bYoPOHZSzxBpjp7ok=)_****_**Ohio State House: Educator and gay rights icon Jim Obergefell **[has announced that he will run for the Ohio State House in his Sandusky-based district](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41532366/329225836/1297162371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDVmYTBmLTUyODgtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZkGSAwrIdoFhXnKnuJ_QcFLT7bYoPOHZSzxBpjp7ok=&emci=b478797e-4288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=9745fa0f-5288-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=10310093). Defeating a Republican incumbent is no small feat, but Jim's already proven that he can take on tough challenges and deliver big wins. **The good news:** Imagine having been a student in Obergefell's 8th grade German class, and now getting the chance to not only see him make history at the U.S. Supreme Court, but also getting the chance to vote for him to represent you in the Legislature! We hope this brought you a little bit of joy and has fuelled some optimism about our share future. Thanks for reading and being part of the Elect Educators Everywhere community, Pete P.S. If you can think of someone who'd benefit from this good news, please forward this email to them and bring a little bit of joy to their life.
---
| Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.

clean_body: Good news about Katie Porter, Jahana Hayes, school board candidates in Wisconsin, that one seat that got away in 2020 and a trailblazing Ohioan. | = Educators and Allies Educators and Allies, There's a ton of challenging, dispiriting, and all around tough news about our schools, educators, and democracy these days. But there's also great news out there, and we've heard you could use a little bit of good news. Welcome to our first installment of Good News About Our Schools, an occasional update full of good news about our schools and the educators running for office to protect them. Congress California CD47: Congresswoman Katie Porter, running in a competitive seat that only leans Democratic by 1%, Porter’s most likely Republican challenger is former State Assemblyman, Republican Caucus Leader and Orange County GOP Chairman Scott Baugh, who raised over $500,000 in just nine days at the end of December. About two-thirds of this seat is new to Cong. Porter, and the Los Angeles media market is one of the most costly in the country. This could easily be one of the most expensive races this year, and Congresswoman Porter is going to need all the help she can get. The good news: Congresswoman Porter can focus all of her campaign energy on turning out Democrats, winning over swing voters, and earning another term. Get those whiteboards ready! Connecticut CD05: Congresswoman Jahana Hayes has by expanding the student lunch program to include nutritious meals as part of afterschool care. Republicans are targeting Cong. Hayes this election cycle, and redistricting did not make her seat any safer. She’s facing the best funded GOP candidate in the state, and can't take anything for granted. The good news: Congresswoman Hayes is putting her personal experience to work, helping students in specific ways that meet their needs. What else would you expect from the 2016 National Teacher of the Year? Arizona CD06: Kirsten Engel has State Senator Engel is running in an open, swing district currently represented by Democrat Anne Kirkpatrick, who's retiring. This is a must-hold seat to preserve Democratic control of the U.S. House, and Roll Call and Inside Elections both have this seat rated as Toss Up - Tilt Republican, making it one of the 5 most endangered Democratic seats in the country. The good news: Kirsten Engel is exactly the sort of candidate who can bring people together to hold this seat and then go to work for students, educators, and parents alike in Congress. Iowa CD01: Christina Bohannan, professor at the University of Iowa College of Law, nearly kept pace with first-term Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks, raising $347,000 to Miller-Meeks’ $395,000 in the last quarter of 2021. This is much the same district that hosted the very closest race in 2020, when Miller-Meeks defeated educator Rita Hart by just 6 votes. the one year anniversary of the Biden administration. The good news: Miller-Meeks isn’t even trying to represent a moderate, swing district, and we’d all be much better off with a committed and practical educator like Christina Bohannan in Congress. ** In The States School Boards: Candidate filing in Wisconsin has closed, and we’re evaluating candidates across over 400 local school boards and thousands of seats in the April 5, 2022 elections. If you are or know of an educator running for School Board in Wisconsin or running for public office in another state, they may become a featured candidate in the future. The good news: We can't wait to introduce you some incredible educators who are stepping up to run for local school boards, even in the face absurd attacks on complete and accurate history, science and student safety, and some of our most vulnerable students. Massachusetts Governor: Two educators, State Senator Sonia Chang Diaz and Harvard Professor Danielle Allen, are running to replace Republican Governor Charlie Baker, whose Massachusetts is in desperate need of the sort of principled and detail-oriented leadership that an educator can provide. The good news: After eight years of Republican control of the Governor's office, Massachusetts is poised to elect a Democrat and we've got two impressive educators running in the Democratic primary. State House: Educator and gay rights icon Jim Obergefell . Defeating a Republican incumbent is no small feat, but Jim's already proven that he can take on tough challenges and deliver big wins. The good news: Imagine having been a student in Obergefell's 8th grade German class, and now getting the chance to not only see him make history at the U.S. Supreme Court, but also getting the chance to vote for him to represent you in the Legislature! We hope this brought you a little bit of joy and has fuelled some optimism about our share future. Thanks for reading and being part of the Elect Educators Everywhere community, Pete P.S. If you can think of someone who'd benefit from this good news, please forward this email to them and bring a little bit of joy to their life. | Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. He’s out of touch with the needs of Wisconsinites, and he has to go in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Alex Lasry has a record of creating jobs, and his time in the Senate would be no different. Fighting for everyday Wisconsinites is why Alex Lasry is running against Ron Johnson. It’s a no-brainer that our Senator should be fighting for every new job to help grow our economy. = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. Box 511549 Milwaukee, WI 53203 United States It's going to take everyone on this team to win this election, but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018wrdkKfy25Hfa_BBeKc8RXXnw5c7gaGzApbe8sZBcr6-l97Lf5e_rEUpVKh6X70GrwfR29Az3hvh3qYVVpf7wh0-jYaPG53WAE5Vy16GJXYvgZ59WCEmA9bhEtK6PmXEIoFkW4feJ4v2lKjUw9kFfQ==&c=U8Vs-r-aO6IuMKeqIPq_U7kd-JhH1vznu0cNuoebv0R53ZY8mji36w==&ch=jdorwQ73g292HlUy5cH88Y9Sk6wBsDCbf1z1HS_oVgXC6l2CiRi1zA==)

## If you want something different, you have to do something different.
##

Raising your family and working hard are integral to realize the promises of this land. Sadly, there are hordes of political operatives who have craftily hijacked the system to ensure their personal political agenda is implemented while you are occupied living your best life. Now, every time you pay your taxes you are footing the bill to ruin Idaho and destroy the American Dream.
It is no londer acceptable to funner our hard-earned money into the coffers of political operatives and activists. It's time for change! We need a free exchange of ideas instead of a subsidized exchange of pre-approved ideas. Idaho needs school choice.
On day one as Governor, I will ban all state agencies from hiring lobbyists. Also, I will wield the line-item veto to cut the special interest pork out of the budget.
---

# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: Mike DeWine is hiding something -- and we're going to get to the bottom of it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Ohio Democrats,

Our requests for answers on the HB 6 bribery scandal are still being met with crickets from Mike DeWine's administration.

I'm not going to beat around the bush -- this is bullshit.

Ohioans deserve to know the facts about the largest bribery scandal in Ohio's history. It's clear the DeWine administration is trying to hide something while they continue to ignore our public information requests. And if we continue to be stonewalled by DeWine and his administration, **we’re prepared to take legal action to get the answer the people of Ohio deserve.**

But here's the thing, if we end up taking legal action against the governor, it won't be cheap.

He'll do whatever it takes to keep information from Ohioans about the largest public corruption scandal in our state's history. That's why we need your help to help offset any future legal costs. Can we count on your support today?

[**If you're ready to bring accountability and transparency back to our state, make a donation of $5 or more today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532477/329226259/1175522780?refcode=em22_220207_dewine_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220207_dewine_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODAxZmJjYy01Mjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHFZos1tTiMoJaFYg-qyGLEuMbhG-OzQO76tyO8TR8Y=)

Thanks,

Liz

Liz Walters
Team ODP

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532478/329226260/1175522780?refcode=em22_220207_dewine_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220207_dewine_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODAxZmJjYy01Mjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHFZos1tTiMoJaFYg-qyGLEuMbhG-OzQO76tyO8TR8Y=)

name: John King
subject: Together, we can unlock the golden door of freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
As we celebrate Black History Month, I reflect on the great strides our country has made in unlocking that golden door of freedom by expanding opportunity in education for Black students and recognize the long way still to go in closing the racial gaps that persist today.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532508/329226483/1974367824?source=email-ngp-20220207-b1_re_nd-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220207-b1_re_nd-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220207&&&&utm_content=b1_re_nd&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=cb4fea4f-5388-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjRmZWE0Zi01Mzg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flvVFmjZ-sBF4toxb_5LQdkBk7J4EL7Dr9U9viLVT6M=)

Peter, George Washington Carver once wrote, “Education is the key to unlock the golden door of freedom.” As we celebrate Black History Month, I reflect on the great strides our country has made in unlocking that golden door of freedom by expanding opportunity in education for Black students and recognize the long way still to go in closing the racial gaps that persist today. I have dedicated my life to lifting up our youth, especially those who are being left behind – whether as a teacher, as a principal, or as the U.S. Secretary of Education – because my public school teachers did so much for me when I was young. I am profoundly grateful to the educators working each day to ensure an excellent education for every child in Maryland and to close gaps in opportunity. However, there are still racial gaps in the education system today. Black History Month is an opportunity to not only reflect on the leaders and policies who have made such a difference in the lives of Black students, but also to think about how we can do even more to deliver educational equity. The majority of students in our public schools today are students of color. Our state's future depends on ensuring educational opportunity for all students regardless of race and regardless of zip code. I am prepared to create a more equitable Maryland for us all, but I need your help to do it. _**[If you have a moment, could you pitch in $50, $25, or even $10 to support our campaign for governor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532509/329226484/1974367824?source=email-ngp-20220207-b1_re_nd-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220207-b1_re_nd-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220207&&&&utm_content=b1_re_nd&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=cb4fea4f-5388-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjRmZWE0Zi01Mzg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flvVFmjZ-sBF4toxb_5LQdkBk7J4EL7Dr9U9viLVT6M=)**_ We cannot leave anyone behind, Peter. I was lucky to have public school teachers who believed in me and gave me the opportunity to get where I am today. The care, faith, and love of public school educators helped me to survive the trauma of losing both of my parents by the time I was twelve and to recover from getting kicked out of high school as a teenager when I had lost my way. School literally saved my life. However, most students don’t get the same second chance I did. That’s why I believe it’s time to put a teacher in the governor’s seat. _**[If you agree, will you give today to help me make a difference in our state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532510/329226485/1974367824?source=email-ngp-20220207-b1_re_nd-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220207-b1_re_nd-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220207&&&&utm_content=b1_re_nd&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=cb4fea4f-5388-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjRmZWE0Zi01Mzg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flvVFmjZ-sBF4toxb_5LQdkBk7J4EL7Dr9U9viLVT6M=)**_ Thank you, John King

clean_body: As we celebrate Black History Month, I reflect on the great strides our country has made in unlocking that golden door of freedom by expanding opportunity in education for Black students and recognize the long way still to go in closing the racial gaps that persist today. | = Peter, George Washington Carver once wrote, “Education is the key to unlock the golden door of freedom.” As we celebrate Black History Month, I reflect on the great strides our country has made in unlocking that golden door of freedom by expanding opportunity in education for Black students and recognize the long way still to go in closing the racial gaps that persist today. I have dedicated my life to lifting up our youth, especially those who are being left behind – whether as a teacher, as a principal, or as the U.S. Secretary of Education – because my public school teachers did so much for me when I was young. I am profoundly grateful to the educators working each day to ensure an excellent education for every child in Maryland and to close gaps in opportunity. However, there are still racial gaps in the education system today. Black History Month is an opportunity to not only reflect on the leaders and policies who have made such a difference in the lives of Black students, but also to think about how we can do even more to deliver educational equity. The majority of students in our public schools today are students of color. Our state's future depends on ensuring educational opportunity for all students regardless of race and regardless of zip code. I am prepared to create a more equitable Maryland for us all, but I need your help to do it. = We cannot leave anyone behind, Peter. I was lucky to have public school teachers who believed in me and gave me the opportunity to get where I am today. The care, faith, and love of public school educators helped me to survive the trauma of losing both of my parents by the time I was twelve and to recover from getting kicked out of high school as a teenager when I had lost my way. School literally saved my life. However, most students don’t get the same second chance I did. That’s why I believe it’s time to put a teacher in the governor’s seat. = Thank you, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . There was a shooting in one of DC’s ritziest neighborhoods. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9657d54c16a04b39b7616b55a8c58d01&_e=kpvVC-7s7YuGevTwQ149Wdhcze3BeOeLn3JLTDFMcmVCr7HbgC2NQBMu85BoBfHxZCKkKyDyiN0xRFqerl0cbQNGkOd4M7Tj_10Ac-B3uvJpjoJR2A1pH_chDN0pL_lY0etfOr6-1ocCKyclkPutF6utPmJxdvfV5dLTGtEPkAZc0Y-z5Jd9jJJRuVIzbJLaGC-q6Pgtouu7BKQuI3DKQ4QELZO4v3nrwXSafQOcraA5muvZLEY0HuAWb8y0CEyGTf7gsH1_Am5CHjXDdemE1_sawgYxMYhNY22_E6TQ1s1vFVThpvZfXKi84isHuoLPx1I4ny2PNn8gKuPZ8xE-nmTWpp6_zi_UdlCjtna_4QODHvrFwK9KPyjyk7P-lMqD)

Fellow Conservative,

Recently in our nation’s capital, there was a stabbing just blocks away from the Capitol. There was a shooting in one of DC’s ritziest neighborhoods. There were more carjacking’s in January than there were days. A police officer was shot in the line of duty.

But the DC mayor is focused on enforcing a mask AND vaccine mandate across the city. _How is this the priority, Fellow Conservative?_

Crime is on the rise and the party in charge wants to defund the police and implement soft-on-crime policies. But it’s not just DC with soaring high crime rates – the following cities hit record high homicides in 2021... _and they’re all cities run by Dems._

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9657d54c16a04b39b7616b55a8c58d01&_e=kpvVC-7s7YuGevTwQ149Wdhcze3BeOeLn3JLTDFMcmVCr7HbgC2NQBMu85BoBfHxZCKkKyDyiN0xRFqerl0cbQNGkOd4M7Tj_10Ac-B3uvJpjoJR2A1pH_chDN0pL_lY0etfOr6-1ocCKyclkPutF6utPmJxdvfV5dLTGtEPkAbXyOlcRauKD9aVoEeq4c051QaTQl3sJ8sMAzoJUD6RzM60I_bpCKpUE5qNoDKe1zBJZmob9MAuzm9AUk01RXFXSZ97Qy8Zg1YX9DlYjYDWjb3c-TIeaq8-ZHdbGpaJR2a-3iJIZXh28-nsbv6uO6CfSFw_k-ixnzyaarg9dI_G08yBQQaVqsgRArwnxzMJLC4xfVzYZPrI6Mmtqj00WrSY)

We can’t continue down this path where innocent people are hurt while criminals run rampant.

It’s time to elect common-sense conservatives to Congress, who believe in FUNDING the police, confronting crime, and implement policies to keep the American people safe – _NOT criminals._

[**If you believe we need representatives in Washington that are TOUGH on crime, please consider a donation to my campaign today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9657d54c16a04b39b7616b55a8c58d01&_e=kpvVC-7s7YuGevTwQ149Wdhcze3BeOeLn3JLTDFMcmVCr7HbgC2NQBMu85BoBfHxZCKkKyDyiN0xRFqerl0cbQNGkOd4M7Tj_10Ac-B3uvJpjoJR2A1pH_chDN0pL_lY0etfOr6-1ocCKyclkPutF6utPmJxdvfV5dLTGtEPkAbl6FM7Pe3i5ArVXUIiTjrjRV46s_L6I31pVpzTSQBfUqXC0cLhf8XQQnDRaTmA8spoZNq91eMuMlPfMsI0UF5yeYY_daB2eH-FpqcKfFF5yAVEO3h00RyCVvHpMCvQaCh95MUX8KZOVrz6CDA9m9FJa2L7sYtKcf5coxCzWvvex2KuSrfExXKqmCSiBAZ1o03xBK1W8DVgiWZzk7Soxf6G)

[**SEND A COMMON-SENSE CONSERVATIVE TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9657d54c16a04b39b7616b55a8c58d01&_e=kpvVC-7s7YuGevTwQ149Wdhcze3BeOeLn3JLTDFMcmVCr7HbgC2NQBMu85BoBfHxZCKkKyDyiN0xRFqerl0cbQNGkOd4M7Tj_10Ac-B3uvJpjoJR2A1pH_chDN0pL_lY0etfOr6-1ocCKyclkPutF6utPmJxdvfV5dLTGtEPkAY8-WHcDbrMptvh-p2E8DJmZ20NBY9haixCY5pFjfOaglxKaIY1zCMHctkGdpcdGggHNA3Daar84EZ5rCX_m-6b-tDkP1yf0Lw3yM9mUXk1b1UdA0PdwRz2BvTh3MIXrwvZn3d55PKuFIYA0o2_zsjCz-kpcRyUH9UIDVxlMzSPdLG9e2DcK35ZGwh6WKvHl2mNDX0IcNbhZGRRDvSTelix)
I have always worked in Congress to keep my district, state, and country safe, and strongly believe we need to put the American people first. This means being tough on crime and issues that people care about, not petty policies like the mayor of DC.

It’s time to tackle crime head on and enforce our laws.

[**Please, consider a donation today to help get our country back on track.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9657d54c16a04b39b7616b55a8c58d01&_e=kpvVC-7s7YuGevTwQ149Wdhcze3BeOeLn3JLTDFMcmVCr7HbgC2NQBMu85BoBfHxZCKkKyDyiN0xRFqerl0cbQNGkOd4M7Tj_10Ac-B3uvJpjoJR2A1pH_chDN0pL_lY0etfOr6-1ocCKyclkPutF6utPmJxdvfV5dLTGtEPkAYfyWg1XgpRYz2hYQ3SiyCT4G1XtcvnYCtgu_0dNUf2jM2eXwgx1xmz3k1P9Z8bUGeP6wZBNzadRPnmWI0dWZpSp2QcrkG6OPR1ElsXa557ZNx3Gq6WyU8uV4LEKVijoH0uKz-uAjjmJhlbLpzRYWPwHlvXOoxKQ_jmim-NlOUkpVxS5MiVPfedA1cJk3PqnAHWNTl0y_N3ffgy0F9K8qXd)

For Freedom,
Greg Murphy, MD

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Are we safe any more?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
Don’t let Democrat spin-doctors like Jen Psaki try to make you think that this isn’t a problem, because we know that it is, and we know that we deserve better.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3g5fn--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g5fn-1x0db-4qqlpo9/)
---

**Psaki Shrugs Off Crime Concerns As Part Of “Alternate Universe”**
_New York Post, 1/31/22_

---

They just don’t care, do they?

Across America, cities and towns are less safe today than they were a year ago. Criminals are emboldened by the soft-on-crime policies that Democrats have embraced, and we’re seeing crime rates that we haven’t seen in years. We’re locking our doors tighter, having to watch our surroundings more and just feeling more unsafe.

**This just isn’t right.** Americans should be able to feel safe in their own homes and communities. We shouldn’t have to worry about being the victim of a crime, **or worse, being a victim then seeing the perp get a slap on the wrist and let back out onto the streets. It shouldn’t be like this.**

Don’t let Democrat spin-doctors like Jen Psaki try to make you think that this isn’t a problem, because we know that it is, and we know that we deserve better.

The midterm elections are less than 10 months away now. That may seem like a long time, but I promise you that it will be here before we know it. **[If we’re going to change the course America is on, we need your help.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g5fn-1x0dc-4qqlpo0/ "If we’re going to change the course America is on, we need your help.")**

**Launching a Red Wave in 2022 is how we’re going to get America back in the direction it needs to be going**. Republicans need to win across the country, and that means pulling off huge victories in battleground states. That’s why I launched the **[CAVPAC Battleground Fund](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g5fn-1x0dd-4qqlpo1/ "CAVPAC Battleground Fund")** – to make sure that candidates in these vital states have backup from the Conservative Cavalry and can score big wins for Republicans in races where Democrats won’t give up.

---
| | [CHIP INTO THE BATTLEGROUND FUND](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g5fn-1x0de-4qqlpo2/)
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g5fn-1x0df-4qqlpo3/)
---

We’ve got to be ready to turn our frustration into action. It is vital that we have the resources to launch a top-tier ground game across the country to drive home to voters what many of them have already seen: **that a conservative, America First agenda works for the country and that the far-left Democrat agenda does not.**

---
| | [CHIP IN TODAY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g5fn-1x0dg-4qqlpo4/)
---

**As far as midterm elections go, the stakes have never been higher.** We need all hands on deck on this one. I know that I’m in it for the long run, are you with me?

Fighting For Our Future,

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g5fn-1x0dh-4qqlpo5/)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3g5fn-1x0di-4qqlpo6/ "PompeoEmailFooter")
---

**A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO**

With the Freedom Fund, I am supporting candidates across America who will defend the freedoms and values that make America great. From Iowa to Texas to California, I’m supporting principled conservatives who we can count on to keep their promises and deliver results. But our efforts will only be successful if we have the financial resources necessary to counter the big bucks flowing into the Democrat campaigns.

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.

name: Angela Angel
subject: All the amazing things we can accomplish
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532805/329227864/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2MwOTk2OC01NTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kugf8WoNs6L39mhgnN_XKvQmUVB_mPuDIvPwjc6i97w=&emci=e35b6d7b-3a88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=07c09968-5588-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=8410825)
---
Friend,

We're exactly 7 weeks into the campaign, and as we head into the second month of the year, I'm thrilled to imagine the amazing things we can accomplish.

I got into this race because I see possibilities: A bold investment in high-quality education for all, universal Pre-k, expanding Medicare and healthcare coverage and so much more. Every election is an opportunity to bring new voices to power and make transformational changes a reality. Folks, I'm not letting this historic opportunity go to waste.

That's why we're running an ambitious campaign. In the upcoming months, we're going to **expand outreach to voters across the district, build a brand new ads department to get our message out far and wide, hire new staff on our communications team, and build enough grassroots support to eclipse all of our fundraising goals this year.**

**[Chip in $5 to help us hit our ambitious goals and bring this campaign to the finish line.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532806/329227865/1465103901?refcode=em22_220207_AngelaRelaunch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2MwOTk2OC01NTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kugf8WoNs6L39mhgnN_XKvQmUVB_mPuDIvPwjc6i97w=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41532807/329227866/1465103901?refcode=em22_220207_AngelaRelaunch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2MwOTk2OC01NTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kugf8WoNs6L39mhgnN_XKvQmUVB_mPuDIvPwjc6i97w=) My faith, time in tough courtroom fights for vulnerable children and adults, journey as a survivor, and relentless work ethic as a legislator have prepared me for the work ahead. I am stepping forward as an experienced champion for the people, ready to represent our great district both in the national fights around issues like voting rights and right here at home like the growing cost of living due to rising inflation. With the excruciating costs of housing, education, and healthcare, and in an economy that only seems to work for the wealthy and well-connected, it's clear the status quo **must change.**

name: Scott Taylor
subject: Seriously Considering
body:
---
| | | | | | February 07, 2022
---
| Seriously Considering
---
| I don't know what I'm doing, but I do know we need a change in the new 2nd Congressional District leadership and around the country.
I care deeply about the direction of this nation and the people who live in it. I always think about how my mother and families like ours would be doing in any given political environment.
There is no question, with inflation she would be and others are struggling to put food on the table, pay the bills, and make sure their kids get the education needed to succeed.
Many people have reached out to me over the last couple months. A snapshot poll, asking a simple question of ballot support was done to all primary voter cell phones (you may have received a text). Below are the results.
I'm humbled by the support and you have my serious consideration in making a decision that is best for my country, my family, and myself.

Your Humble Servant,
---

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Washington Examiner: Expanding Obamacare subsidies will cause even more inflation
body:
| |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=d84004fed0d54cf08e6804a3bdfd19a8&_e=I4KuazP_ReJNmtDaaTEe66SxX1CBpMEZCRsE2Q7RNLxBuk_Kf-qkaLIQMYPPbvmoXr8sfPkMnlEht4RHZY4pZ7GfrMN-8OewyPh95jreS38QJGNYqksNNLeoHUtkl2wHFKeisd1P7BGytMUuF8tAfo0ka8xs6EUjtGyFYR7ayE_WcJQ9BcY1Qs9I7PHQWgd499wIEKBj01OOlN7MMgFrdYaBxNb1Ow0-TKYzsWZAbEqh9Y3WjVqC2V2ArDQYM8ShvNLOpMnY7Q3NoYGCzMVjyA%3D%3D)
Expanding Obamacare subsidies will cause even more inflation
By Bobby Jindal & Abigale Slagle
In 2021, inflation soared to 7% .

We feel it at checkout counters, gas pumps, and in healthcare costs. The Build Back Better Act, currently stalled in the Senate but still looming in the legislative background, would encourage already sky-high health insurance premiums to rise even higher, making more people reliant on taxpayer subsidies to afford insurance.

The act aims to make permanent the otherwise temporary expansions for Obamacare premium subsidies from the 2021 American Rescue Plan Act. While the House-passed version of the bill only extends the current provisions to 2025, the true policy goal is to lock in this expansion of government spending and involvement in healthcare, creating an endless cycle of rising premiums and taxpayer costs.

The Biden administration’s first COVID-19 relief bill expanded subsidies for enrollees in Obamacare plans to such an extent that taxpayers may cover the entire cost of health insurance premiums for families earning between 100% and 150% of the federal poverty level. It would also subsidize families earning over 400% of the federal poverty level — or $106,000 for a family of four. Even before the relief bill, individuals between 100% and 150% of poverty had extremely low cost-sharing and paid only between 2% and 4% of household income to premiums...
_Finish Reading _** [HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=d84004fed0d54cf08e6804a3bdfd19a8&_e=I4KuazP_ReJNmtDaaTEe66leJMambcUVlTGxbDK5Ti4v0b6Upzte7Xnfkq99F_72ZLShyzelSSYJ012fqi7OG43f76_ch6mTv-aVRemWTs0GpekiUV0CKkFOiUlQLdiIXSFj9uRGIboVTl2IQ46ZVr4jSLzziyqagyxKVd3Q6itaJNQzF3hW4U98O-q0KZOOBF0NB2qs3-2d_x1xHRV9XOTPZnL6v_TaiD3CJ5I0JqING9aZiPs5lKL3qU9gcKNuPjJPQrXyFsZch50m9WMUUsrVgcpQjR_tn36kTp7qx2nHR-3CSongPaCJLrM1yOice41qzOoXC9UCIpzNVmFf9lpYwMB_eMZhwOzhIHYQGdBsaOuQt3Il8zK218OO2nR6-t_2-W9K8uiex8a580LGG0oy4SW2h3PRIfgFXX4sris%3D)**.

name: Team Benson
subject: Why we need to re-elect Jocelyn
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

You won't want to miss this:
Securing our elections
Protecting our democracy
Increasing efficiencies

This is what drives Jocelyn Benson every day.

As Michigan’s Secretary of State,
She has the dual responsibility of safeguarding our elections
And improving the services offered to Michigan citizens.

And she is delivering.

In 2021, average office visits were down to 20 min or less.
And 60 percent of services are done without an office visit.

Jocelyn is working tirelessly to make sure all Michiganders
Know the truth about our voting process
And know how to exercise their right to vote.

In 2020, Michigan had the most accurate and secure election in state history!
Now Jocelyn is up for reelection and we need you with us this November.

Michigan deserves another term with a Secretary of State
Who is willing to
fight back against conspiracy theorists and fake electors
Overcome political differences to get things done for us
And unite for a non-partisan coalition of truth

[Support Jocelyn’s Campaign]: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=020722

-Team Benson

[THEN:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41533219/329229486/-71239772?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhkODA1OS01ODg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uX7cxEEZ2pDmAAw_FkjZvOgwidNxRaBNI7yVFY3MBAk=&emci=66c7e8a2-f385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=778d8059-5888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=26828920) he nearly threw the 2020 election into chaos by slowing down mail delivery – which could have delayed an untold number of mail-in ballots!

name: Giffords.org
subject: You’ve been selected → Ban ghost guns in Maryland
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
As you know, through our work at Giffords, we have helped pass 465 pieces of legislation nationwide in individual states.
#

Friends —
As you know, through our work at Giffords, we have helped pass 465 pieces of legislation nationwide in individual states.
That’s work that has saved lives.
We have a number of campaigns running right now, and we want to ask you to help us fund one, specifically. Here’s your assignment:
**CAMPAIGN NAME:** Ban ghost guns in Maryland
**STATE:** Maryland
**DESCRIPTION:** Right now in Maryland, anyone can legally go online and buy a DIY gun kit—no background check required. We’re working to ban these untraceable firearms.
[**Can you contribute $3 to help us ban ghost guns in Maryland? When we win, your donation will be an important reason why. It will save lives. Please.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220207-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1531_3935704_29I6Nx&akid=1531%2E3935704%2E29I6Nx)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220207-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1531_3935704_29I6Nx&akid=1531%2E3935704%2E29I6Nx)**
Our success would not be possible without people like you coming together with others all across the country to change our gun laws. Sometimes it happens in your state. Sometimes it happens elsewhere. But make no mistake, our work saves lives.
Team Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220207-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=1531_3935704_29I6Nx&akid=1531%2E3935704%2E29I6Nx)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| | **Hello Friend,** **I am so proud to announce that Denver City Councilmember Candi CdeBaca has endorsed my campaign for Colorado's First Congressional District!** [**Follow Candi's lead and support our campaign by making a donation today!**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=88806d12c6&e=e67cbb3f92) [](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=46ce3e8e32&e=e67cbb3f92) **I am honored to have the support of such a progressive leader who has paved the way for candidates like myself to have a fighting chance in taking on the political establishment. I am up against the corporate machine and I need your help to make sure we have the resources to be competitive.**

[**Can I count on you to keep this momentum going by making a donation of $10, $25, $50, or $100?**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=c16bd7af43&e=e67cbb3f92)

**Candi's leadership in Denver has been inspirational because she is unapologetic when fighting for the issues that impact everyday people in our community. I look forward to working with her in ensuring that Denver has the type of leadership that reflects the people. Thank you for being in this fight with me.**
In Solidarity,
Neal Walia
Candidate, CO First Congressional District

name: Greg Casar
subject: We MUST protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.07-email&amount=35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.07-email&amount=35]
Peter,
Over the last year we’ve seen an assault on reproductive rights across the country. Here in Texas, right-wing lawmakers passed Senate Bill 8, which has effectively banned abortions in our state for the last five months. Now, the Supreme Court is reviewing a Mississippi law that could mean the end of the end of Roe, which has been the law of the land for 50 years.
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment for reproductive justice. We can no longer rely on the Courts, and we must make Roe v. Wade federal law, and lift the Medicaid ban on abortion care. With only one week until early voting starts, can you pitch in $35 to support our campaign? Together we can elect a Congress that will protect abortion rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.07-email&amount=35]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.07-email&amount=35]In my time on the Austin City Council, I’ve worked with local and state organizations to defend abortion rights and the reproductive health care that so many Texans count on. I’m proud to have worked with Planned Parenthood to block the state legislature from closing the clinic in East Austin, and I’ve partnered with local nonprofits to help low-income Texans get financial support for reproductive care.
The Texas abortion ban has already had a devastating impact on Texas families. It’s time for federal legislation affirming the right to an abortion, something I will fight for if I’m elected to Congress.
Thank you for your advocacy on this issue, and for supporting our campaign. With just one week until early voting starts, it’s critical we Get Out The Vote right now. Can you pitch in $35 to help us win in TX-35? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.07-email&amount=35]
Thank you,
Greg
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]

name: Emily Seidel
subject: The 10 biggest lies of socialism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | |
---
Hey there, Right now, the demand for socialism is on the rise. That's especially true among young people. Unfortunately, many of them have bought into the empty promises of socialism because of political leaders like Bernie Sanders and AOC. That's why my policy research team has put together an easy-to-read guide that identifies the most common lies promoted by socialists and the truth of what typically follows from it once implemented. We're about to launch a large-scale educational effort to get this free resource into the hands of many young Americans to open their hearts and minds and start the conversation to persuade them towards freedom.
---
| | **That's why I'm emailing you today.** I was hoping to get your feedback on how we can improve the eBook before the campaign is launched. You can get your free copy of _10 Biggest Lies of Socialism_ to review here now:[http://americansforprosperity.org/10-biggest-lies-of-socialism-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0xMGxpZXNvZnNvY2lhbGlzbSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12MS1BRV9GRk8wMjA3MjAyMiJ9/5cAgIJaPOlBgyR6B9SaR1w)

name: Michele Rayner
subject: We need to talk about HIV/AIDS education within the Black community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41522968/329179016/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThjYTQwMi0yZjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBRyjlxStP-xyolmgTn6MNHkf5lO4ShCyok7wEPOVyI=)

Hi Peter,

Today is National Black HIV/AIDS Awareness Day. Today is dedicated to raising awareness of the significant and disproportionate impact of HIV on Black people and the importance of increasing access to HIV education, testing, treatment, and prevention services.

It was first celebrated in 1999 and since then we’ve made huge strides in increasing HIV education, community involvement, prevention and treatment options, but the reality is there’s so much more work that needs to be done.

It's on us to break the stigma and educate each other so every one of us can make informed decisions about our health and happiness. **[Join me in adding your name to the petition to ensure our community gets the proper resources to continue investing in HIV/AIDS awareness.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41522972/329179024/-638646898?ms=em22_220207_hivaidspt&refcode=em22_220207_hivaidspt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThjYTQwMi0yZjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBRyjlxStP-xyolmgTn6MNHkf5lO4ShCyok7wEPOVyI=&emci=f9a32cc6-ca85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=158ca402-2f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=34271788)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41522973/329179025/-638646898?ms=em22_220207_hivaidspt&refcode=em22_220207_hivaidspt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThjYTQwMi0yZjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBRyjlxStP-xyolmgTn6MNHkf5lO4ShCyok7wEPOVyI=&emci=f9a32cc6-ca85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=158ca402-2f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=34271788) After 23 years, one thing remains true – you cannot end HIV without addressing racial injustice, investing in Black communities, and uplifting Black leadership.

Discrimination against Black people is deeply ingrained in our country's systems, processes, and mindsets. **This is why it's critical that we increase awareness, spark conversations, and get involved in the effort to end HIV/AIDS in Black communities.**

We need to continue to demand inclusion in medical and scientific advances and access to updated health information, prevention and treatment options.

**[By signing the petition you are demanding action be taken to address deep, systemic inequalities and work towards ending the HIV/AIDS epidemic among the Black community. Add you name today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41522984/329179031/-638646898?ms=em22_220207_hivaidspt&refcode=em22_220207_hivaidspt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThjYTQwMi0yZjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBRyjlxStP-xyolmgTn6MNHkf5lO4ShCyok7wEPOVyI=&emci=f9a32cc6-ca85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=158ca402-2f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=34271788)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41522986/329179041/-638646898?ms=em22_220207_hivaidspt&refcode=em22_220207_hivaidspt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThjYTQwMi0yZjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBRyjlxStP-xyolmgTn6MNHkf5lO4ShCyok7wEPOVyI=&emci=f9a32cc6-ca85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=158ca402-2f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=34271788) Thank you for taking a stand for what is right, Peter.

– Michele [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41522988/329179043/-1319772124?refcode=em22_220207_hivaidspt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThjYTQwMi0yZjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBRyjlxStP-xyolmgTn6MNHkf5lO4ShCyok7wEPOVyI=)

Fellow American,

I wanted to reach out to you today and give you an update on my campaign for Governor of Texas.
* Illegals are POURING across our border and the current Governor is complicit in allowing this invasion
* Vaccines are being mandated or Texans will lose their jobs
* Candidates for Governor are calling for the confiscation of our guns

clean_body: 🚨Endorsement Alert 🚨 | | Governors George Allen, Jim Gilmore, and Bob McDonnell endorse Jen Kiggans for Congress! | | | ---|---|--- The energy surrounding this campaign is contagious and we can feel the momentum growing by the day! I am honored to receive the endorsements of all three former Republican Governors of Virginia! Governors George Allen, Jim Gilmore and Bob McDonnell all announced their endorsement of my campaign today. Each one of them has contributed so much to our Commonwealth and their unified support shows that my campaign is best suited to beat Elaine Luria in November. The path to a Republican Majority runs through VA02 and I am honored to have the support of these great Governors! I would be honored for you to join my team by chipping in | Chip in today to join Governors Allen, Gilmore and McDonnell in supporting Jen Kiggans for Congress! | | | | I look forward to winning this seat for Virginia and taking back the U.S. House of Representatives! Thank you so much for your support! Jen Jen Kiggans is a veteran of the US Navy. name: Breaking: Washington Post (via Team Ryan)
subject: “one of the most consequential Democratic candidates of the 2022 cycle”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ][IMG]

Folks,

The Washington Post just called Tim Ryan “one of the most consequential
Democratic candidates of the 2022 cycle.”

This is a BIG deal! But here’s the kicker: “Republicans remain favored” to
win Ohio’s open Senate seat this November.

Not on our watch, folks!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7120?t=1007&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ]Democrats can’t lose this race—not when our Senate majority is at
stake. Will you please rush in $25 so we can flip this open seat blue and
expand our Democratic Senate majority to deliver for hardworking Ohioans?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7120?t=1008&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7121?t=1009&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7122?t=1010&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7123?t=1011&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ]Donate $200

Not only will our race decide who controls the Senate—it’ll set the tone for 2024.
And that’s exactly why Ohio Republicans are preparing to nominate the most
extreme, far-right, Trump-loving candidate they can find.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7120?t=1012&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ]The Washington Post: “Ohio could be the closest thing to a test run for
2024 ... You are running against the Trumpiest Trumpers ...”

Tim is traveling all across Ohio to have real, face-to-face conversations
with voters—spreading his message on how to rebuild our economy, invest in
manufacturing, and cut workers in on the deal.

Meanwhile, we’re up against Republican millionaires who have fully
embraced Trump’s failed, extremist agenda. Yet they remain neck-and-neck
with Tim in the polls because of the multi-million dollar super PACs
backing their far-right campaigns.

Our race will decide Senate control in 2022 and beyond. And we can’t let a
mountain of GOP dark money and billionaire donors buy Ohio’s open Senate
seat.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7120?t=1013&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ]We need your help to power our campaign so we can overcome this
disadvantage. Will you chip in any amount right away? We can win this race
and flip Ohio blue, but only if you’re with us.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7120?t=1014&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7121?t=1015&akid=2243%2E3611125%2EyJohQE ]Donate $50

Thanks,

Team Ryan

clean_body: National Republicans are preparing a massive attack ad campaign. | | | Friend, I need you to hear this, because what you do next could change everything: National Republicans just announced they are preparing a MASSIVE attack ad campaign against me. And when Floridians turn on their TVs, they'll be blanketed by GOP lies aimed at ending my historic campaign. Right now, I cannot defend myself without your immediate help, friend. = The National Republican Senatorial Committee raised a record-breaking $104.8 MILLION in 2021. The RNC chair has already attacked me personally, and my team just heard that they're gearing up to run attack ads to defeat me. Republicans are worried that Marco Rubio is only 2 points ahead of me and that election veterans like James Carville think I can win. The GOP knows this race could determine the Senate majority – so they'll spend as much money as it takes to buy this seat. If I don't raise $25,000 before midnight, I won't have the resources to defend myself from Mitch McConnell's committee's desperate attacks. That means I'll fall behind in this close race, and McConnell could regain complete Senate control. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for stepping up when it matters most. Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. name: Brett Guillory for Texas
subject: 160 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas
body:
24,000 Lives Saved in Texas
| | | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DtvrVc-2yn1EIWGnvZOBpt8VDd7r_5WJ2FDCJ2_3FRnCJQVlh8QhXtzuxDGypFnDIj--IzDzuozH1zJjUuH_TAH_S5OwY45mI45HOrx3HAa3oap7QJfyEY9LTwh0ehifDSkCUoXE4S4E-dsu1X0uHoGOnm_TLtvQ_q4rujZAgbA=&c=w1tWgzVS52tgF6rwbYJJeKmwl2_rVfK-qmlQLJj5Ei31JIjBPGfolQ==&ch=4ka_fDF1CUhFPV1AD0z4tmtoZDFGWhUlr9rRMN9LTcyGBVskfUilYw==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,
Today marks the 160th day that the Texas "Heartbeat Bill" is saving babies from abortion. Prior to the ban, 150 abortions were performed in Texas every day. Today, we get to rejoice that approximately 24,000 unique individuals; each with their own mind, heartbeat, and soul, now have the opportunity to live.
Even more positive news for the Texas pro-life movement: San Angelo is now moving forward with a Sanctuary City for the Unborn ordinance that would ban abortions in the city. If the ordinance passes, San Angelo would join the other 43 cities in Texas, Nebraska, and Ohio, in protecting unborn babies by banning abortions within city limits.
At the Federal level, the Supreme Court is still weighing the high-profile case, Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health. As you know, this case could unwind Roe v. Wade. While the outcome of this case still hangs in the balance, I'm thankful for the steps that Texas has taken to stand for the weakest and most vulnerable among us.
Our Declaration of Independence states that "we are endowed by our Creator with certain unalienable rights, that among these are Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness." Yet for almost 50 years, our country has not lived up to the first principle on that list: Life.
---
---
I didn't grow up surrounded by many babies, but I will never forget the first time I held my new nephew. My heart melted. He was so small and so innocent. Such innocence and vulnerability deserve our protection.
As your congressman, I will always stand for life and fight for those who are unable to fight for themselves.
---
---

body:
I wanted to get personal, explain who I am, and why I’m running for Congress.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41534346/329234365/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.07_b1_personal_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjk4MmQxYy01ZDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7xPomX8PcoAVxqgh_yTgIRwV1PcP2ZY1T91NxX7xX8=)
---
Friends, I wanted to do something different today. I wanted to get personal, explain who I am, and why I’m running for Congress.

**[I hope you’ll read it all the way through and, if you can, chip in a few of your hard-earned dollars to help me raise the kind of money I need to defeat a Capitol Insurrectionist>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41534349/329234368/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.07_b1_personal_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.07_b1_personal_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjk4MmQxYy01ZDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7xPomX8PcoAVxqgh_yTgIRwV1PcP2ZY1T91NxX7xX8=)**

Let me start by saying something that some people might consider to be pretty radical.

**Rural America is just as important as anywhere else.** I grew up on the farm and it taught me the values I carry with me to this day.

Life on the farm isn’t fancy. But you sure learn a thing or two. You learn humility. Slipping and falling in manure has a way of keeping you grounded.

And when problems come, as they always do, you don’t complain, you get to work. Because talking doesn’t help the crops to grow, get the produce to market or fix that hole in your fence before the cows get out.

That’s why I am so proud of my time working with Governor Evers leading the Wisconsin Department of Agriculture, Trade and Consumer Protection. I fought to get relief for family farmers struggling to make ends meet every single day. When politicians in Madison told me to pipe down, I stood up. When they told me to be quiet, I spoke up louder. **And when they refused to confirm me in the hopes that I might just leave them alone, I got back in the fight.**

I ran for the State Senate. And I won. Now I’m there every day holding them accountable to the people of Wisconsin.

**But my opponent, Derrick Van Orden? He doesn’t understand any of this in the slightest.**

He’s basically got one approach: pit neighbor against neighbor and hope that in all the anger that generates, voters won’t notice that he doesn’t share our values at all. He was on the Capitol grounds on January 6th. That shameful, deadly day. He’s tried to cover it up because he knows people out here think that was wrong. He attacks people. Like teenage librarians. He’s a bully who can only win if we’re as divided as we’ve ever been. And if that doesn’t sound like it will be much help to you, you’re right. Derrick Van Orden is only in this for himself and to do what he’s told by his Washington backers.

But winning this campaign won’t be easy.

**[To defeat Van Orden, we need to build the most sophisticated campaign Wisconsin has ever seen. We need to register new voters, have authentic one-on-one conversations with voters to tell my story, run sophisticated digital advertisements, radio ads, television ads, and more to persuade everyone to join our campaign. But this effort will be expensive. I’m funding this campaign the right way: from small donations given by people reading emails like this one. So even though I hate to ask for money -- I have a humble request:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41534351/329234371/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.07_b1_personal_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.07_b1_personal_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjk4MmQxYy01ZDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7xPomX8PcoAVxqgh_yTgIRwV1PcP2ZY1T91NxX7xX8=)**

If you believe in me, if you believe we need to keep fighting, even when it’s hard, if you haven’t given up on the rural places many have forgotten -- join me on this journey. Chip in to this email today: | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41534354/329234373/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.07_b1_personal_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.07_b1_personal_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjk4MmQxYy01ZDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7xPomX8PcoAVxqgh_yTgIRwV1PcP2ZY1T91NxX7xX8=)

clean_body: I wanted to get personal, explain who I am, and why I’m running for Congress. | = Friends, I wanted to do something different today. I wanted to get personal, explain who I am, and why I’m running for Congress. = Let me start by saying something that some people might consider to be pretty radical. Rural America is just as important as anywhere else. I grew up on the farm and it taught me the values I carry with me to this day. Life on the farm isn’t fancy. But you sure learn a thing or two. You learn humility. Slipping and falling in manure has a way of keeping you grounded. And when problems come, as they always do, you don’t complain, you get to work. Because talking doesn’t help the crops to grow, get the produce to market or fix that hole in your fence before the cows get out. That’s why I am so proud of my time working with Governor Evers leading the Wisconsin Department of Agriculture, Trade and Consumer Protection. I fought to get relief for family farmers struggling to make ends meet every single day. When politicians in Madison told me to pipe down, I stood up. When they told me to be quiet, I spoke up louder. And when they refused to confirm me in the hopes that I might just leave them alone, I got back in the fight. I ran for the State Senate. And I won. Now I’m there every day holding them accountable to the people of Wisconsin. But my opponent, Derrick Van Orden? He doesn’t understand any of this in the slightest. He’s basically got one approach: pit neighbor against neighbor and hope that in all the anger that generates, voters won’t notice that he doesn’t share our values at all. He was on the Capitol grounds on January 6th. That shameful, deadly day. He’s tried to cover it up because he knows people out here think that was wrong. He attacks people. Like teenage librarians. He’s a bully who can only win if we’re as divided as we’ve ever been. And if that doesn’t sound like it will be much help to you, you’re right. Derrick Van Orden is only in this for himself and to do what he’s told by his Washington backers. But winning this campaign won’t be easy. = If you believe in me, if you believe we need to keep fighting, even when it’s hard, if you haven’t given up on the rural places many have forgotten -- join me on this journey. Chip in to this email today: | = = = = = = If every person who receives this email gives a dollar or two, we’ll be able to show guys like Derrick Van Orden what rural Americans can do when we band together, stand up, and fight. Thanks for your support, Brad | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

We’re running full steam ahead to win New York’s 22nd Congressional District. We’re going to criss-cross this new district, from Syracuse to Ithaca to Auburn to Geneva to Seneca Falls to Cortland to Cazenovia, and everywhere in between!

**\---Forwarded Message---**

**From:** Josh Riley
**Date:** Friday, Feb 4, 2022
**Subject:** Onward! An update on redistricting & our campaign
**To:**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41534590/329234916/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220208-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWJkMmQwMi01ZTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cxwsF-GEmimWQPKBG2D5HiZqWRN2kZSSfmZsD5ZGg7Q=)
Peter,

This week, New York enacted new congressional districts for the 2022 election. While the districts' boundaries have changed, the key issues have not, and our campaign is moving forward full-steam ahead.

Upstate New Yorkers have been sold out by a political and economic system that rewards special interests and hurts working families. Upstate New York has experienced a generation of job losses while Wall Street has seen corporate profits soar. Many Upstate New Yorkers are living paycheck-to-paycheck while the top 1% have accumulated more wealth than the entire Middle Class combined. And politicians continue to receive payouts from corporate PACs while everyday Americans are left to foot the bill.

It’s time for change, and I have the experience to deliver. I’ve spent my career taking on big fights for the little guy in court, breaking through partisan gridlock to get things done in Congress, and standing up to the Trump Administration’s discriminatory immigration policies.

I believe that all Upstate New Yorkers deserve a Square Deal: if you work hard, play by the rules, and treat others with decency, then you should have a fair shot at the Middle Class. When I’m elected to Congress, I will work every day to create new jobs and economic opportunities that lift everyone up and bring everyone along.

I hope you'll join us,

Josh Riley
| | _Josh Riley is a Democrat running for Congress to bring Upstate New York Square Deal values to Washington. clean_body: Did you see Josh’s email on Friday? | = | Peter, Did you see Josh’s email on Friday? We’re running full steam ahead to win New York’s 22nd Congressional District. We’re going to criss-cross this new district, from Syracuse to Ithaca to Auburn to Geneva to Seneca Falls to Cortland to Cazenovia, and everywhere in between! But, here’s the deal, Peter. This campaign is going to be very expensive — there are a lot of new voters to talk to and ground to cover. Our campaign isn’t accepting one penny from corporate PACs. Instead, we rely on committed grassroots supporters like you, Peter. That’s what makes these emails so important, and why we need your help today. = | | NY-22 FOUNDING DONOR DRIVE Name: Peter ZIP: On File Suggested Action: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = We appreciate your support, and we look forward to what we will accomplish together! All the best, Coby Eiss Campaign Manager Josh Riley for Congress \---Forwarded Message--- From: Josh Riley Date: Friday, Feb 4, 2022 Subject: Onward! An update on redistricting & our campaign To:= Peter, This week, New York enacted new congressional districts for the 2022 election. While the districts' boundaries have changed, the key issues have not, and our campaign is moving forward full-steam ahead. Upstate New Yorkers have been sold out by a political and economic system that rewards special interests and hurts working families. Upstate New York has experienced a generation of job losses while Wall Street has seen corporate profits soar. Many Upstate New Yorkers are living paycheck-to-paycheck while the top 1% have accumulated more wealth than the entire Middle Class combined. And politicians continue to receive payouts from corporate PACs while everyday Americans are left to foot the bill. It’s time for change, and I have the experience to deliver. I’ve spent my career taking on big fights for the little guy in court, breaking through partisan gridlock to get things done in Congress, and standing up to the Trump Administration’s discriminatory immigration policies. I believe that all Upstate New Yorkers deserve a Square Deal: if you work hard, play by the rules, and treat others with decency, then you should have a fair shot at the Middle Class. When I’m elected to Congress, I will work every day to create new jobs and economic opportunities that lift everyone up and bring everyone along. I hope you'll join us, Josh Riley | | Josh Riley is a Democrat running for Congress to bring Upstate New York Square Deal values to Washington. If you would like to chip in to support our campaign you can= | = * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 6806 213 Tioga St Ithaca, NY 14851 United States | | ---|--- = = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 6806, 213 Tioga St, Ithaca, NY 14851. | | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsph0bbgso4pm0ljs42enabhh8263ri4gkb2d1g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hm9o73c3h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z52lra3c4j048nf20psvp0ionhlhdt2l4bpdbf1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hm9o73c3h2bs "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6vlpeujejq926ehlnvpn4hkdkg4ol89u6r22qpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c9hm9o73c3h2bs)**

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office
