The Candidate for We the People. | | | == | | | | Upcoming Events We're coming to Goldendale, WA in Klickitat County on February 26, 2022, to Stand Up for America and we want to see you there! == | | | | | Listen to Loren on the Issues Streaming live every Tuesday evening at 7:00 PM PST on Facebook and Youtube (and soon we'll be streaming on other platforms as well). Join over 84,000 followers on Facebook to stay up to date on campaign activity and Loren's thoughts on statewide and national issues. == | | | | We Don't Need Another War. | | | ---|--- | In his farewell address, George Washington said, "It is our true policy to steer clear of permanent alliances with any portion of the foreign world." Thomas Jefferson later said, "We should be friends with all nations and have entangled alliances with none." These ideas are completely antithetical to Article 5 of the NATO Treaty which reads, "...an attack on any member country compels other treaty members to come to its aid." Since its signing, NATO has vastly expanded its membership to the 30 nations it has today. Ukraine is NOT one of those member nations and even if it were Americans have no direct interests in Ukraine's conflict with Russia. We don't need another war and I won't support a war unless it passes Constitutional muster and poses a direct threat to American lives. ...But war is a big business and there's money to be made in bombs and bandages. The Warhawks in Washington DC--including members of BOTH political parties, the intelligence community, the homeland security community, and many of the so-called "Conservatives" paraded on television nightly--all seem to agree that a war with Russia is a good idea. It's not a good idea. In fact, it's an incredibly bad idea that could lead to war with China, Iran, and other nations who do business and/or have alliances with Russia. In turn, that could lead to a global economic collapse of the US Dollar as the world currency and give the Chinese Communist Party the very thing they want most: to be the world's economic and military leader. What is the justification for going to war with Russia over Ukraine? Our elected public servants in Washington DC tell us (with a straight face) Russia is threatening the sovereign borders of Ukraine and we can't allow that to happen. Without borders, they say, you don't have a nation. Really? You don't say? Since the Biden Administration dismantled the Trump-era border policies and encouraged MILLIONS of illegal immigrants to flood across our southern border, we've completely lost control of OUR OWN sovereignty. To make matters worse, we have Republicans encouraging amnesty for those who've violated our borders. One of those Republicans is right here in Washington Congressional District 4--Dan Newhouse. In fact, Newhouse even co-sponsored an amnesty bill and hasn't been shy about his support of illegals. How does he justify this to voters? He says it targets "farmworkers." Except it doesn't. There are holes in the legislation to allow others to apply to the program and evade deportation. The bill can be read == It gives amnesty to potentially millions of people who came to this country illegally while sticking his thumb in the eye of those who have applied to the immigration process correctly. Worse yet, Newhouse has yet to publically call into question our reasons for going to war with Russia over Ukraine. Why is that? Maybe it's because numerous defense contractors like General Dynamics have given Newhouse thousands of dollars to fall in line and do what he's told. Don't believe me? Read it for yourself == To date, Newhouse has raised over $450,000 in corporate and special interest money. It's clear Newhouse is for sale to the highest bidder. But my vote is not for sale. NOT ONE DOLLAR OF MY MONEY HAS COME FROM SPECIAL INTERESTS. The only special interest I have is you which is why I'm counting on you to help me catch up with Newhouse in fundraising. I need your help. This month we need to raise $50,000 to start catching up with Newhouse's fundraising haul. clean_body: She’s spending $30 million to register voters. | Friend, This is alarming... Early voting is set to begin in Texas in just 1 WEEK, but Nancy Pelosi and her DCCC are spending $30 MILLION on a voter mobilization effort to take down conservative frontrunners like myself running in the 5 must-win races that Republicans need to END her majority. With just weeks to go in this election, I’m counting on YOUR help to fight back and ensure we have enough registered voters of our own. Pelosi’s new registration effort is just the latest in her laundry list of attempts to try and undermine our momentum and stop us from winning this critical seat. She even tried SUING the state of Texas to have our brand-new 38th district ERASED from the maps. This may be a desperate, last-ditch attempt by Pelosi and her allies, but it proves just how much is on the line. We can’t take a single thing for granted in these final weeks of the election. It is truly a sad day when our state’s highest court will not act to ensure YOUR vote counts.

clean_body: Our state’s highest court chose NOT to uphold the law and secure our elections. | Friend, I hate to bring you bad news, but the Wisconsin Supreme Court has REFUSED to uphold the law, denying our case against the Wisconsin Elections Commission for their unlawful guidance. It is truly a sad day when our state’s highest court will not act to ensure YOUR vote counts. But I will never be deterred. The Court’s decision simply means the stakes of our toss-up governor’s race are that much higher. To ensure our elections are secure and free of fraud ahead of 2024, we must FIRE Tony Evers so we can enact election security. We cannot trust a radical Democrat like Tony Evers to protect the integrity of our elections. He already VETOED 6 separate election security bills in one fell swoop. And all the while, Evers has the gall to attack me for wanting to ensure that every LEGAL vote counts. There is too much on the line this year, Friend. The very core of our democracy – your fundamental right to have your vote count – depends on our ability to defeat Tony Evers in this must-win race. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

My story is a West Michigan story.
I was born and raised in West Michigan – my mother was a public school teacher and my father was a local reporter. Through their work, we were introduced to people, families, and students facing difficult times, who didn’t have their voices heard or their stories told by the decision-makers in their lives. My parents sought to change that.
My parents’ work and the stories of the families we met inspired my own career in public service – first as a social worker helping individuals facing homelessness, and then as an attorney, where I served our country in the U.S. Department of Justice during the Obama Administration.
This work also led me back home to West Michigan, where I’ve continued to serve my community as an attorney, a deacon in my church, and an engaged neighbor and community volunteer. My husband Jesse, a local college professor, and I are raising our two rambunctious boys, right around the corner from where my grandfather grew up.
I’m running for Congress to be a voice at the table for _all_ West Michiganders. The most important issues facing our nation – health care, voting rights, critical infrastructure issues, and boosting the bottom line for hard-working families in need – are all on the line.
My campaign in 2020 broke records for how close we came, how much money we raised, and how many volunteers we engaged. It was powerful and inspiring. My resolve and desire to serve West Michigan hasn’t changed one bit from my 2020 campaign, but something has changed: **Michigan’s 3rd District. **
An independent commission redrew the district, and it’s now rated as a PURE toss-up according to _The Cook Political Report_ – **meaning we can and will flip this seat to expand our Democratic House majority. **

Folks, don’t get me wrong – this will still be a battleground race. But, with hard work and a strong grassroots team, I know we’ll be able to win this thing!
[**I can’t do this alone. That’s why I’m counting on you, friend. clean_body: | = | | I have exciting news – I’m running to represent Michigan’s newly redrawn, Democratic leaning, 3rd District in the United States Congress! If you were on my team in 2020, it’s good to see you again. But if you’re just joining us, welcome, and I can’t wait to tell you more about myself in a moment. First, I’ve got some good news: Redistricting made 2022 our best shot to flip MI-03 blue in decades. It went from a district Donald Trump won by 3 points, to one President Biden won by 8 points.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = My story is a West Michigan story. I was born and raised in West Michigan – my mother was a public school teacher and my father was a local reporter. Through their work, we were introduced to people, families, and students facing difficult times, who didn’t have their voices heard or their stories told by the decision-makers in their lives. My parents sought to change that. My parents’ work and the stories of the families we met inspired my own career in public service – first as a social worker helping individuals facing homelessness, and then as an attorney, where I served our country in the U.S. Department of Justice during the Obama Administration. This work also led me back home to West Michigan, where I’ve continued to serve my community as an attorney, a deacon in my church, and an engaged neighbor and community volunteer. My husband Jesse, a local college professor, and I are raising our two rambunctious boys, right around the corner from where my grandfather grew up. I’m running for Congress to be a voice at the table for all West Michiganders. The most important issues facing our nation – health care, voting rights, critical infrastructure issues, and boosting the bottom line for hard-working families in need – are all on the line. My campaign in 2020 broke records for how close we came, how much money we raised, and how many volunteers we engaged. It was powerful and inspiring. My resolve and desire to serve West Michigan hasn’t changed one bit from my 2020 campaign, but something has changed: Michigan’s 3rd District. An independent commission redrew the district, and it’s now rated as a PURE toss-up according to The Cook Political Report – meaning we can and will flip this seat to expand our Democratic House majority. Folks, don’t get me wrong – this will still be a battleground race. But, with hard work and a strong grassroots team, I know we’ll be able to win this thing! = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s get to work! Peter, Marge is wasting her time in Congress by encouraging infighting in her own party.

In a long line of comments about the GOP, Marge wrote an inflammatory Op-Ed directed not only at her own party but many of her ultra-conservative buddies. This attack on her own party shows once again that she’s too busy with DC politics to pay attention.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41537098/329245857/-804235033?refcode=em0207&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhhYTgzNS02Yjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KARy21NbIak9Wzi0KjYESl2rlbHajsiX6A_IajacoHM=)

In this Op-Ed, Marge points fingers at Karl Rove, Mitch McConnell, and others in a point to say that the Republican Party’s problem is not her – it's them.

**Well there's one thing we know for sure: Marge is the problem when it comes to getting things done in GA-14.** While she focuses on bashing the FDA, fighting for nationalism, and telling consultants of her own party to screw off, we are focusing on the kitchen tables issues.

Team Holly is dedicated to fighting for the people of GA-14. We don't need this trumped up rhetoric. We need affordable childcare, accessible rural broadband, and better transportation infrastructure. Marge is wasting her time on Op-Ed’s because she cannot get anything done in Congress.

**[Donate $20 today to help Team Holly solve the real problems.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41537099/329245858/-804235033?refcode=em0207&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhhYTgzNS02Yjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KARy21NbIak9Wzi0KjYESl2rlbHajsiX6A_IajacoHM=)**

Thanks for your support,
Team Holly.

George Soros just invested $125 Million dollars to make our families less safe, our borders less secure, and our country weaker. |
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3d900022248e435baac4e92a9753c923&_e=KC-v4-wpx-DHsbY0nWIcTwCodkZfOeq40sxZKG9Lj_F5eaUkpYPK2-wjeZjWmRBGY7R-TLiKRZNkgk2IM5evI58iNFhi73zaAfq3FQp6Og7mwngQB4ZBzffD1EHcP3tSmBpe36zHpvMV9E2aGuB25Y4YvaTu4xiatvT8J9veRE4iDoE-NRccaL_qQp2u7rV9AfFe-dQ1cCYEaR-W1oofiw06R2cW2oatKPg74reiVSSB23g3cezM3NBX4cXyUm9c5PZUGj-ZIVGW39lGMCx4flFWp_So__dcd-7HBaXICRBgyAvvJKTR46TaQjiEx6XL2A7T4IXirraSGKK18-gp94MvxagFRpbRcLztEXmwgVQKs3oWcqvAdPue0P0S9a0wnjsgwTJhOCx1tKY3key4q4iXCAPzX9jfuoRsfXzwTZo55AjGSu_ijqXPDQB-WkdKEPOXAbtgyoZkTtaCzQVa0UtkzlOk4loH3up7gwxrdHU%3D)

Peter,

**George Soros has spent millions of dollars and many years making our cities less safe.**

His radical left organizations did this in two destructive ways:
* They spent tens of millions of dollars to elect progressive prosecutors, end cash bail, and let crime run wild.
* They helped fund the “Black Lives Matter” organizers and rioters who destroyed and burned our cities.

**Now, Peter, he is working to fundamentally change our government by spending over $125,000,000 to elect radical progressives from coast to coast.**

[**STOP GEORGE SOROS AND THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3d900022248e435baac4e92a9753c923&_e=KC-v4-wpx-DHsbY0nWIcTwCodkZfOeq40sxZKG9Lj_F5eaUkpYPK2-wjeZjWmRBGY7R-TLiKRZNkgk2IM5evI58iNFhi73zaAfq3FQp6Og7mwngQB4ZBzffD1EHcP3tSmBpe36zHpvMV9E2aGuB25Y4YvaTu4xiatvT8J9veRE4iDoE-NRccaL_qQp2u7rV9AfFe-dQ1cCYEaR-W1oofiw06R2cW2oatKPg74reiVSSB23g3cezM3NBX4cXyUm9c5PZUGj-ZIVGW39lGMCx4foJpb1N5NJwTML0MR2juXcTSIMo3CDgHwhkcffYkta7iAdS-WCRpox8ryNggY5HJ9nOxEjGNh1Kb4GAtI0yvkel9U_XlR_GFH5QpJKgP7x7uildaspkru9g-fpDsheMXYQkFEiNnFpuHat36k-xfs8Bi5ZJwDZlz_Ctj0V94_3e0XlaPO1TkgNgx6VxPIBXRnoJjjWK3kK-HJpDcX9Akhzw%3D)
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3d900022248e435baac4e92a9753c923&_e=KC-v4-wpx-DHsbY0nWIcTwCodkZfOeq40sxZKG9Lj_F5eaUkpYPK2-wjeZjWmRBGY7R-TLiKRZNkgk2IM5evI58iNFhi73zaAfq3FQp6Og7mwngQB4ZBzffD1EHcP3tSmBpe36zHpvMV9E2aGuB25Y4YvaTu4xiatvT8J9veRE4iDoE-NRccaL_qQp2u7rV9AfFe-dQ1cCYEaR-W1oofiw06R2cW2oatKPg74reiVSSB23g3cezM3NBX4cXyUm9c5PZUGj-ZIVGW39lGMCx4fgiWt7OI7lZ7a1-c0ylmDgi5PeZMe4GTg4n0fXWVMf033ECOUUfh2qMfSK-1mh32SQtgfW1IpAR51RqM064qGl4ZP_UTpGuzJ2__yOSxH2w4j-PudMZ3KgTtnzgsXKuEP_-xd-L_LAgpWHfJmbAerIb430LwACKMEKvfdZ7rT-ZCMig71R6YMDWyRV8wejiQSMBshyvbNGuldEcIA471TY4%3D)

Peter, if they succeed, our country will be run by the most radical wing of the Democrat Party.

Our district is one of the most competitive in the country, and Soros and his allies will be pouring untold sums of money to try to stop our conservative campaign. We may not have coastal billionaires on our side, but we have something better: Thousands of grassroots patriots like you, Peter, across the country.

[**STOP GEORGE SOROS AND THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3d900022248e435baac4e92a9753c923&_e=KC-v4-wpx-DHsbY0nWIcTwCodkZfOeq40sxZKG9Lj_F5eaUkpYPK2-wjeZjWmRBGY7R-TLiKRZNkgk2IM5evI58iNFhi73zaAfq3FQp6Og7mwngQB4ZBzffD1EHcP3tSmBpe36zHpvMV9E2aGuB25Y4YvaTu4xiatvT8J9veRE4iDoE-NRccaL_qQp2u7rV9AfFe-dQ1cCYEaR-W1oofiw06R2cW2oatKPg74reiVSSB23g3cezM3NBX4cXyUm9c5PZUGj-ZIVGW39lGMCx4fuRU0WvvEHxBs9QCDTA0mbL-sLmEtIqg9oD9FiTq4-LKuj5EAWzjHa40TgxZ1xRONgkoCyduU47HUfcXoOSsXQLJ-xNVvWfCDUInzvHxXt2Qcr8lwTjhvaYdwfpOw6UhcRrT4r7qVN86yiO8HrrFRd_iyr1BEHcgBLbh5MeE21LLhhWb9Xuj6zppeRt6CtAVgCjSaZqhOwDrVadP6HjdzQQ%3D)
**[Peter, will you chip in $50, $25, $10, or anything you can to help us fight back against these radical left wing organizations which are undermining our election?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3d900022248e435baac4e92a9753c923&_e=KC-v4-wpx-DHsbY0nWIcTwCodkZfOeq40sxZKG9Lj_F5eaUkpYPK2-wjeZjWmRBGY7R-TLiKRZNkgk2IM5evI58iNFhi73zaAfq3FQp6Og7mwngQB4ZBzffD1EHcP3tSmBpe36zHpvMV9E2aGuB25Y4YvaTu4xiatvT8J9veRE4iDoE-NRccaL_qQp2u7rV9AfFe-dQ1cCYEaR-W1oofiw06R2cW2oatKPg74reiVSSB23g3cezM3NBX4cXyUm9c5PZUGj-ZIVGW39lGMCx4fq6cJ0g7LtmhuUV42TtFc5sn0a0aQOVN-a9qA44BXOn6w69n6CX2Ns8QheyHQ4VRTKF6GKqJyd_HcSv_RKVg75m9sCuOpq9ahe7F_UPZEfhCB1Qhjch2hGSrcLn-FSPz5hoQEMU9LRxyC3AMVa-rdMM1dfAsuL7HORmV43nIpFx_9EZv8JlWHVwZ-102lkUd1CB6Ifis4mqAd1oQZZT0aqk%3D)**

If we fail now, our country as we know it will be lost forever.

[**STOP GEORGE SOROS AND THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3d900022248e435baac4e92a9753c923&_e=KC-v4-wpx-DHsbY0nWIcTwCodkZfOeq40sxZKG9Lj_F5eaUkpYPK2-wjeZjWmRBGY7R-TLiKRZNkgk2IM5evI58iNFhi73zaAfq3FQp6Og7mwngQB4ZBzffD1EHcP3tSmBpe36zHpvMV9E2aGuB25Y4YvaTu4xiatvT8J9veRE4iDoE-NRccaL_qQp2u7rV9AfFe-dQ1cCYEaR-W1oofiw06R2cW2oatKPg74reiVSSB23g3cezM3NBX4cXyUm9c5PZUGj-ZIVGW39lGMCx4flLayx7PqZNGFIkCfHGk80R2krrlds9iaq6Qg8OW0QCZFt-wV3KmglE-l6kd9fn4TKxzwpHQ11VaQcgdzu8mt1Uv1iIWkW9FUV2Gk7sW8PPgYAE6WlyVJxLKhs791atam_PsjBEzKnFxvrdqRJcvNuxqmC8rhW9n9l5xX_GQG1mOZMsIempyilV-KYqK83c1kiVCiNbddz2pnBR2FUEo1ic%3D)
Thank you,
Alex Stovall

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Persist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Mitch McConnell tried to shut me up, but I kept at it. Today, I’m reflecting on that moment | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41537439/329247121/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3K_PER_E_20220107_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGIyZTg4Zi02ZDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gx0aw4em7jPHqA5gA7Zd4IOGDVHaj3UvsjhSJTvb1bk=&emci=c96fa486-6d88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f8b2e88f-6d88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=9027908)
---
Five years ago today, I read Coretta Scott King’s letter on the Senate floor. Mitch McConnell tried to shut me up, but I kept at it. Today, I’m reflecting on that moment, what it became, and what a whole lot of powerful, loud “persisting” can get done. In the years after Trump was elected, you rose up, you found your voices, and then __ you refused to be silenced, too. Your persistence paid off. We got Trump out of office, flipped the House and the Senate, elected progressive women and people of color up and down the ballot, and passed historic, life-changing legislation: $1.9 trillion in pandemic aid, a child tax credit that lifted 3 million kids out of poverty, and a $1.2 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill that will be transformative for communities across the country. Still, we’ve faced tough losses, and have even tougher fights ahead of us: voting rights, child care, student loan cancelation, and climate change legislation — plus, critical races in the 2022 midterms. But if we’ve learned anything over the past five years, it’s that these wins don’t come easy. And I’m not stopping any time soon. Which brings me back to where it all started: the words of Coretta Scott King — even more relevant today, as we face countless attacks to our democracy: “Free exercise of voting rights is so fundamental to American democracy that we cannot tolerate any form of infringement of those rights. Of all the groups who have been disenfranchised in our nation’s history, none has struggled longer or suffered more in the attempt to win the vote than black citizens. No group has had access to the ballot box denied so persistently and intently...If we are going to make our timeless dream of justice through democracy a reality, we must take every step possible to ensure that the spirit and intent of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 and the 15th Amendment to the Constitution is honored.” I’m still carrying these words with me, especially after all 50 Republican Senators lined up against the voting rights legislation that Democrats brought to the Senate floor. Here’s the thing: we may have lost, but that fight was still worth having, because every single Republican senator is now on the record opposing widely popular legislation to protect free and fair elections. We will make sure everyone knows what they just did, and we’ll be holding them accountable. So tomorrow, and the next day, and the day after that, we get right back up and get right back in the fight — to defend our democracy, cancel student loan debt, enact real climate change reform, get families the affordable child care they need, and elect progressives in 2022. Thank you for persisting alongside me all these years. clean_body: Mitch McConnell tried to shut me up, but I kept at it. Today, I’m reflecting on that moment | | | Five years ago today, I read Coretta Scott King’s letter on the Senate floor. Mitch McConnell tried to shut me up, but I kept at it. Today, I’m reflecting on that moment, what it became, and what a whole lot of powerful, loud “persisting” can get done. In the years after Trump was elected, you rose up, you found your voices, and then you refused to be silenced, too. Your persistence paid off. We got Trump out of office, flipped the House and the Senate, elected progressive women and people of color up and down the ballot, and passed historic, life-changing legislation: $1.9 trillion in pandemic aid, a child tax credit that lifted 3 million kids out of poverty, and a $1.2 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill that will be transformative for communities across the country. Still, we’ve faced tough losses, and have even tougher fights ahead of us: voting rights, child care, student loan cancelation, and climate change legislation — plus, critical races in the 2022 midterms. But if we’ve learned anything over the past five years, it’s that these wins don’t come easy. And I’m not stopping any time soon. Which brings me back to where it all started: the words of Coretta Scott King — even more relevant today, as we face countless attacks to our democracy: “Free exercise of voting rights is so fundamental to American democracy that we cannot tolerate any form of infringement of those rights. Of all the groups who have been disenfranchised in our nation’s history, none has struggled longer or suffered more in the attempt to win the vote than black citizens. No group has had access to the ballot box denied so persistently and intently...If we are going to make our timeless dream of justice through democracy a reality, we must take every step possible to ensure that the spirit and intent of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 and the 15th Amendment to the Constitution is honored.” I’m still carrying these words with me, especially after all 50 Republican Senators lined up against the voting rights legislation that Democrats brought to the Senate floor. Here’s the thing: we may have lost, but that fight was still worth having, because every single Republican senator is now on the record opposing widely popular legislation to protect free and fair elections. We will make sure everyone knows what they just did, and we’ll be holding them accountable. So tomorrow, and the next day, and the day after that, we get right back up and get right back in the fight — to defend our democracy, cancel student loan debt, enact real climate change reform, get families the affordable child care they need, and elect progressives in 2022. Thank you for persisting alongside me all these years. Elizabeth | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: 🚨 UPDATE: illegal maps signed into law
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Governor Bill Lee has signed the Republicans' ILLEGAL maps into law, which means we are taking them to court.

North Carolina and Ohio have been able to successfully overturn their Republican legislatures' gerrymandered district lines, and that's what we are planning on doing here in Tennessee, Peter. These maps suppress Tennesseeans, stripping tens of thousands of their voice in Congress and in our State Legislature — rigging the system for themselves for the next decade.
The Republicans' gerrymandering is so shocking that The Guardian [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/ng-interactive/2022/jan/25/nashville-tennessee-gerrymandering-congress-republicans] called their district lines "a masterclass in election rigging."

A lawsuit is our only recourse in the fight to maintain democracy in Tennessee. Tennessee Democrats don't give up, and we are going to give it our all in court against the power hungry Republicans who continue to rig the system in their favor.

We have to win — can I count on you to chip in now to help us mount a successful lawsuit against them?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I've been thinking a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter: These past couple of weeks, I've been thinking a lot about Sens. Sinema and Manchin's infuriating decision to block voting rights legislation and uphold the filibuster. I am deeply frustrated and disappointed by their actions – but truthfully, this goes much deeper than either of them.
**Let's be honest with ourselves here: The Senate is broken, plain and simple.** When I served in the House, I watched as countless bipartisan bills that would move our country forward died in the McConnell-led Senate time and time again. Now, Democrats technically have control, but the GOP is actively exploiting the filibuster to block legislation that would protect our most fundamental, cherished right – the right to vote.
Republicans have made it abundantly clear that they'd rather cling to power than work with Democrats to defend the rights of the American people or fight for working families – and that's the line in the sand for me.
**When people in power stop working to better the lives of the constituents who elected them, and instead focus only on their political fortunes, that's when we know it's time for change – and that starts with electing new leaders.**
I'm sick and tired of having our entire Democratic agenda blocked by far-right extremists like my opponent Sen. Grassley (R-IA). **But now that Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings, we've got a real chance to change things and expand our Senate majority by electing me right here in Iowa.**
**Peter, you have my word: Send me to the Senate, and I will vote to get rid of the filibuster.** I'll fight tooth and nail to protect voting rights, raise the federal minimum wage and pass the PRO Act in order to strengthen workers' rights and our unions.
**I'm doing everything within my power to defeat Sen. Grassley and move our country forward, I just need you with me. [So please, can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority and pass critical legislation to move our country forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41537599/329248032/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk669-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2ViOWM5Mi02ZTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z1LfPLJEPXM5CC9e23LsKIN9hesQAxqdQO11a_hYlYg=)**
I know that pushing for change and going up against people like Sen. Grassley can be frustrating and hard, so thank you so much for standing with me and fighting today.

clean_body: | | | Peter: These past couple of weeks, I've been thinking a lot about Sens. Sinema and Manchin's infuriating decision to block voting rights legislation and uphold the filibuster. I am deeply frustrated and disappointed by their actions – but truthfully, this goes much deeper than either of them. Let's be honest with ourselves here: The Senate is broken, plain and simple. When I served in the House, I watched as countless bipartisan bills that would move our country forward died in the McConnell-led Senate time and time again. Now, Democrats technically have control, but the GOP is actively exploiting the filibuster to block legislation that would protect our most fundamental, cherished right – the right to vote. Republicans have made it abundantly clear that they'd rather cling to power than work with Democrats to defend the rights of the American people or fight for working families – and that's the line in the sand for me. When people in power stop working to better the lives of the constituents who elected them, and instead focus only on their political fortunes, that's when we know it's time for change – and that starts with electing new leaders. I'm sick and tired of having our entire Democratic agenda blocked by far-right extremists like my opponent Sen. Grassley (R-IA). But now that Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings, we've got a real chance to change things and expand our Senate majority by electing me right here in Iowa. Peter, you have my word: Send me to the Senate, and I will vote to get rid of the filibuster. I'll fight tooth and nail to protect voting rights, raise the federal minimum wage and pass the PRO Act in order to strengthen workers' rights and our unions. I'm doing everything within my power to defeat Sen. Grassley and move our country forward, I just need you with me. = I know that pushing for change and going up against people like Sen. Grassley can be frustrating and hard, so thank you so much for standing with me and fighting today. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. name: Tobias Read
subject: This is a huge win for Oregon 🌲
body:
I was glad to see that The Oregonian agrees that the plan for Elliott State Forest negotiated by a diverse group of stakeholders and the State Land Board is “a win for Oregon.”
---
| | Dear Peter, Did you see yesterday’s newspaper editorial? I was glad to see that **[_The Oregonian_ agrees that the plan for Elliott State Forest](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41537792/329248646/449511699?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmUwNzhhMy02Zjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=judrYcpk6NKauoGuzJ95OX9eiHrwLoSxLwbwAiBoB1c=&emci=15e078a3-6f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=16e078a3-6f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=30662126)** negotiated by a diverse group of stakeholders and the State Land Board is “a win for Oregon.” The plan before the legislature represents three years of hard work by a dedicated group, and I’m honored to be a part of it. Three years ago the Governor, the late Secretary of State Dennis Richardson, and I were discussing the future of the forest after a sale fell through, and I suggested we look at creating a research forest. We brought together a group of interested parties, local governments, tribal representatives, timber and industry groups, researchers, conservation organizations, and more, and asked them if a plan that met all of their needs was even possible. **It turns out that Oregonians can come together around a shared goal to get things done.** _The Oregonian_ wrote that this “legislation is an impressive example and reminder that wide scale collaboration and compromise is possible, even in our deeply divided state.” This finely tuned plan lays out rules for timber cutting, conservation, and establishes the second largest research forest in the United States. Research on issues like logging, wildfires, carbon, and wildlife management will inform our policymaking for decades to come. This can be a model for how we can take on other tough issues in the future. But we need the legislature to pass this legislation into law. It’s supported by a wide array of interests, and I’m proud to have been a part of this great group. Please **[contact your legislators](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41537793/329248647/-1784039525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmUwNzhhMy02Zjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=judrYcpk6NKauoGuzJ95OX9eiHrwLoSxLwbwAiBoB1c=&emci=15e078a3-6f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=16e078a3-6f88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=30662126)** and ask them to pass the Elliott State Forest plan. Stay safe,

---

---

* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zama=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Zama Shines at State Party Meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zama for PA
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/abac30e64df5/tune-in-for-tonights-debate-6756058?e=fe97fe84cf)
---
| |
---
| | [ ](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=373cd4410e&e=fe97fe84cf)
---
On Friday night, I participated in a gubernatorial candidate forum at the Republican State Committee's Winter Meeting in Lancaster. The Winter Meeting is where the state committee members would normally vote on a candidate to endorse in our statewide elections. Endorsement carries with it financial and organizational support from the party that gives the chosen candidate an advantage over other candidates in the field. However, this year, the committee voted not to endorse candidates. As an outsider who has never been involved in politics before, this was a huge win for my candidacy. Traditionally, candidates who win endorsement have a long history of involvement in party politics. Many of my fellow candidates have had long-term associations with members of the state committee going back years or even decades; whereas, I entered this race less than a year ago not knowing anyone in the party. Yet, through a lot of hardwork, I ended up one of only 3 candidates who won a caucus straw poll and one of only 4 who received votes in all 6 caucus straw polls.
| [ ](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=95d27d0cff&e=fe97fe84cf)
---
Our next step is to get on the ballot. We need to collect over 2,000 signatures of registered Republicans across PA in order to get on the ballot. We also need to have a minimum of 100 signatures from 10 different counties. Petition circulation period was scheduled to begin on Tuesday, February 15th and run for 3 weeks; however, there is currently talk of those dates being postponed. In the meantime, we continue to recruit volunteers to collect those signatures and we need your help. If you have not yet signed up to circulate petitions, please do so using this link **[HERE](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=c4f105ed75&e=fe97fe84cf)**

name: Team Pelosi
subject: Speaker Pelosi’s Weekly Grassroots Volunteer Update: Power and Diplomacy, Tues. Feb. 8th at 8 PM ET / 5 PM PT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,
Join me tomorrow evening, Tuesday, February 8th at 8:00PM ET / 5:00 PM PT, when I am hosting our Weekly Grassroots Volunteers Update.
My Special Guest will be Congressman Gregory Meeks, the Chair of the House Foreign Affairs Committee, a key leader in efforts to help our workers outcompete the world and to advocate for a rigorous diplomatic resolution to the situation in Ukraine.
I look forward to our conversation on the day’s news and on his insights about America’s role on the global stage as the world deals with threats and the ongoing impacts of the pandemic. Chairman Meeks, who represents New York’s 5th District, is also a member of the Congressional Black Caucus.
Register here:
https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/8816442537835/WN_7WO_0KuLTX6x1Q1vCsw48Q [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/8816442537835/WN_7WO_0KuLTX6x1Q1vCsw48Q]
https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/8816442537835/WN_7WO_0KuLTX6x1Q1vCsw48Q [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/8816442537835/WN_7WO_0KuLTX6x1Q1vCsw48Q]
Thank you all for what you are doing every day to protect our Democratic House Majority and to protect our Democracy! You are essential to the success that we have achieved and will continue to achieve For The People.
Warmest regards,
NANCY
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. Friend,

I’m losing to this crazy, leftist opponent of mine, and I need your help.

**_Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen:_**

* Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate

* The Socialist Left will have a Senate Majority and will defund the police, destroy our borders, and create chaos in our communities

* Nationwide draconian mandates will be passed because there will be nobody in Washington Left to stand up to the Left and tell it how it is

body:
Help our campaign raise over $1,000 in a contest from the good folks at Blue America PAC. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41537950/329249359/-1122995658?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220118DSAendor_TM_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2JkYjVlOC03MDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j2hvgwp3ArmzsYQz1KvNiktVcvboxORmsFezW1JYJCo=)
---
friend!
The good folks at Blue America PAC have been Godssends to our movement here in Orange County. Howie knows how much help we need to fight the corporate-backed candidates - and he also has a rich history of working in the music industry. So he set up the coolest contest.
What's the contest? **For the next 7 days, up until Valentine's Day at 12PM PT, _any donation_ to the link below will be split evenly among all of Blue America's endorsed candidates**. Here's the best part: the candidate with the most donations _in their name_ **gets a $1,000 check from the PAC.** And **every contributer has a chance to win** a [signed copy of this book and the accompanying CD. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41537951/329249360/-455845975?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2JkYjVlOC03MDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j2hvgwp3ArmzsYQz1KvNiktVcvboxORmsFezW1JYJCo=&emci=e8020e9b-6c88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=ccbdb5e8-7088-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=12523946)
So why should you contribute a few bucks in my name? I've told you how much we need your help to fund staff, resources for canvassers, and so much more. But this contest is different. All the endorsed candidates have shared their favorite musical artists. I had so many to pick from, but this race has me thinking of why I'm fighting so hard: family.
I came to love **Pink Floyd** because of the song _“Wish You Were Here.”_ My older brother had fallen into severe drug abuse and by the time I was 15 years old I realized he would never be the same. His mind was so far gone that I had to begin to mourn the loss of the big brother I had grown up with. The brother that helped me become the man I am today.
Pink Floyd’s music helped me through these times and allowed me to heal so I could step up as the youngest child to help my parents. Just hearing that opening guitar riff still brings out deep emotions for me.
This contest really feels like it's all coming full circle. If you know the feeling, check out the contest and throw a few bucks in the pot - it doesn't have to be much - a small donation can help a lot here.
[Click here to donate and vote for the Mike Ortega campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41537952/329249361/-607625211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2JkYjVlOC03MDg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j2hvgwp3ArmzsYQz1KvNiktVcvboxORmsFezW1JYJCo=)
In Solidarity/En Solidaridad,
Mike Ortega

| Our campaign is fueled by everyday people like you chipping in whatever they can. name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Roy Cooper and Cheri are counting on you to help us flip NC
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
“Cheri Beasley is the right person at the right time”

Did you see Roy Cooper’s note below personally asking you to support Cheri Beasley?
Roy said “Cheri Beasley is the right person at the right time” to be North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator. He knows what it takes to win statewide in North Carolina, and that’s why he believes in Cheri and our movement to get the job done together in November.
[**Roy and Cheri are counting on you to play a role in this campaign. Will you please contribute $3 today to help flip North Carolina’s Senate seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22/?refcode=em220207-1-ma&refcode2=371.357359.F_wQlF&t=1&akid=371%2E357359%2EF_wQlF)
Thank you!
\- Team Beasley
* * *
#
Hey team -
I enthusiastically endorsed Cheri Beasley. There is no one more prepared to flip this seat and do the hard work of representing North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.
As someone who knows what it takes to win, I can tell you Cheri’s got it. She’s honest and trustworthy and will always put in the hard work to fight for the people of North Carolina.
[**I’m personally asking you to join me in supporting Cheri by making a $3 contribution to her campaign today. Her general election is starting now, and it is going to take a lot of grassroots support to compete with Republicans’ dark money attacks.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22/?refcode=em220207-1-ma&refcode2=371.357359.F_wQlF&t=2&akid=371%2E357359%2EF_wQlF)
When I appointed Cheri Beasley to be the Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court, I said she was the right person at the right time. That is even more true today.
Cheri Beasley is the right person at the right time to be North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator.
As a judge, Cheri’s shown her independence and commitment to justice. As a mother, she understands the concerns of parents and families. And as a woman of faith, she believes in public service and working to ensure no North Carolinians are left behind.
Cheri understands that the status quo is not working for our families. She will fight to make desperately needed progress in the Senate — on health care, education, climate change, and so much more.
[**Will you please donate $3 or whatever you can to help us send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate? This is one of the most competitive and important races anywhere in the country in 2022, but if we have Cheri’s back, we can win North Carolina — trust me on that.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22/?refcode=em220207-1-ma&refcode2=371.357359.F_wQlF&t=3&akid=371%2E357359%2EF_wQlF)
This is a historic moment for our great state, and I’m grateful for anything you can spare to help us turn this Senate seat blue.
\- Roy Cooper
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220207-1-ma&refcode2=371.357359.F_wQlF&t=4&akid=371%2E357359%2EF_wQlF)

clean_body: “Cheri Beasley is the right person at the right time” Did you see Roy Cooper’s note below personally asking you to support Cheri Beasley? Roy said “Cheri Beasley is the right person at the right time” to be North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator. He knows what it takes to win statewide in North Carolina, and that’s why he believes in Cheri and our movement to get the job done together in November. Thank you! \- Team Beasley Hey team - I enthusiastically endorsed Cheri Beasley. There is no one more prepared to flip this seat and do the hard work of representing North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. As someone who knows what it takes to win, I can tell you Cheri’s got it. She’s honest and trustworthy and will always put in the hard work to fight for the people of North Carolina. When I appointed Cheri Beasley to be the Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court, I said she was the right person at the right time. That is even more true today. Cheri Beasley is the right person at the right time to be North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator. As a judge, Cheri’s shown her independence and commitment to justice. As a mother, she understands the concerns of parents and families. And as a woman of faith, she believes in public service and working to ensure no North Carolinians are left behind. Cheri understands that the status quo is not working for our families. She will fight to make desperately needed progress in the Senate — on health care, education, climate change, and so much more. This is a historic moment for our great state, and I’m grateful for anything you can spare to help us turn this Senate seat blue. \- Roy Cooper ** Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611

name: PragerU
subject: Biased fact-checker strikes PragerU
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD
body:
Is this the America you want to live in?

| | |
---
[Unsubscribe](https://for.az.kelliward.com/unsubscribe.php?M=22208987&C=04032ac65d70499c58422a6a52349eb2&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=1040&N=146696&AGENCY=PMI) | [View in browser](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79224&F=H&drurl=aHR0cDovL2tlbGxpd2FyZC5jb20vZW1haWwtbGV0dGVycy9rdy1yZXYtYm0tcHJhZ2VydS0yMDIyLTAyLTA3)

|
--- ](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79225&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8zNTU5NjcvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ/Y19zcmM9V1JEMjU1NTg=) |
---
| | [](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79225&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8zNTU5NjcvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ/Y19zcmM9V1JEMjU1NTg=) [](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79225&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8zNTU5NjcvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ/Y19zcmM9V1JEMjU1NTg=) Dear PragerU Supporter, Big Tech’s campaign to silence PragerU never sleeps. Recently, video hosting company JW Player refused to renew our contract to host videos—on PragerU’s own website! Later, we found out who was responsible for JW Player dropping PragerU as a client...online “fact-checker” NewsGuard. NewsGuard calls itself “The Internet Trust Tool.” It supposedly rates news websites for credibility and transparency. Even though PragerU is an educational nonprofit—not a news website—NewsGuard rated us anyway! [Give Today to Help STOP Fact-Checkers from Censoring PragerU!](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79225&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8zNTU5NjcvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ/Y19zcmM9V1JEMjU1NTg=) [**Donate to help PragerU fight Big Tech censorship!**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79225&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8zNTU5NjcvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ/Y19zcmM9V1JEMjU1NTg=) **PragerU’s scorecard (57 points out of 100) warning viewers to “proceed with caution”:** [](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79225&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8zNTU5NjcvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ/Y19zcmM9V1JEMjU1NTg=) Corporations, social media companies—even libraries—handsomely pay these third-party online nannies to label anything the left disagrees with as “fake news.” Hiding behind fact-checkers, they then deplatform or censor organizations like PragerU...taking zero responsibility for censorship! Upon learning of our abysmal rating that led to JW Player dropping PragerU as a client, PragerU CEO Marissa Streit contacted NewsGuard. **_"I am writing today to bring your attention to an urgent matter that I assume is a mistake by NewsGuard. Sadly, this mistake is damaging PragerU's reputation and costing our nonprofit millions of dollars."_ ** **—Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO** Marissa spoke with NewsGuard executive Eric Effron. He assured her that NewsGuard is unbiased and protects Americans from disinformation. Curiously, Eric didn’t seem to know much about PragerU (even though NewsGuard had already given us a bad rating). Over the next month, NewsGuard asked PragerU questions under the guise of improving our score. NewsGuard inquired about everything from why we don’t publish our donors’ names (which we would NEVER do) to our perspectives on COVID-19 and Planned Parenthood. Regardless of the facts and sources PragerU provided, our score wasn’t changed. They never intended to be fair. Clearly, NewsGuard simply thinks our values and ideas shouldn’t exist online. **_"The chain of emails we've exchanged with you and your team has exposed your organization for what it is—an online media bully run by wealthy left-wing activists pushing their agenda."_** **—Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO** This reality is...fact-checkers like NewsGuard are the political elite’s tool for censorship. Funded by giant corporations protecting their power and bottom lines, these self-appointed “Arbiters of Truth” are determining what is true and what is false. **Is this the America you want to live in? ** [**Donate to help PragerU fight Big Tech censorship!**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79225&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8zNTU5NjcvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ/Y19zcmM9V1JEMjU1NTg=) **PragerU is exposing NewsGuard and other fact-checkers for what they are...authoritarian oligarchs who monetized censorship to keep YOU from learning the facts and thinking for YOURSELF. ** PragerU needs your support to educate millions of young people about what’s really at stake—Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. At the same time, PragerU must diversify our platforms and develop alternative technologies to ensure Big Tech tyrants can’t silence patriotic voices. This is a time consuming and expensive endeavor! We need our loyal supporters to stand by us and give generously. We cannot do this alone. [Please give today to keep our videos reaching and changing millions of young minds!](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79225&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8zNTU5NjcvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ/Y19zcmM9V1JEMjU1NTg=) Your PragerU Team [**Donate now**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146696&L=79225&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vZ2l2ZS8zNTU5NjcvIyEvZG9uYXRpb24vY2hlY2tvdXQ/Y19zcmM9V1JEMjU1NTg=) | |

Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

_\-- Cleveland.com_

subject: Crazy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | When I decided to run for Congress in 2019 as an unapologetic progressive, people said I was crazy.
_“Medicare for All? A Green New Deal? This is Queens and Long Island! A progressive can’t win!”_
**Spoiler Alert: A progressive not only can, but will, win.**
******[But we can’t do it without your help. Please contribute to our campaign today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8KZ0olYvXukxel9TQ1S1eTPoTjZC51eNZqI7Z3xbGbS6DEfbNQWkUBfyh6aXg9rlVlckjCgsi5jc2JZPrrKBsstsUO-U5baKdYwpls6mphIvzajzP0k-m3Jqpehx1GOch02sefe_IN7KX94UGB-aUVrluFdsNB-y6wzqdo5TbDKZVzKHoOyYzSrV471duJ726K3yDuyJBL6uUlvCzXHwmzy3xXb7jVaVt06rVrCJA8Nw/3jd/5pW07lq3T6uvgGC3dSPq9Q/h0/NEk5Lym3OFJBkHfiiRQmwEvHXIVrh-nLjAXEMPZ3kI4)**
In 2020, we put in the work. We met people where they were at and took the time to educate. We built coalitions, organized communities and mobilized hundreds of volunteers to not only get our message - but the message of the progressive movement - out.
It worked!
**We secured 14,229 votes.** In 2020, we were able to get just under 30% of the vote in a three-way race, while being outspent 9-1 by an incumbent with the full power of the establishment behind him.
**This time?** There is no incumbent and it is a crowded field — this means we can win a plurality with **_less_** votes than we had the last time.
Many of the candidates are building off our hard work and running on the progressive platform we organized on.
Do you know why? **Because a progressive can and will win.**
I do not come from generational wealth. I’m not funded by lobbyists or billionaire donor networks. I do not have the backing of the entrenched political establishment. What I have is the trust of my community, the activists I’ve fought alongside, and the organizers I’ve worked with to bring about positive change.
Every endorsement I’ve received— I’ve earned. Every dollar we raise— is grassroots. Every vote we get— we worked for.
**There are no shortcuts when you’re fighting to change a system designed to keep you out.**
We will finish what we started, and with a 3 year head start, we will be victorious.
**[Please donate today and support our fight for the progressive policies our communities need.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8KZ0olYvXukxel9TQ1S1eT-6GNQNITuz1NRM2eG3--mZM8ExSCdjm5z84KUpqO3LPfxXS0LomY2OSbqnoBiN02jIFTeEPkb0zCK5HHjuZiQEWcM3mSq1ac5cIOqAEFZwK6GrFySktsepuOteqUkmFWDcrkXqG7Ks-HiYbEollcAvlroBDwimjJgU8k2SXAx16RyqzFO12RzPymWfKm1ONImy8vrTGJR7CTj58GXN57SA/3jd/5pW07lq3T6uvgGC3dSPq9Q/h1/Y3bcnY-U1kg_AmCd5UV40BxvmbKj8mtEl69MwTpYAOc)**
Thank you for building with me.
— Melanie D’Arrigo
**Proudly endorsed by:** Indivisible, National Organization for Women, New York Progressive Action Network, Blue America, Matriarch, Progressive Women of New York, Empire State Indivisible, No IDC, NY, Long Island Activists, Brand New Congress, Moms in Office, Her Bold Move and South Shore Democrats.

subject: Trump’s strongest allies have officially stepped up their involvement in this race.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Sandy Smith just received the endorsement of Roger Stone — another
Trumpist and proud supporter of the January 6th insurrection, who narrowly
avoided 40 months in prison for false statements and witness tampering due
to a Trump pardon.

Trump’s strongest allies have officially stepped up their involvement in
this race.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39184?t=1001&akid=857%2E3698%2EqGfAdp ]Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign right now
to help Erica defeat her extreme GOP opponent who’s trying to flip this
seat red?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39190?refcode=em20220207-857&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=857%2E3698%2EqGfAdp ]Donate $5

Here’s how Roger Stone describes Sandy Smith:

“Sandy Smith is the only candidate who has pushed for a forensic audit of
the 2020 election, is pro-Trump, pro-life, and supports an immigration
moratorium to protect North Carolina jobs.”

And that’s exactly why we have to do everything we can to keep her out of
office.

As we wait for the new district lines to be drawn, we can’t waste a moment
to build a campaign powerful enough to defeat Sandy Smith and protect this
historically Democratic district from Republican seat-stealing attempts.

If Sandy Smith wins this seat she would be an immediate threat to our
razor-thin Democratic majority and progressive legislation like a higher
minimum wage, a humane immigration system, reproductive justice, and
universal healthcare.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39184?t=1021&akid=857%2E3698%2EqGfAdp ]If you’re able, please rush a donation of $5 to our
campaign right now to help Erica bring real progressive change to working
families across NC-02 and protect our proudly blue district.

Together,

Erica Smith HQ

name: Val Demings (Personal)
subject: I'm never giving up on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'll do everything in my power to expand our Senate majority and pass the voting rights legislation named in honor of John Lewis.
| | |
---
Friend – the other day, my staff asked me how I'm always so optimistic in the face of so many obstacles. Here's what I said:
When my late friend John Lewis led the march for voting rights from Selma to Montgomery, he reached the top of the Edmund Pettus Bridge and knew there were state troopers waiting to beat him with clubs at the bottom.
But he boldly walked right across that bridge, resolute even in the face of danger, because he was looking past the pain of the present moment and straight toward the future.
**Every day, I put that lesson of perseverance and optimism to good use in order to not lose hope. **
There's no question that we're at another inflection point for our democracy and voting rights. States across the country are trying to keep Black and brown voters from reaching the ballot box – and we just learned that we don't have enough support in the Senate to pass our federal voting rights legislation.
Now, I've heard others voice frustration and despair, and to that I say: If John Lewis could put his body on the line to advocate for voting rights, we can't get discouraged because two senators and the filibuster are standing in our way today.
I'm never giving up my hope. I promise that I will _never tire_ of fighting for voting rights. I'll do everything in my power to expand our Senate majority and pass the voting rights legislation named in honor of John Lewis.
If you're with me, will you help me become the 50th vote we need to finally achieve John Lewis' vision of an American democracy that we can all participate in?

Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41538982/329265511/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2271-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJlZjNlZi03Njg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6O3O6GIvWoAPZ6lb9K0wOpUSUcqJEFyDBVP0_uekWyM=)**
Thank you,

Congresswoman Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41538983/329265512/1804727444?recurring=0&refcode=jtk2271-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJlZjNlZi03Njg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6O3O6GIvWoAPZ6lb9K0wOpUSUcqJEFyDBVP0_uekWyM=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. clean_body: I'll do everything in my power to expand our Senate majority and pass the voting rights legislation named in honor of John Lewis. | | | Friend – the other day, my staff asked me how I'm always so optimistic in the face of so many obstacles. Here's what I said: When my late friend John Lewis led the march for voting rights from Selma to Montgomery, he reached the top of the Edmund Pettus Bridge and knew there were state troopers waiting to beat him with clubs at the bottom. But he boldly walked right across that bridge, resolute even in the face of danger, because he was looking past the pain of the present moment and straight toward the future. Every day, I put that lesson of perseverance and optimism to good use in order to not lose hope. There's no question that we're at another inflection point for our democracy and voting rights. States across the country are trying to keep Black and brown voters from reaching the ballot box – and we just learned that we don't have enough support in the Senate to pass our federal voting rights legislation. Now, I've heard others voice frustration and despair, and to that I say: If John Lewis could put his body on the line to advocate for voting rights, we can't get discouraged because two senators and the filibuster are standing in our way today. I'm never giving up my hope. I promise that I will never tire of fighting for voting rights. I'll do everything in my power to expand our Senate majority and pass the voting rights legislation named in honor of John Lewis. If you're with me, will you help me become the 50th vote we need to finally achieve John Lewis' vision of an American democracy that we can all participate in? Here's the best link: = Thank you, Congresswoman Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. name: Team Christy
subject: Let's talk about housing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41539089/329267846/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJjYmY1NS03ODg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWNV2R-G5rLb8zmbZPd8Nvu9tAZuNRik-Dr7VFqr8cI=&emci=90a624fc-7688-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=e0bcbf55-7888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=11385749)

Dear Peter,

When we say how much there is on the line in this election, and why it's so important to get Mike Garcia out, we are talking about the real impact it will have on people's _lives._

Right here in this district, Omicron continues to wreak havoc on daily life. Families are struggling to make ends meet – all while the housing crisis has only gotten much worse. Since the beginning of COVID, housing costs in the Antelope and San Fernando Valley have soared to record prices, forcing families out of their homes and exacerbating an already critical homelessness crisis.

The median home price in San Fernando Valley is at a staggering _$995,000_ , making the dream of owning a home out of reach for so many families.

**The people of this district deserve better.** While Mike Garcia continues to ignore the crisis in our community, Christy is out working for policies that would make the lives of Californians better.

**[We need to flip CA-27 from _red_ to _blue_ so we can finally have a leader like Christy who will address the real issues this district is facing, including housing. >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41539090/329267847/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220207_right-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJjYmY1NS03ODg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWNV2R-G5rLb8zmbZPd8Nvu9tAZuNRik-Dr7VFqr8cI=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41539091/329267848/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220207_right-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJjYmY1NS03ODg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWNV2R-G5rLb8zmbZPd8Nvu9tAZuNRik-Dr7VFqr8cI=) That's why Christy supports Build Back Better, which would allocate billions of dollars for affordable housing, rent, and mortgage assistance. That's why she supports a national strategy to address homelessness. That's why she authored major legislation during her time as a California Assemblywoman to make college affordable, so everyone has the opportunity to succeed.

What has Mike Garcia done? The answer: not much. Nearly nothing.

**We need Christy in Congress.

[Chip in $5 to send Christy to Congress so she can fight for affordable housing and finally bring much needed relief to working Californians. >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41539092/329267849/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220207_right-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJjYmY1NS03ODg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWNV2R-G5rLb8zmbZPd8Nvu9tAZuNRik-Dr7VFqr8cI=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41539093/329267850/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220207_right-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJjYmY1NS03ODg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWNV2R-G5rLb8zmbZPd8Nvu9tAZuNRik-Dr7VFqr8cI=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41539094/329267851/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220207_right-TestB&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJjYmY1NS03ODg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWNV2R-G5rLb8zmbZPd8Nvu9tAZuNRik-Dr7VFqr8cI=) Republicans have shown us time and time again they aren't interested in governing. They care more about appeasing corporate donors than making policies that will help working people.

We need a leader like Christy who will fight for the needs of working Americans with the urgency this crisis requires.

Thank you so much for your support,

Team Christy

Hey Peter.
Last month, the GOP supermajority in Tennessee’s General Assembly made their most breathtaking power grab yet — and Governor Bill Lee just enabled them. (Again.)
The plan that GOP party bosses crafted behind closed doors — that Bill Lee just signed into law — illegally consolidates power in our state. It cracks and packs Black, brown, and minority voters into gerrymandered districts, silencing the voices of hundreds of thousands of Tennesseans.
We need a Governor who will do the right thing and always put people before partisan power grabs, because **“we the people” means we get to decide who is elected — not politicians deciding who their voters are.**
[**Chip in today to help us elect a champion for the people to the governorship in November, one who will always fight to make sure ALL Tennesseans’ voices are heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41531640/329220139/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220207gerryman_M4TN_op_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDlkZGVlZi00Zjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MAOUhqJbNvfq2kQYN-t9Wf7UaWJwcxl_biJ0HajNiag=)

name: Bianca Keaton, Campaign Manager
subject: Plans for this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter, it’s
Bianca, I’m Charles Booker’s Campaign Manager.

This week, we’re kicking off a roadtrip across Kentucky — from the hood to
the holler — to meet voters where they’re at and spread our message for
meaningful, people-first change.

But before we hit the road, it’s important we raise at least $15,000 to
fund expenses like gas, equipment and rally signs.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220207?refcode=em20220207-1539&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1539_346206_05nFxm&akid=1539%2E346206%2E05nFxm ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to our Kentucky
Roadtrip Fund? We’re relying on donations from emails like this so we can
travel across Kentucky and grow our movement to replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220207?refcode=em20220207-1539&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1539_346206_05nFxm&akid=1539%2E346206%2E05nFxm ]Contribute $5

Our success in November hinges on us uniting a widespread coalition of
voters, from the hood to the holler. Traveling across the Commonwealth,
visiting town after town, is the best way we can do that.

Long story short: If we work together this election, we have the power to
send a real working-class advocate to the Senate who will fight for
solutions our families urgently need.

But to be blunt, roadtrips like the one we’re starting next week require a
lot of resources. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220207?refcode=em20220207-1539&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1539_346206_05nFxm&akid=1539%2E346206%2E05nFxm ]That’s why we’re setting a goal to raise $15,000
before we get in the car. Even giving $5 makes a huge difference as we
prepare for our road trip.

Let’s do this,

Bianca
Campaign Manager

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220207-1539-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1539_346206_05nFxm&akid=1539%2E346206%2E05nFxm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1539%2E346206%2E05nFxm

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Traveling across the Commonwealth, visiting town after town, is the best way we can do that. Long story short: If we work together this election, we have the power to send a real working-class advocate to the Senate who will fight for solutions our families urgently need. But to be blunt, roadtrips like the one we’re starting next week require a lot of resources. [ ]That’s why we’re setting a goal to raise $15,000 before we get in the car. Even giving $5 makes a huge difference as we prepare for our road trip. Let’s do this, Bianca Campaign Manager Contribute to Charles Booker:

URGENT NEWS, friend: **Political experts are reporting that Sen. Maggie Hassan's seat in New Hampshire is one of _the most vulnerabl_** _e_** _in the country. _**

McConnell only needs to flip _one_ seat to take back the Senate majority, and he's laser-focused on New Hampshire. That's why he's already spending more than $7 MILLION in attack ads to defeat Maggie Hassan and flip the Senate back to GOP control.

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: re: our supporter survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best defeat the GOP and flip this seat.
#
Hey, Derek, have a minute?
Last week we sent out **[a quick survey](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220207-4496&t=21&akid=4496%2E434096%2EgxzFRN)** , and nearly 1,500 supporters from across Pennsylvania shared their reasons for supporting our campaign.
But we didn’t see a response from you, Derek.
**[Can you spare one minute of your time to share: Why do you support the John Fetterman for Senate campaign?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220207-4496&t=22&akid=4496%2E434096%2EgxzFRN)**
**[Share now»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220207-4496&t=23&akid=4496%2E434096%2EgxzFRN)**
It’s hard to put into words how much your support means to our campaign. And being able to read all your reasons just means that much more. 💛
Thanks, Derek.
--Fetterman HQ
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: JohnFetterman.com
Date: Sat, Feb 5, 2022
Subject: [ANSWER NEEDED] Why do you support our campaign?
To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Derek, as one of our active supporters, John, Gisele, and the rest of our HQ staff were wondering:
**[Why do you support the John Fetterman for Senate campaign?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220207-4496&t=24&akid=4496%2E434096%2EgxzFRN)**
**[Share now»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220207-4496&t=25&akid=4496%2E434096%2EgxzFRN)**
Right now, just over three months away from our primary, is the *perfect* time to share your input with us, Derek.
The more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best defeat the GOP and flip this seat. Plus, Gisele loves hearing about all the reasons why you also love John. ❤️
**[So, will you please take one minute of your time to share why you support our campaign, Derek?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220207-4496&t=26&akid=4496%2E434096%2EgxzFRN)**
**[Share now»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220207-4496&t=27&akid=4496%2E434096%2EgxzFRN)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot.
More soon,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220207-4496-footer&t=28&refcode2=4496_434096_gxzFRN&akid=4496%2E434096%2EgxzFRN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
