name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---

Ron Johnson

clean_body: I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. | | | | Peter, I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future. Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014. As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort. By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration. During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future. Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart. As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win. I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear. In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail. Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win. So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA. | | | "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON" Thank you, Ron Johnson | | | | "RonJon Announcement" | Peter, It’s Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster. This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to SAVE AMERICA from the Democrats. "Please click here to donate now"** | | | "SAVE THE SENATE" | | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 Text RonJon to 47682 for mobile alerts! name: Mo Brooks
subject: Happy MAGA Mo Monday!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Happy MAGA Mo Monday! Only 113 days until Primary Election Day on May 24.

| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=1)
---

| Happy **MAGA Mo Monday** Peter! We're only 106 days from Primary Election Day on May 24th. Make sure you stay up to date with all the latest at [mobrooks.com](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=2). **News of the Week** This week we kicked off the Meet MAGA Mo Townhall Tour in Athens on Saturday. It was a great crowd and they had some really good questions. I can’t wait to have many more townhall events in every corner of the state. We’ll see you in your community soon! **In Case You Missed It** Per an AL.com [article](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=UX7AL6eXV8ccr33EHlIttBUjG8UBlW5B7j5HK8hB1d5gBlKdg8-Ur4ieV2wyyZamzwXYztpGULiXrqOT9NUKDQWoJnuUHUvrDzSMFAm2_-vzkDA_2YyDwNbhwyIVO_bvRXCEVdX7JlKAxKtXwlPBFKO0ajZUdbi_T1j90SUvobk&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=3) published last week, Katie Britt **_finally_** signed and bragged about an online pledge to merely investigate Dr. Anthony Fauci and support legislation cutting his salary to $0, but curiously not to fire him. As politicians often do, Mike Durant criticized Britt for not going far enough... without saying what he would have done differently. I would like to thank my primary opponents for **_finally_** following (but **_still_** lagging behind) my lead concerning Dr. Fauci. I called for Dr. Fauci’s firing more than 8 months ago, like in this press conference in the US Capitol from last June! While Britt and Durant are content being a year late and a dollar short, I have led the way. America needs more fighters in the U.S. Senate. **Last Week** Last week I was in Washington blocking Nancy Pelosi’s radical agenda. I voted “No” on the “America Concedes to China Act.” The nearly 3,000 page bill, among other things, authorizes importing an unlimited number of foreign workers who take jobs from and suppress the wages of struggling American workers and their families. Read more [HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=p4y8-hMqB2NDKgIrhIykDUkrrpM3rtgIZ0h3uHHiEf_3uDbCwSSFPNY8f9PbBpiY8K7rWBZa_vMe3zGfsSV_nCXD3D0T8GqSh7rLuEuebmxevAnJ0EHG4t6ls95fA_v3OXfnAnixmbUygke_BRGh3NpaLdSWj0Jz3UMTs7IJB1GMRpAyw_0c5X1YSNMJ9ipWCM7OEX3UdBS7Tubs7U-f-sC1BGvSFaXe-lj-VnHwPNUT00HLOPvkXCOOxN2Jlw5J&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=4). Since Pelosi refuses to address the Biden Border Crisis in the Capitol, a group of conservative Congressmen called for an off-site hearing, where the national media could hear from expert witnesses about the tragedy occurring at our southern border. **This Week** Next Saturday we will be holding another stop on the Meet MAGA Mo Townhall Tour in Scottsboro. Come out and see us! **In the News** Thank you to WHNT for covering my Athens townhall. Watch their segment [HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=C7poGnyd5qKYOBy3SZ8CmzqDHlfr53Z8QD_jI6Jr2vHXKJ7Y45XwcOdwYir4Ne-CNu9AZbxRaclsSFYM5TwAzdNikko2GqXEnfIpYJ2ehC3mWv9WmrujrhDtK5UIvmKN&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=5). I joined Fox Business to discuss the devastating effects illegal immigration has on the American people, and why the Biden Administration has a duty to protect our southern border from invasion, like President Trump did. Watch the full interview [HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=avQzzHJnGJZEKjm1xE1nNOQEY6gSZ99AcPgfRvxhGZ9WHX69PW_4tRZQ-UAgCHG_UhFoYwgnXYSVtMLJg8xB2g&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=6). **Get Involved** This campaign is powered by you. Conservative grassroots leaders across Alabama are the backbone of this campaign. If you haven't signed up to volunteer, you can do so[ HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG4VT3iyu91onNSLG8ZGGFleveBv8QA-CfxJ-FwPOFlxZ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=7)! If you know someone looking to intern, or if you want to get more involved, email the team at info@mobrooks.com so we can connect. **Pictures of the Week** We had a great townhall in Athens to kick-off the Meet MAGA Mo Townhall Tour! Thank you to the Shoals Republican Club for allowing me to speak to their wonderful group this weekend! Getting ready for my Fox Business TV interview. Speaking to some of the media this week. Be sure to check out all of our posts from last week and be sure to like us, follow us and most importantly SHARE us on[ Facebook](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sJAQfbjrgl12zjz4yECp3EspAYwyHliJnJgvrx2-6Fd&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=8),[ Twitter](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvQpzdP2h-MkR1RgQ68Ld6g&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=9), [GETTR](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=9zp-qDZJxKJVUKiD6t2SH1K76vrY-7l5rg_tQBNbqtJYYnw1cnhvuOyPPsq9Om-8&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=10), and[ Instagram](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73ywFhIE26WWSjD3TNoGUDBzjurmiCr1IGU1y66ajEMFQdM3N4Eq0EkGZlk8wprVldYQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=11). **Endorsement of the Week** “I fully support Mo Brooks in the Republican primary and the general election because I know you will be outstanding.” Have a great week and see you on the trail soon, Mo P.S. The establishment is terrified of me, because I will never work for special interests, I will only work for you. I'm never going to support cheap foreign labor and I don't support open borders, which is why they're doing all they can to stop our campaign. [Can you chip in $10 today to stand up to the open-borders special interest groups who are funding my opponent? ](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-mUEavjjWvnh57s05qGjY8y_a_Ds7Kkn0Mv9gLhQPqQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mmm_2_7_2&n=12)

subject: Join Tiffany Shedd in Tempe on Feb 14th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Help us wish Arizona a Happy Birthday! Friends, In honor of Statehood Day, our campaign is hosting a meet and greet with Tiffany Shedd in Tempe on February 14th to celebrate Arizona’s birthday and we would love to have you join us! The event is FREE to attend and the food, refreshments, and fun are on us. **What:** Arizona Statehood Day Meet & Greet **When:** Monday, February 14th (11am-1pm) **Where:** Tempe, AZ (event location provided upon RSVP) [CLICK HERE TO RSVP NOW](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=1a209c166db64ac1ba68e815e6e36ba2&_e=hNTeyZTpOvvZXG-Z4bYz5aLPn9BuIHvRUWagtwycVEAL97mHljVfUHa6Y7463p2AUJ7-6VpGsKIf_4YHsqyy_c4BZhv465NC4P--15TTbE64kueeEiseylzR0Z0nAN26uo7oM5SzQYNh4zCLSaNoSVgWSjLozXDIbXP1MO6eqVWfY5aqV7NlPEa1hcDlnZbKalahsw2j_MsNFDR0poG6cMNYA2Zj3TVfpYMomImJpocIKwx0mN19137R6mncOfa4UeSFPxOADBRn9fQnedqi5g%3D%3D) The event will feature a special guest appearance from our friends at the Arizona Rangers. Come grab some food, a drink, and learn why Tiffany is the BEST choice for Attorney General. Sincerely, Hattie Stockton Finance Director Tiffany Shedd for Attorney General
P.S. The event is FREE to attend, but donations are graciously accepted at the door or online at [https://secure.winred.com/shedd-for-attorney-general/az-birthday-celebration](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=1a209c166db64ac1ba68e815e6e36ba2&_e=hNTeyZTpOvvZXG-Z4bYz5faAD25HYhMTrPkc39bJ2tjRDuqfdgbUdKzdtqGXLd2yDPgmTi9JamIwwD-1bEpjh3OHdT4C8XNGdyYBkk8f7T-Zz2gAd2tIdl_boJwIoKbgLjB6d3slY7Yps92T9Pnu3e-8TDHtwhQCmx5BE0-0RpFUDvTttIyfSJznxOhuH0AZLxf45NRWSUW9pgQ4b2ZgSPtTw6_vnkGLwuTN10VG0mrAf6s0qFqZvcy7u6hjzGYQe8-RS_5BKEL8GIerr0IENWS3Oa1FfR9vQh7fXLJhlENUc73X_iFQ3vWrk5l2xiyuldl13sCS4xbKmSmLwp0f9A%3D%3D). Instead of giving the CCP exactly what they want –– _silence and compliance_ –– we should use every tool at our disposal to **protect our athletes** so they can speak freely in defense of human name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Taking the Hill Event tomorrow (Tuesday)!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4sAsy8V9Jkta5zQhh5eHdzP5V6Fidj6EiwX9EBAPg1E=/Ft9lqYByL69FABWxhQQr8vWVdeKt0jRwGQBEe_q3d1s=)

DC Friends (and Virtual Ones) -

Please help us celebrate #BlackHistoryMonth tomorrow/Tuesday. We would very much appreciate it if you could [help support the five African American military Veterans currently serving in Congress](https://act.myngp.com/el/4sAsy8V9Jkta5zQhh5eHdzP5V6Fidj6EiwX9EBAPg1E=/Ft9lqYByL69FABWxhQQr8vWVdeKt0jRwGQBEe_q3d1s=). Three of them will be leaving Congress at the end of this year. Taking The Hill PAC, our leadership PAC, is working with the Congressional Black Caucus PAC to honor these five great Americans tomorrow/Tuesday at 6:30pm on February 8th at 423 New Jersey Ave SE, Washington, DC.

Attached is the invitation and you can [RSVP ](https://act.myngp.com/el/4sAsy8V9Jkta5zQhh5eHdzP5V6Fidj6EiwX9EBAPg1E=/Ft9lqYByL69FABWxhQQr8vWVdeKt0jRwGQBEe_q3d1s=)[here](https://act.myngp.com/el/4sAsy8V9Jkta5zQhh5eHdzP5V6Fidj6EiwX9EBAPg1E=/Pl5v9NezNqYaUWWBsUKDWIC3uo1ke3pn8mJtfxlSla4=). We are excited to see you there! Even if you can't make this event, we hope you can still support these courageous elected officials virtually or via a contribution. Hope to see you there!

\- Patrick

Patrick Murphy
Cell: 215-8507037
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Former Member of Congress, PA-1
Founder, [Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/4sAsy8V9Jkta5zQhh5eHdzP5V6Fidj6EiwX9EBAPg1E=/JQXfaxLQx7Mj891i9WUFMywnoUJVt7J0lzn4cqWKJpI=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/4sAsy8V9Jkta5zQhh5eHdzP5V6Fidj6EiwX9EBAPg1E=/Ft9lqYByL69FABWxhQQr8vWVdeKt0jRwGQBEe_q3d1s=).

Bristol PA 19007 United States

subject: The only job Ron Johnson is willing to fight for is his own

body:
| **'It's not like we don't have enough jobs here in Wisconsin': Ron Johnson won't try to land Oshkosh Corp. postal vehicle work**

_— Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_
---

See? This is exactly why we have to get rid of Ron Johnson. He’s refusing to help bring more good-paying union jobs to Wisconsin — even when they’re in his own backyard! And let’s just be honest:

**The only job Ron Johnson will fight for is his own.**

Wisconsin's workers are the best in the world, and they deserve a U.S. Senator who actually gives a damn about them and their families. What’s Ron Johnson’s message to them? You’re on your own. That’s not how this should work.

Look, this year is our chance to replace this guy with someone who will fight for all of us, which is why we’re working so hard to elect Sarah Godlewski. She has fought hard for the people of Wisconsin as State Treasurer, and it’s what she'll continue to do in the U.S. Senate.

[**If you believe we need to get rid of Ron Johnson and get this seat back to work for Wisconsin workers and families, please consider chipping in to our grassroots campaign today. No map is going to slow us down. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefImi1lgQebMWKnKKZXOFtatmHfeSMGdGT0bAigZkbyIRkGTGk9VXAgmQUl6hvrb2E3-Tu6Ee1ThMMWjK1t8TCCP3QA_A5-N9ay9QaTUvPtEiFrS3OW6R0EVadN7KealmTbCBRjXir0mlJmfY7Ct8u_kyXlIiQ6GpJYNi14ojjPCN8wnTU_dO4T2X497Ptug3Zhu701rMqpJ21Wth9B8Dl3E/3jd/WqNt5G-LS3WYzokK3-i9Ag/h0/lq1zfw8YWxUBIhWvehMScF5IA9r2JJzj1QwQzBul1L4) Peter, From day one, our movement has been people-powered. Odessa doesn’t accept _any_ money from corporate PACs. She means it when she says that this campaign is a movement. We know how to organize, and whether you’re urban, suburban, or rural, we’re coming with an agenda to unite the working class around policies that will work for all of us. So now that we have a new, racist, gerrymandered congressional map to run in, **it’s time for our movement to come together.** [**People-powered movements in this state have been building power for years, and no map is going to slow us down. If you’re with us, chip in $5 to our grassroots campaign today.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEi7W156MpKGVodxhzqXneLcDhnZ6hOrqEjM_5ePXFjFBJtzYZQSTOb2hfRoAj4Zo26tpl_LAnTRh5KrZ-wGQTwUJdiYQIQIgj-ewqpEdSahBIfAditIlcIlq8iY9YhJviCXjhpTKY0mFWQco09ZtNiHU_KdpypNAdX5gRlV7XpCnLkPn3AW8cUSbzjiZWjqAiJrBr3A4Qvtakbjq0kj0hy1Pdh_Gj0x-CcNlIbBSfnXA9r-6WmVLe9-nF21P4nu7Bs3WAu0c5Sb7QmgfqSYoFdrP1zB-Mbn52EyZpc8sJvqtg/3jd/WqNt5G-LS3WYzokK3-i9Ag/h1/Ds0GSBHeWHLmnXG-Qkz4QO2Sva3oqcYTIZlrm0k18mk) clean_body: No map is going to slow us down. | | | Peter, From day one, our movement has been people-powered. Odessa doesn’t accept any money from corporate PACs. She means it when she says that this campaign is a movement. We know how to organize, and whether you’re urban, suburban, or rural, we’re coming with an agenda to unite the working class around policies that will work for all of us. So now that we have a new, racist, gerrymandered congressional map to run in, it’s time for our movement to come together. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Like Odessa said, we have to claim our power and make this country work for all of us, not just the wealthy few. We’ll only be able to achieve that together. Thank you, Team Odessa | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

clean_body: I’ll be brief, Peter. Today marks only four months until the Montana primary. Jack has demonstrated tim | | | I’ll be brief, Peter. Today marks only four months until the Montana primary. Jack has demonstrated time and again that he is the only candidate who understands the many issues facing Montanans today. He knows, because they’re issues he’s faced his whole life here in Montana. He will be a fantastic Representative for us in Washington. But first, he needs to win the Primary election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: I’m working to elect Jack because I know he understands how to fight for our state. I see it everywhere he goes and I see it in the eyes of everyone he talks to. Montana is his home, and he will never stop working for folks here. Any amount you’re able to give goes a long way. – Nick Gevock Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-02 in Washington D.C. PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

body:
Events & Training - Feb 19 Centurion Town Hall on the TAKE BACK AMERICA Series Tour | | | View this email in your browser
---
|
---
| | Hi Friends,

I am very grateful for all of your support helping me replace Nancy Mace!

The agenda for this Tuesday night's 2/8/22 volunteers meeting is as follows:

Briefing.
Calendar Scrub.
Highlight Important events 19 Feb.
Team actions at next weekend event and link up point to get your cap, palm cards and supporters sign-up sheets.
Set Campaign Team Training for March.

The Zoom link to join at 7:00 p.m. is
[https://zoom.us/j/98922627676?pwd=YldlMWNuaENqOG9VOWNBUEthMUFQZz09](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=5da7efe51a&e=bb02dd73bf)
Upcoming events include:

2/10 -- Walterboro GOP, 7 pm
2/17 -- Charleston St. Andrews Rotary, 12:30 pm
2/17 -- Moncks Corner VFW 10256 Town Hall, 6 pm
2/19 -- Summerville VFW 3433 Town Hall & Fundraiser, 6 pm (don't miss it!)
2/21 -- Edisto GOP, 6 pm
2/23 -- Summerville Parents Group, 7 pm
2/24 \-- Bluffton Sun City GOP, 7 pm
2/24-2/27 -- Orlando CPAC

Go to the campaign **[Events](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=550c2c1dbb&e=bb02dd73bf)** page for details.
---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED TODAY :
1\. I am officially on GAB, DISCORD and TELEGRAM. Make sure to follow and like and comment on GAB Social Media Platform.
2\. BE A 30 Second Volunteer by Liking, Commenting and Sharing on my [Facebook Page](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=48780f3ff2&e=bb02dd73bf), [YouTube CHANNEL](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=bb1671c782&e=bb02dd73bf) , [Twitter](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=a1b015b31e&e=bb02dd73bf), GETTR @IngridCenturion. DAILY!! DAILY!!**

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion
---
| |
---
| Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_P.S. We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign. Please consider making a_[ _donation_](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=0ba404bd4a&e=bb02dd73bf) _[today](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=02366ea12c&e=bb02dd73bf)_ _._

---
The GOP is working around the clock to DESTROY Joe Biden's Presidency... and this brand-new poll PROVES their attacks are working!

_We NEED to make sure good Democrats aren’t abandoning him!_

**So we hand-selected 3,000 Democrats _(including YOU!)_ to respond IMMEDIATELY and set the record straight:**
[Do you APPROVE of President Joe Biden?](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Approval/?source=VPP_20220207_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1232%2E878179%2EMAMose)

*****BLANK POLLS WILL BE MARKED AS STRONGLY DISAPPROVE *****

Numbers like those will DESTROY our chances at keeping our Majorities in the midterms – so we desperately need accurate data!

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Kevin McCarthy would sacrifice anything at the altar of his ambition.
body:
It's a HUGE slap in the face that all Kevin McCarthy cares about is becoming Speaker of the House. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41540173/329282407/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjUwNjJlZS04YTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ZAiBfjiSMnDNGScJs3D6trIPITB2fiA-cI0duzrsQ4=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2f75e788-8988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/565062ee-8a88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjUwNjJlZS04YTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ZAiBfjiSMnDNGScJs3D6trIPITB2fiA-cI0duzrsQ4=&id=124172018)._ I'm not a politician, friend.

But it doesn't take being an elected official to know that our Central Valley community is hurting. It's a HUGE slap in the face that all Kevin McCarthy cares about is becoming Speaker of the House, and he’s willing to sacrifice anything at the altar of his own ambition.

I've worked for over two decades serving students and their parents in our community. I could care less about a Speaker's gavel.

This campaign is about engaging our community around the real issues that matter -- health care access, education, raising our wages, strengthening our agricultural economy, and fixing our immigration system.

Beating a guy like Kevin McCarthy means talking to everyone, which means no community will be written off because they are "too Republican" or vote too infrequently.

**Friend, NOTHING would ruin McCarthy's plan to become Speaker better than crushing him at the ballot box in his own backyard. We can do this, but it’s going to take a lot of grassroots support.**

**[Can you chip in $3 to our campaign to DEFEAT GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy? We need to raise another $9,101 before midnight to keep pace -- just 12 donors from 18326 will help us meet the mark.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41540174/329282408/-217444029?refcode=em-2.7.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjUwNjJlZS04YTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ZAiBfjiSMnDNGScJs3D6trIPITB2fiA-cI0duzrsQ4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41540175/329282409/-217444029?refcode=em-2.7.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjUwNjJlZS04YTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ZAiBfjiSMnDNGScJs3D6trIPITB2fiA-cI0duzrsQ4=)

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: What I Saw at the Southern Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Late last month, I visited the southern border to see for myself what the situation is like on the ground right now. What I saw was extremely......... Friend, Late last month, I visited the southern border to see for myself what the situation is like on the ground right now. What I saw was extremely troubling. [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f9a691d1db354877969362717de9a9e2&_e=HCCFEPP9Rs7cqXrJ9sAF49T3PYpZtV7VzP_yLWzyBSAIp9GXQzTDdCjLG2xcTt5ot4Fq9P4F_cqG8ImpvTKhAULtNCPvGqMs8eYRWfmKYmsDCwX7X_Iq1utZImglR3KllJh2oetjX8lG6Lc1Tn8qae7O5vjsX2mizy2nOsi1BcBBPP22_ND9T19VTKG4KnP9rY6tCBV7fY5nJbrTmdkSaxyIxeqADbwI3UmlB1uRtDH4EbBr7ZqnX8VDbrO5GIkqQGZAdCtaBENbBY4L2UXVp3upbTR43D3D_zqTcdYVuacGTkHlLn1blfyJ37wG8dyCuud1HAWp-v83G-llNT8cgJ9wjeXO2Auh13Izl3xZgIABq8rDVc29z1rd0XbFprU9SvfMlDAvyejKrMAPDlDX7Esrz2mc5HRid4w93qXlDpWJPWXVDCjywqwlxzPUrEMstQ4UUzg3z83RkkR2mk4Q1fKp-A432tKwxjRK9zX193fYXMNKv-U1A-0xuZan_wWh) After joining my colleagues at a two-day border summit in Texas hosted by Governor Greg Abbott and Attorney General Ken Paxton, I am disappointed yet not at all surprised by what I saw. The Biden administration has abandoned the fundamental idea that the U.S. must secure the border and control who comes in and out of our country. I saw that firsthand in South Texas. As a result, every state is now a border state. That includes Kansas. [**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f9a691d1db354877969362717de9a9e2&_e=HCCFEPP9Rs7cqXrJ9sAF49T3PYpZtV7VzP_yLWzyBSAIp9GXQzTDdCjLG2xcTt5ot4Fq9P4F_cqG8ImpvTKhAULtNCPvGqMs8eYRWfmKYmsDCwX7X_Iq1utZImglR3KllJh2oetjX8lG6Lc1Tn8qae7O5vjsX2mizy2nOsi1BcBBPP22_ND9T19VTKG4KnP9rY6tCBV7fY5nJbrTmdkSaxyIxeqADbwI3UmlB1uRtDH4EbBr7ZqnX8VDbrO5GIkqQGZAdCtaBENbBY4L2UXVp3upbTR43D3D_zqTcdYVuaelFChYIX2g5vVhRI4f99SFLc5Htj84nFnWuLjLGSJtiyZOSKi9hUxRMrCOT2n3gj2Jpk0ZYprfbAfbLswihYNlW093CRd-nymv3jpx00-qtQV5pKCM3Zf0KXAXEHJRSCPPEAtKFLsAATKmpokcolLQ8GItkbfFI7QHXd5_yLhHEbmDQ6kDgE0QlEHcVyiULcXfCNZD44R_77khkjSkXRKt) [**Add Your Name Now to Stand for Border Security >>>**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f9a691d1db354877969362717de9a9e2&_e=HCCFEPP9Rs7cqXrJ9sAF49T3PYpZtV7VzP_yLWzyBSAIp9GXQzTDdCjLG2xcTt5ot4Fq9P4F_cqG8ImpvTKhAULtNCPvGqMs8eYRWfmKYmsDCwX7X_Iq1utZImglR3KllJh2oetjX8lG6Lc1Tn8qae7O5vjsX2mizy2nOsi1BcBBPP22_ND9T19VTKG4KnP9rY6tCBV7fY5nJbrTmdkSaxyIxeqADbwI3UmlB1uRtDH4EbBr7ZqnX8VDbrO5GIkqQGZAdCtaBENbBY4L2UXVp3upbTR43D3D_zqTcdYVuaeRHwuiKpmF7MYAi4Ofr-xkaNUlFOioZJKAjD9Yol7QOsBCOlqugNMJCkv2yNoP_7ZZLEbHps2GpIvlKNZendRqqfO41qUaqzhshIK3J66qd4uRm9Q27D0qdCS7j-f_HT-tKGTJZEtzGUa0gRKK0XSoavguPvFf9wcr4YF4S9qpjDm_lQvzRUt6BW-V1bWtFD5vUOsx2TmHjmXuCkO3FyFl) As attorney general, I’ve seen the results firsthand here in Kansas. We’ve prosecuted individuals who’ve come to this country for the purpose of running drugs, participating in criminal enterprises, who’ve committed murder and terrible offenses on children. They hide among the mass of migrants to enter our country. If the federal government would just help us instead of wholly abandoning its responsibility to enforce access and egress at the border, these crimes would be preventable because these particular offenders wouldn't be here. Thankfully, Texas has stepped up and is trying to stand in the gap that’s been left by the federal government’s withdrawal. Texas has asked for our help and, in my view, Kansas should be helping them. I’ve called on Governor Kelly to send resources to help prevent crime coming across the border from making its way to our communities in Kansas. She has dismissed the idea as “political games.” **We must keep our Kansas communities safe. If you support helping Texas protect us by filling the gap created by Joe Biden’s abdication of the federal government's duty to secure the border, add your name now. [https://schmidtforkansas.com/stand-with-derek/](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f9a691d1db354877969362717de9a9e2&_e=HCCFEPP9Rs7cqXrJ9sAF49T3PYpZtV7VzP_yLWzyBSAIp9GXQzTDdCjLG2xcTt5ot4Fq9P4F_cqG8ImpvTKhAULtNCPvGqMs8eYRWfmKYmsDCwX7X_Iq1utZImglR3KllJh2oetjX8lG6Lc1Tn8qae7O5vjsX2mizy2nOsi1BcBBPP22_ND9T19VTKG4KnP9rY6tCBV7fY5nJbrTmdkSaxyIxeqADbwI3UmlB1uRtDH4EbBr7ZqnX8VDbrO5GIkqQGZAdCtaBENbBY4L2UXVp3upbTR43D3D_zqTcdYVuadHCMDMp2S1wrabpF_zX0wpocIU4BZBVK7WcAbrDOBscSNZQg5f8CD7sJirTYuIK41I4vOveT4g0mkY4geEpjdPkJVA9cfwGC5qLK9Cs9YTVph96_aEBAfOwhj6UNKRVvDLxdlIIKvP4gLr9gj4cbM-jNO2G9XiCLCnqEFDFivDffsIbTGzo5G5k30f5pGxYFU_KS2aSjHxPuD28rfVrt5U "http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=zJWPDDQmGS6uolkejTGuEuGrNpzGcJSG&_e=SzUF6U2gyn9pHYKhhOrM0ewMcsZohnYnSQXXyOonotm4RTjHRxNn9nHoUTL7e8ZCamwfdCxtZsi_W_manBVKZ3CpKG4mw2Qb0N6AM3_tdpbBvUgf9BqFfFU7JnUg06gjKrUVvKtIRv")** Let me be clear, Friend. Securing the border is not an issue that I hoped to be focused on as governor. But when nearly 2 million people have been apprehended by Customs and Border Protection agents in the last year alone, and countless more have eluded detection, ignoring it like Governor Kelly does is not an option. **Please, join me in this fight and add your name to stand strong for border security.[https://schmidtforkansas.com/stand-with-derek/](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f9a691d1db354877969362717de9a9e2&_e=HCCFEPP9Rs7cqXrJ9sAF49T3PYpZtV7VzP_yLWzyBSAIp9GXQzTDdCjLG2xcTt5ot4Fq9P4F_cqG8ImpvTKhAULtNCPvGqMs8eYRWfmKYmsDCwX7X_Iq1utZImglR3KllJh2oetjX8lG6Lc1Tn8qae7O5vjsX2mizy2nOsi1BcBBPP22_ND9T19VTKG4KnP9rY6tCBV7fY5nJbrTmdkSaxyIxeqADbwI3UmlB1uRtDH4EbBr7ZqnX8VDbrO5GIkqQGZAdCtaBENbBY4L2UXVp3upbTR43D3D_zqTcdYVuafVGbtg3XOl3Tz13JZ3QyOEZarrH1bAxyqFG1mr4kb6AksE3DZ60Hk_aWuzrEWibmftkviETzCW3kJKo8eEjJsQlHOKimwCV7NxzeT2kPf5McMepYPICnoMeCx-qOzv_cdvBDxolJP0_tPYy47u5j24v3VNoKZ4zxiuRm3EFHRvRMQFJ0wxu1ULeaFR_lRv1dqLjHpMYPhtkAPQ0jdAg9GZ)** I really appreciate your support, Friend. This is one of the most important issues facing our country today, and from what I’ve just seen, it’s only on track to get worse from here. It means a lot to have you with me in this fight to turn things around and secure our border once and for all. Thanks, Derek Schmidt | |

They hide among the mass of migrants to enter our country. She has dismissed the idea as “political games.” We must keep our Kansas communities safe. If you support helping Texas protect us by filling the gap created by Joe Biden’s abdication of the federal government's duty to secure the border, add your name now. "" Let me be clear, Friend. Securing the border is not an issue that I hoped to be focused on as governor. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming
body:
a place that politics cannot go | Are we going to lead, or are we going to be mere bystanders? That’s what we all have to ask ourselves in the aftermath of the events of January 6. I was not elected by the people of Wyoming to be a mere bystander.

[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=939cdd09523a41c3ab19f44ed9dab9aa&_t=ulcWH9XuTJCRladoI5OxBfA3EUXrLpCMDpji795x-C58f3ZDeANeTteX_2ZKeenA6768K90-IeWfaDJOH7ZrWrz_a46ZbxEDoPHmneZuojwqOUREJnxisC9XZoTjicrqq9XhjLDDkbBWps3nwzxlA_7p2PeHER2fpi5kSE2rbUB8cVZknUPQ1a1HC-v8KNUNNM8eXaVi2efqKRey4jpF-T4qWWpktVakEEUsy-SrcF0%3D)

---
Are we going to lead, or are we going to be mere bystanders?

That’s what we all have to ask ourselves in the aftermath of the events of January 6. I was not elected by the people of Wyoming to be a mere bystander. **I was elected to lead and to let the Constitution guide my decisions. That’s something that will _never_ change.**

Donald Trump is not someone who can ever be trusted with the reins of power again because he has demonstrated that he will not abide by the Constitution. He has sought to undermine the legitimacy of our elections and obstruct the peaceful transfer of power.

When we see what happened as a result of the lies he perpetuated, we see a place that politics can not go. We all have an obligation to tell the truth and to put our allegiance to this nation above partisanship.

**_We need to go forward in a way that helps us beat back the dangerous and negative Democrat policies._** We need to be focused on substance, and policy, and our concerns about the Biden Administration’s policies. **[We need to look to the future.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=939cdd09523a41c3ab19f44ed9dab9aa&_e=XCZBpXmGILxnIxF-JEzf_AAqG6eENhboXPsgHcyC4j4jT_lIiTYxQ61UylZugp-cGIJAb-32D5jwJit8Tv9AqhCERjKyBcmqoPlTj9hYo8ysibPu3Q6eWcAos2I3C91TaiVQP01TUzwiLTYkIo-VJyAb8bT3yMh-9_CnT4GZ6rrjfU7TZEyxkwqQfCZgWl7dYSmiVicKNfjGhgwNFETmO5YIybrMmcN_SJcnBpGS59fn74OcRf5RkvcQwRFjb0MzLTsxPkFL857DTUfs9PXt7gyhUKf0oUmT7pO8v3bzZUHDCN5KPVKD5ymz53QNUuRljyX3ecG-M-y3cotkuqRGnodQoPVoA22OXYQR3PzXvUkvPhXU27jtU-Ix-ktFHhnO2rB3QT6KdVr2Lib6pyf2SKJNlgDStPq_0oep_JkObIXIHrpZA1QT9QWXJ9d9AqpDdjqIFkmFqxHC_GEOeCDtzsePu-Q7KR4pVJKivu5H_UZY_-3ITGwEQ2w1FMruB0bB6cr-D1P2OUELF5n0Yav6mrDoB1UmYsooAqmjZnpISY-xO_t1_PVzdvtI97qvrFQT)**

I need your partnership to make this vision a reality. I believe that our work within the Republican Party is far from over and - for the sake of our country - we need to succeed.

**[Please contribute to help me get my message to the people of Wyoming and America.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=939cdd09523a41c3ab19f44ed9dab9aa&_e=XCZBpXmGILxnIxF-JEzf_AAqG6eENhboXPsgHcyC4j4jT_lIiTYxQ61UylZugp-cGIJAb-32D5jwJit8Tv9AqhCERjKyBcmqoPlTj9hYo8ysibPu3Q6eWcAos2I3C91TaiVQP01TUzwiLTYkIo-VJyAb8bT3yMh-9_CnT4GZ6rrjfU7TZEyxkwqQfCZgWl7dYSmiVicKNfjGhgwNFETmO5YIybrMmcN_SJcnBpGS59fn74OcRf5RkvcQwRFjb0MzLTsxPkFL857DTUfs9PXt7gyhUKf0oUmT7pO8v3bzZUHDCN5KPVKD5ymz53QNUuRljyX3ecG-M-y3cotkuqRGnodQoPVoA22OXYQR3PzXvUnJXbEMGHQB3QRiAK0ucJ0SABXsYLA3E_IkShsaAtFLEg0GGh5gVcVTqQuQ5Y_49pC73PEN3IG6NbjNWehBf9UEBqlVJnXR4IVNoZfAw48b160FJpANyxGloiLz2Bxz4Xcr0q2u-PvARUKhY-k9k_BGgdH4_WfBlJJMVDlTHobVvcJed0opjdNfauEAEjS1i1D_LuAxkJmIMnAhvn-M4ZLV)** Our Party deserves principled leadership.

Sincerely,
Liz Cheney

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The numbers are in (re: Team Blue PAC)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last summer, Reps. Hakeem Jeffries and Josh Gottheimer launched Team Blue
PAC to protect corporate Democrats from progressive primary challengers.
Back in June, we predicted that Team Blue PAC would be another way for
corporate Democrats to raise money from corporate donors to protect
themselves and the interests of their donors.

FEC numbers were just released and we were right,
Peter: Team Blue PAC is being
funded by corporations and their lobbyists.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93206?refcode=em20220207-21873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp ]Headline from Sludge reads House Democrats' New Anti-Progressive PAC is
Funded by Corporate Lobbyists and PACs

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93206?refcode=em20220207-21873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp ]We know that Team Blue PAC and its corporate donors will do whatever
they can this cycle to defeat our progressive primary challengers. Will
you chip in $3 so we can stop them?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93206?refcode=em20220207-21873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp ]Chip in $3

- Team JD

-----Forwarded Message-----
Sent: June 30, 2021
From: JusticeDemocrats.com
Subject: re: Team Blue PAC

Peter,

In 2018, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez stunned the political establishment when
she defeated out of touch incumbent Joe Crowley.

In 2020, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Marie Newman all beat corporate
Democrats backed by Wall Street, the defense industry, and Big Pharma.

Now, the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House, Hakeem Jeffries, and one
of the most conservative Democrats in Congress, Josh Gottheimer, have
teamed up to launch “Team Blue PAC” to protect corporate Democrats from
primary challengers like Justice Democrats.

Team Blue PAC is a response to the strength of our movement and the threat
that Justice Democrats — and the working-class progressives running for
office — pose to the Democratic establishment. House Democrats know that
Justice Democrats govern according to their values, not the influence of
Wall Street or corporate money, and have launched Team Blue PAC to protect
themselves and their corporate donors.

When you donate to Justice Democrats, you send a message to the Democratic
establishment that we need more people like AOC, Cori Bush, and Jamaal
Bowman in Congress — who will push for policies to address the overlapping
economic injustice, racial inequality, and public health crises we are
facing. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93206?refcode=em20220207-21873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp ]Team Blue PAC will spend big money this cycle to defeat
Justice Democrats. Will you chip in $3 so we can stop them?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93206?refcode=em20220207-21873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp ]Chip in $3

House Democrats are targeting Justice Democrats because they know that the
working class people we elect to Congress will take principled positions
that are not popular with Wall Street. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93206?refcode=em20220207-21873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1026&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp ]While Justice Democrats fight
to fundamentally transform politics, Team Blue PAC and the Democratic
establishment are fighting just as hard to maintain the status quo. Will
you join us in this fight by chipping in $3 right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93206?refcode=em20220207-21873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1027&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp ]Chip in $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1028&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1029&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220207-21873-footer&t=1030&refcode2=21873_1203867_YxdBYp&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1031&akid=21873%2E1203867%2EYxdBYp

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Biaggi for Congress
subject: RE: Alessandra’s announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
AB can not do this alone.
#
Friend —
Alessandra reached out this morning to let you know that she’s running for Congress in New York’s 3rd district.
We want to be honest with you — we’ve already had an _incredible_ response to AB’s announcement from supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $15 at a time.
**But today’s fundraising will set the tone for the rest of our campaign, so we are hoping for another 250 contributions by the end of the day. The number of contributions is more important than the amount of money we raise, because it will show everyone watching that AB has the support to win.**
Please, if you are able:
[**Make a contribution of $3 or more today to support Alessandra’s campaign for NY-03. We wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-launch-feb/?refcode=em220207-2-15&refcode2=444_59515_ATXKmp&akid=444%2E59515%2EATXKmp)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-launch-feb/?refcode=em220207-2-15&refcode2=444_59515_ATXKmp&akid=444%2E59515%2EATXKmp)**
Alessandra is ready to bring her fight to Congress, but she can not do it alone. So any amount you can pitch in will go a long way for this movement.
Thank you for reading, and we’ll be in touch soon.
— Team Biaggi

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=444%2E59515%2EATXKmp).

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I will not allow children to fall back into poverty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
That’s why I’m working every day to make these tax credits permanent.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41535715/329240087/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220207-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmY3YjcxMi02NTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xcktE_MuYhlh6FDdIxjtXnvannIQgoV8hGuMVL4QG_I=)
---
| From July to December of last year, millions of families and children across the country received payments under the Child Tax Credit. In CA-53 alone, we returned more than $192 million to the families of 129,000 children. These payments were life-changing for so many families, enabling them to pay bills, buy household necessities, and plan for the future.

But the program ended in December, sending an estimated 10 million children back into poverty and leaving millions facing food insecurity. A short-term approach to tackling child poverty will never be enough; we have to reinstate the Child Tax Credit and make it permanent – to give working families the support they need and deserve.

**That’s why I’m working every day to make these tax credits permanent — because it’s unacceptable to allow even a single kid to fall back into poverty.**

But I want to be fully transparent — it’s an uphill battle. If Republicans take control of the House in 2022, a permanent Child Tax Credit and so many other programs that would benefit American families will never see the light of day. Between an already slim majority and ongoing redistricting in many states, Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat if we’re going to keep the House blue in 2022 — including our district. [_**Can you chip in today to support our campaign and ensure that I can keep up this work?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41535716/329240088/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220207-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmY3YjcxMi02NTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xcktE_MuYhlh6FDdIxjtXnvannIQgoV8hGuMVL4QG_I=)

clean_body: That’s why I’m working every day to make these tax credits permanent. | = | From July to December of last year, millions of families and children across the country received payments under the Child Tax Credit. In CA-53 alone, we returned more than $192 million to the families of 129,000 children. These payments were life-changing for so many families, enabling them to pay bills, buy household necessities, and plan for the future. But the program ended in December, sending an estimated 10 million children back into poverty and leaving millions facing food insecurity. A short-term approach to tackling child poverty will never be enough; we have to reinstate the Child Tax Credit and make it permanent – to give working families the support they need and deserve. That’s why I’m working every day to make these tax credits permanent — because it’s unacceptable to allow even a single kid to fall back into poverty. But I want to be fully transparent — it’s an uphill battle. If Republicans take control of the House in 2022, a permanent Child Tax Credit and so many other programs that would benefit American families will never see the light of day. Between an already slim majority and ongoing redistricting in many states, Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat if we’re going to keep the House blue in 2022 — including our district. = | | | = | = | = | = | = The Child Tax Credit is good for children, good for families, and good for our country. I won’t stop working to bring it back, and I’m glad to have you by my side. Thank you, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

subject: Just One Week!
body:
In 2020, 57% of Texans voted early according to Texas Tribune’s reporting, here’s what this week means for our campaign. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41540286/329282908/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYwZGM2Ni04Zjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xw9NdRyXl2bClnQslMXI5gntfyDQGjiai0GJw1W6ja8=)
Dear Friend, **[We are exactly one week from when voters in the brand new district in Austin Texas will have the opportunity to vote for Donna Imam in TX-37. Can you make a $5 donation today and help us get out the vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41540287/329282909/-780221392?amount=5&refcode=pl_20220207_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYwZGM2Ni04Zjg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xw9NdRyXl2bClnQslMXI5gntfyDQGjiai0GJw1W6ja8=)** Our campaign has worked tirelessly since late June of 2021, and it has not been easy. We’re doing everything we can to get out the vote and win this primary. Here are some of the challenges in Texas that we’re addressing:
* _**Redistricting:**_ This is a brand new district, and many people are not aware that they have been redistricted. For decades, Austin has been sliced into pieces like a pizza and represented by 5 extreme GOP Congressmembers, so for the first time in a long time Austin will have the opportunity to have a Democrat that represents them. We’re informing voters and letting them know how important it is that they make their voices heard.

* _**New Representation:**_ 95% of the population growth over the last decade was among Hispanic, Black and Asian Americans. Austin needs representation that reflects the community it has become. Donna’s not a politician, she’s an engineer with experience solving large scale problems in high tech. Congress needs leadership in science and technology to deliver solutions for future generations.

* _**Mid-terms:**_ Primary elections and midterms have low voter participation, so we have to work extra hard to get out the vote and let people know what’s at stake. Solving homelessess, getting healthcare coverage and debt-free education is essential for people in Austin and across our nation. Donna will be a champion for working families, and we’re letting voters know.

clean_body: In 2020, 57% of Texans voted early according to Texas Tribune’s reporting, here’s what this week means for our campaign. | = Dear Friend, = Our campaign has worked tirelessly since late June of 2021, and it has not been easy. We’re doing everything we can to get out the vote and win this primary. Here are some of the challenges in Texas that we’re addressing: Redistricting: This is a brand new district, and many people are not aware that they have been redistricted. For decades, Austin has been sliced into pieces like a pizza and represented by 5 extreme GOP Congressmembers, so for the first time in a long time Austin will have the opportunity to have a Democrat that represents them. We’re informing voters and letting them know how important it is that they make their voices heard. New Representation: 95% of the population growth over the last decade was among Hispanic, Black and Asian Americans. Austin needs representation that reflects the community it has become. Donna’s not a politician, she’s an engineer with experience solving large scale problems in high tech. Congress needs leadership in science and technology to deliver solutions for future generations. Mid-terms: Primary elections and midterms have low voter participation, so we have to work extra hard to get out the vote and let people know what’s at stake. Solving homelessess, getting healthcare coverage and debt-free education is essential for people in Austin and across our nation. Donna will be a champion for working families, and we’re letting voters know. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = =** Team Donna. | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

subject: Is this the biggest threat?
body:

name: Dean Heller
subject: Will you support a parents’ bill of rights?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
Texas just introduced a “Parental Bill of Rights” designed to take power back from teachers’ unions and protect the rights of parents in education. | |
---
[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=af64531ff4aa4924bd609c45030d9cfe&_e=ldpV_rqQe475mFNMtqWZwacbnq3GoJBdAyu6N9Dp9Mcwyl7rKncVsMlYmrxMYmToCyKC3lP0MHg40IWJf8ofKc0uNplJG3EHqBgFFHxEkVbA3Fa0EGXwSLEsotpoVZcgEC97vO4DshXKII8F9YlZcWuf760BIwsHPG8MYTeu-fGYsDzQrQsSxQFGjJHxu_JMjLLEb2BVvgfPe9fHSJl5bZKkLs8v-Q5yQ6sYA1h7WqZ-0kSP95ze5uU1ZPiYdbpTPkOUa3FUdcwQWFdc-TbnHzcqb0uArPGdXnNiAHnD2gbgSRa8LoR1bBFyIOohwKaOApV6DVdnFpujT33K42bHfvZw_M6AnguBaIfvcTkoJdbu7WoZdM2ca_GJ61ppESdOf_7T3FNwyzCKI6_xBMUlCxXLAiuG_jrSRKOP6FQmO1W_2Np8oCcLiMeFUQO5rPY0VvFYGjHa-7D4GB75W6feKCgjr8gkwDnDvjWQDTejpPyC8lHDqdGJykzZyA43M0f0)
|
---
Peter,

Texas just introduced a “Parental Bill of Rights” designed to take power back from teachers’ unions and protect the rights of parents in education.

**I say it’s time we do the same for Nevada parents. **

During the pandemic, we’ve heard over and over again from the Left’s most extreme voices that parents need to sit down and shut up when it comes to mask mandates, Critical Race Theory, and remote learning.

_Here in Nevada, career politicians have bowed to teachers’ unions that DON’T have our children’s best interests in mind. _

[_**Sign here if you agree we need to make parents’ rights a priority in Nevada >>>**_](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=af64531ff4aa4924bd609c45030d9cfe&_e=ldpV_rqQe475mFNMtqWZwacbnq3GoJBdAyu6N9Dp9Mcwyl7rKncVsMlYmrxMYmToCyKC3lP0MHg40IWJf8ofKc0uNplJG3EHqBgFFHxEkVbA3Fa0EGXwSLEsotpoVZcgEC97vO4DshXKII8F9YlZcWuf760BIwsHPG8MYTeu-fGYsDzQrQsSxQFGjJHxu_JMjLLEb2BVvgfPe9fHSJl5bZKkLs8v-Q5yQ6sYA1h7WqZ-0kSP95ze5uU1ZPiYdbpTPkOUa3FUdcwQWFdc-TbnHzcqb0uArPGdXnNiAHnD2gZwrv5esedDFY2Qwt4DyERhd-5V5Ppi-ZOTQlaFiazsQyU29dK_CWe5yQN5o-83ty7FfFYV17AQXooIQr3OIuerowqOP3uH2x7waPVGwgi22JkHEVqpUGbq04SZuVFSeHKHQLUqJtMoUi3e2TYycU793Ps_Mfp9ZMS35bKhNExgjG-XBwQt_yLuEJw-BMFK1H5dUTsU4Sof_yEUZHqDpRRi)
[**PROTECT PARENTS RIGHTS**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=af64531ff4aa4924bd609c45030d9cfe&_e=ldpV_rqQe475mFNMtqWZwacbnq3GoJBdAyu6N9Dp9Mcwyl7rKncVsMlYmrxMYmToCyKC3lP0MHg40IWJf8ofKc0uNplJG3EHqBgFFHxEkVbA3Fa0EGXwSLEsotpoVZcgEC97vO4DshXKII8F9YlZcWuf760BIwsHPG8MYTeu-fGYsDzQrQsSxQFGjJHxu_JMjLLEb2BVvgfPe9fHSJl5bZKkLs8v-Q5yQ6sYA1h7WqZ-0kSP95ze5uU1ZPiYdbpTPkOUa3FUdcwQWFdc-TbnHzcqb0uArPGdXnNiAHnD2gbUILZWzWEXIBP--8HEGr0069WV0JCb_HqoTYTfT0YD4htQO-ZbUvhcIKwahEk2Zqv-IYuleFAeBj4Y9Tj7_yhVmuB-CCqZxVM1pVhHDx7uGJ_DkYSPQO6mD0GdHy4u6LSPW6lltlMPLaaaPtrrkYYsk0L-ImLzIJynr8nL8bXPCoMk-7DbN8vO5gkyPcQ4FADE8N7YH7sJx3mu7ybYNjpx)
Schools are shutting down again all over the country. These kinds of reckless policies hurt our children and their long-term potential.

**We need to provide Nevadans with more educational choices** by expanding school choice and increasing funding for charter schools and vocational schools.

This will be a top priority for me in office –– but I need to know that you’re on board. Will you [_**sign this petition**_](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=af64531ff4aa4924bd609c45030d9cfe&_e=ldpV_rqQe475mFNMtqWZwacbnq3GoJBdAyu6N9Dp9Mcwyl7rKncVsMlYmrxMYmToCyKC3lP0MHg40IWJf8ofKc0uNplJG3EHqBgFFHxEkVbA3Fa0EGXwSLEsotpoVZcgEC97vO4DshXKII8F9YlZcWuf760BIwsHPG8MYTeu-fGYsDzQrQsSxQFGjJHxu_JMjLLEb2BVvgfPe9fHSJl5bZKkLs8v-Q5yQ6sYA1h7WqZ-0kSP95ze5uU1ZPiYdbpTPkOUa3FUdcwQWFdc-TbnHzcqb0uArPGdXnNiAHnD2gZhEZtUr0D2s2VDDeDrkZxtwVEVYv-u-NE6bR5-akVsmalQe7Ki13KzygFjXdrjXCQX9ogurCE02oi4hxuDdnBOAdF62HW9FKM_UbpHXPXm8_2lGfLmJIl_ohTJU36UqWPWa1GhCfwooG_tsKX9Sj7rukOSExZIjqKPpx-NIy4iWiEpRO_gU3ZAKRJv1EyR8xL5pUZkwM_mILeeGSg9c9XJ) to show you support protecting parents’ rights?

Thanks,
– Dean

name: Team Cranley-Fedor
subject: FREE EVENT: Cranley-Fedor town hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
This is the first step in fixing our criminal justice system, friend. | Hey friend, Starting today in Toledo, Team Cranley-Fedor — joined by special guests — will host a series of town hall-style events across Ohio to talk about the past, present, and future of the social and criminal justice movements. **We’d love for you to be part of these conversations, too.[Click here to RSVP to a Cranley-Fedor town hall event near you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41536629/329243962/-128263447?refcode=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM2ZGJhZS02OTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmO-2u3R0mz5bG1OFTl7tewH34kG7-y0DhW7D7ymtzA=&emci=e0010186-5988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)** Joining John and Teresa on stage to help dive into these incredibly important topics are a survivor of human trafficking and an exoneree from the Ohio Innocence Project, which John co-founded prior to taking office in an effort to combat wrongful imprisonment. **Friend, John has dedicated his life’s work to fixing our justice system, and now,_he’s running to fix Ohio’s criminal justice system state-wide._** Conversations like these are just the first step in moving the ball forward, which is why John and Teresa want to hear from you, too. If you’re able to attend, we’d love to see you at any of our events. **Here’s where we’ll be over the next month:**
* 2/7 - Toledo
* 2/15 - Columbus
* 2/16 - Dayton
* 2/21 - Cleveland
* 2/28 - Cincinnati
* 3/6 - Youngstown
* 3/7 - Canton

**[You don’t want to miss out on this opportunity to be a part of the conversation. It only takes a minute to sign up!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41536630/329243963/-128263447?refcode=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM2ZGJhZS02OTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmO-2u3R0mz5bG1OFTl7tewH34kG7-y0DhW7D7ymtzA=&emci=e0010186-5988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)** _**[RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41536632/329243964/-128263447?refcode=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM2ZGJhZS02OTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmO-2u3R0mz5bG1OFTl7tewH34kG7-y0DhW7D7ymtzA=&emci=e0010186-5988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)**_ Hope to see you out there, Team Cranley-Fedor
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41536633/329243967/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM2ZGJhZS02OTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmO-2u3R0mz5bG1OFTl7tewH34kG7-y0DhW7D7ymtzA=)** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41536635/329243968/-1406512299?recurring=true&refcode=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM2ZGJhZS02OTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmO-2u3R0mz5bG1OFTl7tewH34kG7-y0DhW7D7ymtzA=)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41536637/329243969/-1406512299?refcode=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.a636dbae-6988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM2ZGJhZS02OTg4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmO-2u3R0mz5bG1OFTl7tewH34kG7-y0DhW7D7ymtzA=)

Fellow American,

I wanted to reach out to you today and give you an update on my campaign for Governor of Texas.
* Illegals are POURING across our border and the current Governor is complicit in allowing this invasion
* Vaccines are being mandated or Texans will lose their jobs
* Candidates for Governor are calling for the confiscation of our guns

clean_body: We are ahead in the polls and we must keep our momentum strong. | Fellow American, I wanted to reach out to you today and give you an update on my campaign for Governor of Texas. Illegals are POURING across our border and the current Governor is complicit in allowing this invasion Vaccines are being mandated or Texans will lose their jobs * Candidates for Governor are calling for the confiscation of our guns We have received an outpouring of support and thank you for helping us reach 15,000 donations to our campaign. But we cannot slow down - the current Governor is FAILING the people of Texas. We are ahead in the polls and we must keep our momentum strong. Even a few dollars goes a long way in helping us WIN THIS RACE. I need your help today, Fellow American, to protect the sovereignty of Texas. Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN The election laws in Texas allow for unlimited donation amounts as long as the funds are not from an incorporated entity. Make checks payable: Allen West Campaign PO Box 740846 Dallas, TX 75374 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

clean_body: President Biden just asked what Republicans stand for. Well, We stand for... Peter, When President Biden stood in front of the nation, after hiding for 78 days , he asked the question; ‘What do Republicans stand for?’ Well, Mr. President, we stand for three things above all else: But it doesn’t end there. We believe our government should work for us, not the other way around. Government should give you a hand-up, not a handout. It’s time we get back to a government of the people, for the people, and by the people! I can only do that with your support! Are you satisfied with what’s going on right now? Or do you want to see a change? In service, Captain Jesse Jensen Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. In the Army, he led troops in combat and took out high-value targets. Now, he’s taking on the politicians in D.C. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB, TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY. Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress

subject: Dave Bency Endorses Jay Block for Governor

body:
I will always stand with our law enforcement officers! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-6789149?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=a24ccc1d16&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **Did you hear the news?**

Dave Bency, lead negotiator for the New Mexico Coalition of Public Safety just endorsed my campaign for governor! Dave is someone who has worked tirelessly for our law enforcement officers and gives them the support they need when they need it the most.

**Dave had this to say about our campaign for governor:**
---
|
---
| _“Commissioner Jay Block is dedicated to first responders by not only his words, but through his actions. He volunteered to go through and learn how firefighters train. He has gone on ride-alongs with deputies. He fought for and funded a much-needed K-9 drug dog. He has fought for raises for first responders and voted against small pay raises because he believed they were not enough. When firefighters or deputies ask for anything, they go to Jay because they know he has their back.

I have never seen a commissioner during my time as a union negotiator support our first responders more than Jay. **He has my full endorsement, and when he is elected Governor, first responders will finally have a leader who has their back.”**_
---
|
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=eeb9979f1c&e=102b599530)
---
| Peter, New Mexico needs a governor that pledges to support our law enforcement officers _**when they need it most.**_ Police departments across the country are routinely under fire, not from violent criminals, but from the radical Left. Leftists wish to see our country destroyed and part of their radical agenda is to dismantle the systems that keep us safe.

Peter, will you chip into my campaign to help create a safer New Mexico? [**$5**](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=68ada91a30&e=102b599530) , [**$20**](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=156a1da1b4&e=102b599530) , or even****[**$50**](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=f066b856db&e=102b599530) will go a long way to help our pro-America, pro-freedom campaign.
[**> >> CHIP IN NOW <<<**](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=5fc8ea288b&e=102b599530)

body:
Show Maloney the Door

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=0cc862bfdab540bfadb2ee93e3702ad3&_e=jQawe99jeq_u3aOwwvawEVnP2M7h4UWU5ehJj7JihR7W_NjB5FOa7SaWsL9wbsdWaT9CWtUO_uaH8NYV8Bn_R5rDtEglc8SLzfygFCfAAWUbbDxokJXyYW5OgGPVCxGOIFnBzV1nhIz6XSedRn_dZ8Et4L_LGFG3oSzF-nsRbQU6ivD86jKUUuzPapivTG8UcZv4jmfS03J1W_x5FUqBjgZCkvHegJUBnuTFaEC8tuRjs1VJ1j1I-TlvvZ4tm88eN1R4J19Ll7nR9ct_6rcfo9zDE04bMaDb7TlU7YKeL9rW0g20jPzzbFY8A1SuDzc7cIKnJGwNdbTdP1hUM5CT5MUl91S73fWnYN18rhuryJr6huTaRs87AUkGttiYl6nDX-npEbJ7OD3moojN40limdT0ddCyJiOKFmbKkZztT-3xXtv68MfBVCoKb0yX0_ZYxd6dgKOicsao8H03MCaNn7ZcrplQgEo_lo6yNyGVOXiFb_Wd1Qztf2Rj4Qc3ohCQeaznxEKHfYBpLQ5fYLymaw%3D%3D)
---
Friends,

2022 is gearing up to be a wave year for Republicans, and NY-18 is at the front of it.

I’m proud to say that together, we have the opportunity to beat Democrat Sean Patrick Maloney and make sure Republicans take back control of the House of Representatives.

This race is the most competitive House race in the country, and it’s OUR CHANCE to strike back at the elitist Left that have run New York for far too long.

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Tell my Republican colleagues on the Judiciary Committee not to delay and swiftly advance our SCOTUS nominee to the Senate floor for confirmation.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
President Biden and I are in absolute agreement. The Supreme Court nominee should have extraordinary qualifications, character, experience, and integrity. And yes, she should be a Black woman. It’s time.
[**If you support President Biden’s plan, please add your name today to urge my Republican colleagues on the Judiciary Committee to swiftly advance our nominee to the Senate floor for her confirmation vote.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scotus-petition-em-feb22/?source=em220207-1-30&refcode2=626.159979.0Q-aYj&akid=626%2E159979%2E0Q-aYj)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scotus-petition-em-feb22/?source=em220207-1-30&refcode2=626.159979.0Q-aYj&akid=626%2E159979%2E0Q-aYj)**
Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans will do anything in their power to slow down this process and try to block President Biden from filling this vacancy.
Already some Republican senators are attacking the idea of a Black woman as the nominee — implying that they believe that somehow there are no qualified Black women to hold the position.
Shame on them.
As the first Latino to represent California in the Senate, I can attest firsthand how much representation matters. It is critical that diverse perspectives and voices are finally heard within the highest institutions of our country.
As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I will do everything in my power to confirm President Biden’s nominee as quickly and fairly as possible. But we must all stand together to defend our nominee from Republican attacks and obstruction — working to confirm her appointment as swiftly as possible.
[**So please, if you are ready to see a Black woman on the Supreme Court, add your name today to tell my Republican colleagues on the Judiciary Committee to swiftly advance her nomination to the Senate floor for confirmation.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scotus-petition-em-feb22/?source=em220207-1-30&refcode2=626.159979.0Q-aYj&akid=626%2E159979%2E0Q-aYj)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scotus-petition-em-feb22/?source=em220207-1-30&refcode2=626.159979.0Q-aYj&akid=626%2E159979%2E0Q-aYj)**
Thank you so much for standing with me in this important moment.
\- Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=626%2E159979%2E0Q-aYj)
